title_zh: 能量转移催化实现 2-吡啶酮的桦木型还原
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    部分饱和杂芳烃是药物开发中的关键中间体，因为它们的 C(sp
                    3
                    ）特征和固有的合成多功能性使得能够快速生成改进的先导结构。尽管它们具有价值，但由于安全性和化学选择性的挑战，在桦木条件下直接获取其芳香族前体仍然受到限制。在这种背景下，能量转移（EnT）驱动的桦木型还原已成为（化学）选择性产物形成的强大策略。然而，它在很大程度上仅限于双环（杂）芳烃，而其更常见的单环对应物仍远未得到充分开发。在此，我们描述了 2-吡啶酮及其衍生物的三重态敏化、部分饱和，它们被称为药物发现中的特权支架。我们的方法显示了 Birch 型产品卓越的区域选择性，并能耐受大量官能团，绕过了传统的高度还原反应条件。通过实验和计算研究了反应机理，为所提出的 EnT-HAT 反应途径提供了强有力的证据，并合理化了观察到的区域选择性。最后，多功能且尚未充分开发的产品基序可以应用于下游修饰，以扩展类药 C(sp
                    3
                    )-丰富的化学空间。

title: Facet‐Dependent Water Inhibition of Alkanol Dehydration on TiO2 via Distinct Water–Alkanol Complexes
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Water is ubiquitous in biomass‐derived feeds, yet its molecular impact on oxygen‐elimination reactions remains poorly understood, particularly for catalysts exposing different facets. Here, we utilize well‐defined TiO
                    2
                    nanocrystals with dominant (101) and (001) facets to reveal a pronounced facet‐dependent effect of water, where inhibition for dehydration of isopropanol (IPA) on the TiO
                    2
                    (001) surface is about four times more severe than TiO
                    2
                    (101). Through a combination of in situ solid state NMR, in situ infrared spectroscopy, kinetics studies, and theoretical calculations, we demonstrate that this disparity arises from the formation of distinct alkanol‐water complex intermediates. On TiO
                    2
                    (001), IPA undergoes dissociative adsorption to form an isopropoxide‐H
                    2
                    O complex that readily drives the surface into a complex‐dominated regime. This pathway increases the activation barrier for C–H cleavage by 40 kJ mol
                    −1
                    by inducing a disordered transition state. In contrast, TiO
                    2
                    (101) favors molecular IPA adsorption with weak hydrogen bonding to water, resulting in a smaller complex formation constant and a much smaller activation barrier increase (25 kJ mol
                    −1
                    ). By quantitatively linking facet‐dependent complex coverage to transition‐state destabilization, this work moves beyond simple site‐blocking models and provides a conceptual framework for designing catalysts that remain active in water‐containing environments.

title: Interface Passivation Inhibition Enabled by Anode–Cathode Synergistic Engineering for High‐Efficiency Electrodeposition of Transition Metals
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Room‐temperature electrodeposition is widely used to fabricate transition‐metal materials and alloys, but severe interfacial passivation drastically reduces current efficiency. More importantly, the intrinsic origin of interfacial passivation remains insufficiently understood, which has hampered the development of effective mitigation strategies. Herein, taking multivalent Ti as a representative example, we demonstrated that the bonding between Ti−Cl and the electrode downshifts the d‐band center of the electrode by 0.15 eV, markedly suppressing ion adsorption and charge transfer at the interface. Further operando studies showed that anodic dissolution generated [Ti(Al
                    2
                    Cl
                    7
                    )
                    4
                    ]
                    2−
                    with a unique coordination environment that prevented the bonding between Ti–Cl and the electrode, while offering a faster migration rate and lower desolvation energy. Building on these insights, anodic and cathodic potentials were co‐regulated to couple Ti (II) dissolution and deposition. Furthermore, an optimized pulsed electrolysis protocol was introduced to jointly regulate interfacial ion migration and reaction kinetics, consequently maintaining stable electrode potentials for Ti/Ti (II) redox. Enabled by this anode–cathode synergistic engineering, an unprecedented current efficiency 93% was achieved even at a high Ti content. This work provides electronic‐scale insight into the interfacial passivation during room‐temperature transition‐metal electrodeposition and offers a straightforward and implementable strategy for scalable manufacturing of transition‐metal materials and alloys.

title: Leveraging Molecular Weight Dispersity for Scalable, Precise Synthesis of Nanocylinders Via Quasi‐Polymerization‐Induced Self‐Assembly
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The scalable and precise synthesis of polymeric nanostructures represents a significant challenge due to the inherent trade‐off between production efficiency and morphological control. Here, we introduce a
                    quasi
                    ‐polymerization‐induced self‐assembly (
                    quasi
                    ‐PISA) strategy that integrates in situ nucleation‐growth kinetics to fabricate uniform cylindrical micelles from liquid crystalline block copolymers at high concentrations (up to 10 wt.%). Counterintuitively, we demonstrate that the broad molecular weight distribution of PISA, often considered a drawback, can be harnessed as a key variable for precise assembly. By modulating polymerization conditions, fibril lengths were well controlled from 100 nm to over 3 µm (with length dispersity < 1.10) without requiring pre‐formed seeds. This enables the one‐pot synthesis of triblock comicelles and gram‐scale production. Rheological analysis revealed a scaling relationship between solution viscosity and fibril length (
                    η
                    ∝
                    L
                    0.667
                    ). This work advances the scalable fabrication of length‐controlled cylindrical nanostructures, offering design principles for their practical applications in diverse fields.

                    由于生产效率和形态控制之间固有的权衡，聚合物纳米结构的可扩展和精确合成是一个重大挑战。在这里，我们介绍一个

title: Design Guidelines for Anode Modifications to Eliminate Soft Short Circuits in Anode‐Free Na Batteries Under High Current Density With Large‐Capacity Plating, Demonstrated via Initiated Chemical Vapor Deposition (iCVD)
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Soft short circuits, an underrecognized failure mode, are especially critical in anode‐free sodium systems, where limited Na inventory makes cells highly vulnerable to irreversible Na loss. However, clear interphase‐design principles for suppressing soft shorting remain lacking because its interfacial origin and governing descriptors are still poorly understood. Herein, we propose a mechanistically guided interphase design strategy for soft‐short‐free Na metal anodes under practical conditions. An ultrathin (20 nm) poly(1H,1H,7H‐dodecafluoroheptyl acrylate) (pDFHA) layer was conformally deposited on an Al current collector via a solvent‐free vapor‐phase polymerization process. Its minimal thickness and intrinsic ionic conductivity enabled favorable Na
                    +
                    migration kinetics by shortening interfacial transport distance. Upon initial Na plating, interfacial conversion generated a ∼4 nm NaF‐rich inorganic domain, forming an integrated organic‐inorganic hybrid interphase. Finite element analysis showed that the laterally uniform interphase homogenized Na
                    +
                    flux and mitigated localized current amplification, thereby markedly reducing soft short initiation. Meanwhile, the hybrid architecture combined mechanical strength with the ability to accommodate substantial volume fluctuation. As a result, symmetric cells with pDFHA‐modified electrodes cycled stably for over 2000 h without soft shorting. Anode‐free full cells paired with Na
                    3
                    V
                    2
                    (PO
                    4
                    )
                    3
                    cathodes delivered 90.1 mAh g
                    −1
                    at 1C and retained 90.8% capacity after 200 cycles, demonstrating practical robustness.
title_zh: 通过引发化学气相沉积 (iCVD) 演示的阳极修改设计指南，以消除大容量电镀高电流密度下无阳极钠电池中的软短路

title: Advances in BODIPY Derivatives for Antibacterial Phototherapy
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  The escalating threat posed by antibiotic‐resistant bacteria and biofilm‐associated infections has driven increasing interest in non‐antibiotic antibacterial strategies. Antibacterial phototherapy (PT), including photodynamic therapy (PDT) and photothermal therapy (PTT), has attracted considerable attention owing to its spatiotemporal controllability, broad‐spectrum antibacterial activity, and low propensity for inducing drug resistance. Boron‐dipyrromethene (BODIPY) dyes, featuring exceptional structural tunability and favorable photophysical properties, have emerged as versatile scaffolds for the construction of antibacterial phototherapeutic systems. Through molecular engineering strategies including cationization, heavy‐atom incorporation, and π‐conjugation extension, combined with nanoassembly approaches, both the excited‐state processes of BODIPY and its interactions with bacterial interfaces can be precisely regulated. Integration into diverse nanoplatforms further improves aqueous dispersibility, biological stability, and accumulation at bacterial or biofilm interfaces, thereby enhancing reactive oxygen species (ROS) generation or enabling photothermal effects to achieve PDT, PTT, or synergistic antibacterial therapy. This review systematically summarizes the design strategies and structure‐activity relationships of BODIPY‐based antibacterial phototherapy reported over the past five years, covering molecular engineering of small‐molecule photosensitizers and nanoplatforms, bacterial targeting and carrier design, and discussing the challenges and future perspectives associated with clinical translation, particularly in terms of biosafety and targeted delivery.
title_zh: BODIPY衍生物用于抗菌光疗的研究进展
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  抗生素耐药细菌和生物膜相关感染造成的威胁不断升级，促使人们对非抗生素抗菌策略越来越感兴趣。抗菌光疗（PT），包括光动力疗法（PDT）和光热疗法（PTT），由于其时空可控性、广谱抗菌活性和低耐药性而受到广泛关注。硼二吡咯亚甲基（BODIPY）染料具有出色的结构可调性和良好的光物理性质，已成为构建抗菌光疗系统的多功能支架。通过阳离子化、重原子掺入和π共轭延伸等分子工程策略，结合纳米组装方法，BODIPY的激发态过程及其与细菌界面的相互作用都可以得到精确调控。集成到不同的纳米平台中进一步提高水分散性、生物稳定性以及在细菌或生物膜界面处的积累，从而增强活性氧（ROS）的产生或实现光热效应以实现PDT、PTT或协同抗菌治疗。本文系统总结了过去五年来报道的基于BODIPY的抗菌光疗的设计策略和构效关系，涵盖小分子光敏剂和纳米平台的分子工程、细菌靶向和载体设计，并讨论了挑战

title: Photoresponsive Discoidal Polymersomes With Tracelessly Crosslinkable Bilayers for Intracellular Drug Delivery
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Hierarchical biological structures inspire the design of synthetic nanomaterials, yet bottom‐up access to nonspherical polymersomes, particularly discoidal architectures like red blood cells (RBCs)—remains elusive due to thermodynamic constraints. Moreover, stimuli‐responsive control over such nonspherical vesicles is largely unexplored. Here we report photoresponsive block copolymer (BCP) amphiphiles bearing photolabile thiocoumarin units in the hydrophobic side chains that self‐assemble into five distinct nanostructures, including rare polymersome discocytes (PDs), by tuning block ratio and water addition rate during cosolvent‐mediated self‐assembly. Discocytes display superior cellular uptake compared to other morphologies. Visible light irradiation triggers thiocoumarin cleavage to generate primary amines that spontaneously undergo amidation, yielding in situ crosslinking that maintains the discocyte shape while simultaneously increasing bilayer membrane permeability. This dual action ensures morphological preservation during photo‐controlled selective release of hydrophilic cargos. These findings establish a general bottom‐up strategy for constructing biomimetic, shape‐engineered, and stimuli‐responsive vesicles, opening avenues for next‐generation therapeutic and diagnostic platforms.
title_zh: 用于细胞内药物输送的具有无痕可交联双层的光响应盘状聚合物囊泡
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  分层生物结构激发了合成纳米材料的设计，但由于热力学限制，自下而上获得非球形聚合物囊泡，特别是红细胞（RBC）等盘状结构仍然难以捉摸。此外，对这种非球形囊泡的刺激响应控制在很大程度上尚未被探索。在这里，我们报道了在疏水侧链中带有不稳定性硫代香豆素单元的光响应性嵌段共聚物（BCP）两亲物，通过在共溶剂介导的自组装过程中调节嵌段比和加水速率，它们自组装成五种不同的纳米结构，包括罕见的聚合物囊泡盘细胞（PD）。与其他形态相比，盘状细胞表现出优异的细胞摄取能力。可见光照射触发硫代香豆素裂解，产生伯胺，伯胺自发进行酰胺化，产生原位交联，维持盘细胞形状，同时增加双层膜的通透性。这种双重作用确保了亲水性物质在光控选择性释放过程中形态的保存。这些发现建立了一种通用的自下而上的策略，用于构建仿生、形状工程和刺激响应的囊泡，为下一代治疗和诊断平台开辟了途径。

title: Artificial Gap Junctional Channel Inhibiting the Proliferation of Hepatocellular Carcinoma Cells
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Gap junctions play a crucial role in intercellular communication, participating in both physiological and pathological processes. Although artificial gap junctions have been developed, their physiological functions beyond basic intercellular communication remain largely unexplored. Herein, we report a functional artificial gap junctional channel system constructed via electrostatic co‐assembly of an amphiphilic transmembrane channel and a hydrophilic extracellular channel. The efficient ion transport capability of the amphiphilic channel, coupled with the extensive aggregation of the hydrophilic module within the intercellular gap, enables the formation of stable intercellular junctions. Similar to natural gap junctions, these artificial channels not only mediate intercellular ion transport but also induce G1 phase cell cycle arrest and inhibit the proliferation of hepatocellular carcinoma cells. This work provides a new strategy for intervening in cell–cell communication and offers a potential therapeutic avenue for cancer and gap junction‐related diseases.
title_zh: 人工间隙连接通道抑制肝癌细胞增殖
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  间隙连接在细胞间通讯中发挥着至关重要的作用，参与生理和病理过程。尽管人工间隙连接已经被开发出来，但它们在基本细胞间通讯之外的生理功能仍然很大程度上未被探索。在此，我们报告了一种通过两亲性跨膜通道和亲水性细胞外通道的静电共组装构建的功能性人工间隙连接通道系统。两亲通道的高效离子传输能力，加上细胞间隙内亲水模块的广泛聚集，使得能够形成稳定的细胞间连接。与天然间隙连接类似，这些人工通道不仅介导细胞间离子转运，还诱导G1期细胞周期停滞并抑制肝细胞癌细胞的增殖。这项工作提供了一种干预细胞间通讯的新策略，并为癌症和间隙连接相关疾病提供了潜在的治疗途径。

title: Plutonium Gets a Cage
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Fellhauer et al. report the first plutonyl cage cluster, {Pu60}, marking a major advance in plutonium chemistry (DOI:
                    10.1002/anov.70018
                    ). Its unique distorted truncated dodecahedral topology expands the known library of aqueous actinide species and points toward nanoscale control of plutonium through tunable cage structures, counter‐cations, and ligand substitutions.
title_zh: 钚被关在笼子里
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    费尔豪尔等人。报告了第一个钚基笼簇，{Pu60}，标志着钚化学的重大进步（DOI：
                    10.1002/anov.70018
                    ）。其独特的扭曲截断十二面体拓扑扩展了已知的水性锕系元素库，并指向通过可调笼结构、反阳离子和配体取代对钚进行纳米级控制。

title: Hybrid Seeding‐Template Modulation of Sn–Pb Perovskite Crystallization for High‐Efficiency All‐Perovskite Tandem Solar Cells
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Narrow‐bandgap (NBG) Sn–Pb perovskites are indispensable for achieving high‐efficiency all‐perovskite tandem solar cells (TSCs). However, the pronounced disparity in the Lewis acidity of Sn
                    2+
                    and Pb
                    2+
                    often causes asynchronous nucleation and uncontrolled crystallization, severely limiting the device performance. Here, we propose a hybrid heterogeneous seeding and growth‐template strategy that integrates CsPbBr
                    3
                    quantum dots (QDs) with porous UiO‐66 metal–organic frameworks (MOFs) through grafted poly(4‐vinylpyridine) (P4VP) to achieve homogenous Sn–Pb perovskite films. Specifically, the embedded CsPbBr
                    3
                    QDs act as abundant nucleation centers, lowering the energy barrier and providing an epitaxial growth template, while the carbonyl (C═O) groups of UiO‐66 ligands and the imine (C═N) moieties of P4VP coordinate with Sn
                    2+
                    /Pb
                    2+
                    to finely regulate crystallization kinetics. Moreover, the UiO‐66‐P4VP framework functions as a scaffold to promote uniform film growth, resulting in Sn–Pb perovskite films with homogeneous composition and reduced defect density. As a result, the optimized single‐junction NBG perovskite solar cell achieves a fill factor exceeding 81% and a power conversion efficiency (PCE) of 23.32%. Furthermore, the two‐terminal all‐perovskite tandem device delivers a PCE of 29.18% and retains 80% of its initial efficiency after 500 h of continuous maximum power point tracking under simulated sunlight, demonstrating remarkable operational stability.

title: Aggregation‐Induced Doping Enhancement Enabled by Non‐Covalent Conformation Locking on Conjugated Polyelectrolyte Toward Efficient Hole Collection in Organic Solar Cells
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The development of anode interlayers (AIL) with a non‐corrosive nature and good compatibility with large‐area fabrication techniques has long been an important topic in the field of organic solar cells (OSCs). However, most AIL materials suffer from low doping density, which results in poor conductivity, ultimately degrading their performances. Here, we demonstrate an aggregation‐induced doping enhancement in conjugated polyelectrolytes (CPEs), enabled by the introduction of non‐covalent S–O and S–F interactions as conformational locks to yield coplanar conjugated backbones. The characterization results of condensed structure revealed that the ordered and compact molecular aggregation of CPE films can induce a pronounced p‐doping effect, which significantly enhances charge‐transporting capabilities. In particular, the PEP‐2SF exhibited a
                    π
                    –
                    π
                    stacking distance of 3.53 Å and showed an exceptional conductivity of 4.34 × 10
                    −
                    2
                    S/m after being doped by polyoxometalate (POM). OSCs modified by the PEP‐2SF‐based AIL exhibited a power conversion efficiency (PCE) of 20.28%. Moreover, the high conductivity enables excellent thickness insensitivity and good compatibility of PEP‐2SF:P with large‐area processing methods. A 1.2‐cm
                    2
                    device was fabricated based on blade‐coated PEP‐2SF:P, exhibiting a PCE of 17.31%. Our results suggest that aggregation‐induced doping enhancement of CPEs will provide an effective approach for developing high‐performance AIL materials.

title: Inverted perovskite solar cells: from fundamentals to scalable commercialization
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Inverted (p–i–n structure) perovskite solar cells (PSCs) have garnered substantial commercial interest owing to their superior operational stability, solution-processability, and inherent compatibility with tandem architectures. Recent achievements in performance rivaling that of regular (n–i–p structure) devices, coupled with significant progress in large-scale fabrication, have intensified research momentum in this field. Nevertheless, the still-constrained efficiency of inverted PSCs remains a critical challenge that requires fundamental understanding and resolution. Herein, we summarize recent advancements in inverted PSCs, delving into the origins of energy losses and their impact on device performance. We highlight effective strategies to enhance the high-performance capabilities of inverted PSCs, focusing on advances in charge transport layers, interface engineering and perovskite film modification. Furthermore, we critically evaluate the latest progress in scalable fabrication and long-term stability. Finally, we delineate key future research directions essential for achieving high efficiency, durability and manufacturability to ensure the commercial viability of this promising technology.
title_zh: 倒置钙钛矿太阳能电池：从基础知识到可扩展的商业化
abstract_zh: 倒置（p-i-n结构）钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）因其卓越的运行稳定性、溶液加工性以及与串联结构的固有兼容性而获得了巨大的商业利益。最近在性能方面取得的成就可与常规（n-i-p 结构）器件相媲美，再加上大规模制造方面的重大进展，增强了该领域的研究势头。然而，倒置 PSC 的效率仍然受到限制，仍然是一个严峻的挑战，需要基本的理解和解决。在此，我们总结了倒置 PSC 的最新进展，深入研究了能量损失的根源及其对器件性能的影响。我们重点介绍增强倒置 PSC 高性能的有效策略，重点关注电荷传输层、界面工程和钙钛矿薄膜改性方面的进展。此外，我们严格评估可扩展制造和长期稳定性方面的最新进展。最后，我们描绘了实现高效率、耐用性和可制造性所必需的未来关键研究方向，以确保这项有前途的技术的商业可行性。

title: Defect-Directed Regeneration of LiCoO 2 Cathodes via Gradient Cobalt Reprogramming
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Direct regeneration establishes a low-carbon and resource-efficient route for recycling lithium-ion batteries, yet its practical impact is constrained by inadequate defect homogenization and an exclusive focus on restoring pristine structures rather than functional stability. Herein, we report an integrated regeneration strategy that transforms degradation in spent lithium cobalt oxide (LCO) into a functional and gradient-stabilized architecture. An ethylene glycol–lithium acetate solvent simultaneously removes interfacial impurities and redistributes residual lithium and cobalt through cooperative hydroxyl cleaning and acetate coordination, thereby homogenizing defects and activating rapid cation transport pathways. Upon thermal activation, interfacially accumulated cobalt migrates into vacancy-rich regions, featuring an interlayer cobalt gradient occupation comprised of a cobalt-rich rock-salt surface layer and a subsurface short‑range disordered zone. This hierarchical architecture synergistically stabilizes lattice oxygen, suppresses cobalt migration, and buffers stress accumulation during deep delithiation. Consequently, the regenerated LCO delivers a capacity of 192.22 mAh g−1 at 0.2 C, while structural upgrading enables stable high-voltage operation, achieving 214.24 mAh g−1 and over 80% capacity retention after 900 cycles at 0.5 C. By shifting direct regeneration from defect elimination to defect-enabled functional architecture design, this work establishes a general pathway for regenerating spent layered cathodes beyond their original performance limits.
title_zh: 通过梯度钴重编程实现 LiCoO 2 阴极的缺陷定向再生
abstract_zh: 直接再生为锂离子电池的回收建立了一条低碳且资源高效的途径，但其实际影响受到缺陷均质化不足以及只注重恢复原始结构而不是功能稳定性的限制。在此，我们报告了一种集成再生策略，该策略将废钴酸锂（LCO）中的降解转化为功能性和梯度稳定的结构。乙二醇-醋酸锂溶剂通过协同羟基清洁和醋酸盐配位，同时去除界面杂质并重新分布残留的锂和钴，从而均匀化缺陷并激活快速阳离子传输路径。热激活后，界面积累的钴迁移到富含空位的区域，其特征是由富钴岩盐表层和地下短程无序区组成的层间钴梯度占据。这种分层结构协同稳定晶格氧，抑制钴迁移，并缓冲深度脱锂过程中的应力积累。因此，再生的LCO在0.2 C下的容量为192.22 mAh g−1，而结构升级可实现稳定的高电压运行，在0.5 C下900次循环后实现214.24 mAh g−1和超过80%的容量保持率。通过将直接再生从缺陷消除转变为缺陷启用的功能架构设计，这项工作建立了一种再生废层状正极超越其原始性能极限的通用途径。

title: Hydrogen-Bond-Engineered Polymer Dielectrics for 250 °C Operation Enabled by Deep-Learning-Based Virtual Screening
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Polymer dielectrics face inherent trade-offs among permittivity, insulation, and thermal stability above 140 °C, severely limiting high-temperature capacitive energy storage. To overcome this challenge, we deployed a deep learning framework that screens hydrogen-bonding molecular fingerprints within polyimide (PI) composites. Our model deciphers electrostatic potentials and donor/acceptor distributions across 1,200 candidates, predicting number of hydrogen bonds per unit cell, the hydrogen bond probability, the hydrogen bond energy, per monomer unit, and the electronic bandgap. Guided by these predictions, the top-performing candidate, (4-(3-amino-4methoxyphenoxy)phenyl)(p-tolyl)methanone (O-PU), was synthesized and blended with PI.Critically, the introduced hydrogen bonds direct the formation of low-entropy nanocrystalline networks, which simultaneously enhance mechanical strength (Young's modulus: 6.06 GPa), suppress conduction current at 300 MV/m (1.67 × 10 -7 A/cm 2 ),widen optical bandgaps (from 2.92 eV to 4.62 eV), and improve thermal conductivity. Consequently, the optimal composite achieves record-high performance at 250 °C: a Weibull breakdown strength of 587.1 MV/m and an energy density of 5.99 J/cm3 with > 90% efficiency under 400 MV/m. This work demonstrates a fundamentally new strategy for extreme-condition dielectric design using deep-learning-optimized hydrogen bonds.
title_zh: 通过基于深度学习的虚拟筛选实现 250°C 操作的氢键工程聚合物电介质
abstract_zh: 聚合物电介质在介电常数、绝缘性和 140 °C 以上的热稳定性之间面临固有的权衡，严重限制了高温电容储能。为了克服这一挑战，我们部署了一个深度学习框架来筛选聚酰亚胺 (PI) 复合材料中的氢键分子指纹。我们的模型破译了 1,200 个候选者的静电势和供体/受体分布，预测每个晶胞的氢键数量、氢键概率、每个单体单元的氢键能量和电子带隙。在这些预测的指导下，合成了性能最佳的候选物（4-（3-氨基-4甲氧基苯氧基）苯基）（对甲苯基）甲酮（O-PU），并将其与PI混合。至关重要的是，引入的氢键直接形成低熵纳米晶体网络，同时增强机械强度（杨氏模量：6.06 GPa），抑制300 MV/m（1.67 × 10 -7 A/cm 2 ），加宽光学带隙（从2.92 eV到4.62 eV），并提高热导率。因此，最佳复合材料在 250 °C 下实现了创纪录的高性能：威布尔击穿强度为 587.1 MV/m，能量密度为 5.99 J/cm3，在 400 MV/m 下效率 > 90%。这项工作展示了一种利用深度学习优化的氢键进行极端条件介电设计的全新策略。

title: Molecularly engineered dual-network eutectogel electrolytes for high-loading and stable zinc-iodine batteries
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Aqueous zinc-iodine batteries (AZIBs) are attractive for safe and low-cost energy storage, yet their practical deployment is hindered by the instability of both Zn anodes and iodine cathodes, particularly under high iodine loading and wide-temperature conditions. Herein, we report a molecularly engineered dual-network eutectogel electrolyte that enables simultaneous regulation of Zn deposition and polyiodide chemistry. The electrolyte is constructed by in situ polymerization of poly(N-hydroxyethyl acrylamide) (PHEAA) and poly([3-(methacrylamido)propyl]dimethyl(3-sulfopropyl)ammonium) (PDMAPS) within a choline chloride/glycerol deep eutectic solvent. In this design, PHEAA preserves structural integrity and stable interfacial contact, while PDMAPS provides spatially distributed -SO3− /-NR4+ sites for Zn2+-flux homogenization and polyiodide immobilization. Coupled with the DES-regulated hydrogen-bonding and solvation environment, the resulting dual-network eutectogel electrolyte simultaneously stabilizes Zn deposition and iodine redox chemistry under high-loading conditions. Meanwhile, the eutectic hydrogen-bonding environment and dense dual-network framework provide high ionic conductivity, structural robustness, and wide-temperature adaptability. As a result, the resulting AZIBs deliver long-term cyclability over 35,000 cycles, stable operation from −40 to 60 ℃, and durable cycling over 1000 cycles at an iodine loading of 19 mg cm−2, together with promising pouch-cell performance. This work establishes a dual-regulation electrolyte-engineering strategy for high-loading and stable AZIBs.
title_zh: 用于高负载和稳定锌碘电池的分子工程双网络共析凝胶电解质
abstract_zh: 水性锌碘电池（AZIB）在安全和低成本的储能方面具有吸引力，但其实际部署受到锌阳极和碘阴极的不稳定性的阻碍，特别是在高碘负载和宽温度条件下。在此，我们报告了一种分子工程双网络共凝胶电解质，能够同时调节锌沉积和聚碘化物化学。该电解质由聚（N-羟乙基丙烯酰胺）（PHEAA）和聚（[3-（甲基丙烯酰氨基）丙基]二甲基（3-磺基丙基）铵）（PDMAPS）在氯化胆碱/甘油低共熔溶剂中原位聚合而成。在该设计中，PHEAA 保留了结构完整性和稳定的界面接触，而 PDMAPS 提供了空间分布的 -SO3− /-NR4+ 位点，用于 Zn2+ -通量均质化和聚碘化物固定。与 DES 调节的氢键和溶剂化环境相结合，所得的双网络共析凝胶电解质可在高负载条件下同时稳定锌沉积和碘氧化还原化学。同时，共晶氢键环境和致密的双网络框架提供了高离子电导率、结构鲁棒性和宽温度适应性。因此，所得的 AZIB 具有超过 35,000 次循环的长期循环能力、在 -40 至 60 ℃ 范围内稳定运行、在碘负载量为 19 mg cm−2 时可持久循环超过 1000 次循环，以及有前途的软包电池性能。这项工作建立了一种用于高负载和s的双调节电解质工程策略

title: Ion and electron heating via magnetic reconnection during merging/compression plasma startup in ST40
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Here, we report the latest results on the high-field application of a merging/compression (M/C) plasma startup in the ST40 spherical tokamak, using 96-channel 2D ion Doppler tomography and 30-channel Thomson scattering diagnostics installed over the past three years. The new findings and achievements are summarised as follows: (i) the new 96-channel 2D ion Doppler tomography clearly revealed ion heating in the downstream of the reconnection JET and its confinement/transport process. (ii) Electron density also increases in the same region, while electrons are heated around the -point (or magnetic axis) and the electron temperature profile forms a peaked profile. (iii) Quasi-steady sustainment/confinement of M/C startup plasma current and ion temperature has been demonstrated. (iv) Based on a series of M/C experiments, scaling was increased to kA. (v) Full pressure profile measurements lead to the evaluation of the energy conversion ratio of the dissipated magnetic energy to the reconnecting field and it was found that of released magnetic energy was converted to ion thermal energy. (vi) The previously demonstrated scaling has been successfully upgraded to for the first time and which was 10 times higher than the previous record in MAST was explored.
title_zh: ST40 中合并/压缩等离子体启动期间通过磁重联加热离子和电子
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们报告了 ST40 球形托卡马克中合并/压缩 (M/C) 等离子体启动的高场应用的最新结果，使用过去三年安装的 96 通道 2D 离子多普勒断层扫描和 30 通道汤姆逊散射诊断仪。新发现和成果总结如下：（i）新型96通道2D离子多普勒断层扫描清楚地揭示了重联JET下游的离子加热及其限制/传输过程。 (ii) 电子密度在同一区域也增加，同时电子在 点（或磁轴）周围被加热，并且电子温度分布形成峰值分布。 (iii) 已经证明了 M/C 启动等离子体电流和离子温度的准稳态维持/限制。 (iv) 基于一系列 M/C 实验，缩放比例增加至 kA。 (v)全压力分布测量导致了耗散磁能与重联场的能量转换比的评估，并且发现释放的磁能被转换为离子热能。 (vi) 先前展示的扩展已首次成功升级，比 MAST 探索的先前记录高出 10 倍。

title: A molecular dynamics study on the characteristics of molecules released from tungsten plasma-facing components
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Impurity and neutral transport processes, together with plasma–molecule interactions, affect the particle and energy influx and outflow at the plasma edge, hence influencing reactor stability and performance. These transport and interaction phenomena are, in turn, affected by the properties of the particles involved, including, for molecular species, their respective rotational and vibrational states. In this work, we employ molecular dynamics simulations to investigate the characteristics of molecules released from the surfaces of plasma-facing components. We provide an experimental validation of our methodology for predicting the vibrational states of emitted beryllium molecules by comparing our findings with spectroscopic data obtained from the beryllium limiters within JET tokamak. Building on this, we apply the method to investigate the properties of molecules released from tungsten surfaces, since tungsten is selected for the first wall in ITER. Our results indicate that the rotational and vibrational states of sputtered tungsten molecules are significantly affected by the impact energy, incidence angle, and isotope type of plasma particles, in addition to surface temperature. Furthermore, we elucidate the effect of impact energy on D release yield from tungsten surfaces, detailing the respective rotational and vibrational states of the molecules, as well as their energy and angular distributions. The results of this work provide input for neutral and impurity transport codes, e.g. EIRENE and ERO2.0, enhancing their accuracy and enabling more detailed investigations of plasma characteristics.
title_zh: 钨等离子元件释放分子特性的分子动力学研究
abstract_zh: 杂质和中性传输过程以及等离子体-分子相互作用影响等离子体边缘的粒子和能量流入和流出，从而影响反应器的稳定性和性能。这些传输和相互作用现象反过来又受到所涉及粒子特性的影响，包括分子物种各自的旋转和振动状态。在这项工作中，我们采用分子动力学模拟来研究从面向等离子体的组件表面释放的分子的特征。通过将我们的发现与从 JET 托卡马克内的铍限制器获得的光谱数据进行比较，我们对预测发射铍分子振动状态的方法进行了实验验证。在此基础上，我们应用该方法来研究从钨表面释放的分子的特性，因为 ITER 中的第一壁选择了钨。我们的结果表明，除了表面温度之外，溅射钨分子的旋转和振动状态还受到等离子体粒子的冲击能量、入射角和同位素类型的显着影响。此外，我们阐明了冲击能量对钨表面 D 释放量的影响，详细说明了分子各自的旋转和振动状态，以及它们的能量和角度分布。这项工作的结果为中性和杂质运输代码提供了输入，例如EIRENE 和 ERO2.0，提高其准确性并实现更详细的调查

title: Density limit in peeling-limited pedestals at and above the Greenwald value in DIII-D high poloidal beta plasmas
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: High-pressure, peeling-limited pedestals with pedestal normalized beta βN,ped > 2 and pedestal top density nped at or above the Greenwald density nG have been achieved in DIII-D high poloidal beta plasmas, together with high global normalized beta βN > 3 and energy confinement H98 ∼ 1.2–1.7. A higher βN allows higher pedestal density above the Greenwald value and higher pedestal pressure, even with low injected torque. MHD modeling confirms that the experimental profiles lie near the peeling-mode instability boundary with high normalized pressure gradient α and high edge current density. Experimental analysis and stability calculations indicate that the high poloidal beta with strong Shafranov shift, high α, high edge q, and weak/negative magnetic shear improves the pedestal stability by decoupling the peeling and ballooning modes and stabilizing the ballooning modes, thus facilitating access to the second stability region of peeling–ballooning mode. Access to this second stability regime opens Super-H-like channels without requiring extremely strong shaping or strong torque injection. The high-pressure peeling pedestal allows the pedestal density to go beyond the Greenwald limit with strong E ×B shear maintained: the pedestal pressure increases with pedestal density even when nped > nG, until the ideal MHD instability boundary is reached, where giant ELMs occur. The giant ELMs are dominated by a strong n = 1 component and cause a large reduction of the edge pressure, but a negligible change of the core pressure, consistent with kink/peeling-mode induced instability. The pedestal recovers from the collapse and typically sustains a high baseline density, around the Greenwald limit, during the whole discharge duration. Experiments also found that internal transport barriers and peeling-limited pedestal with nped ∼ 0.9nG can be simultaneously achieved in high βN plasmas, revealing a feedback interaction between ITB strength and pedestal performance.
title_zh: 剥离限制基座中的密度极限等于或高于 DIII-D 高极向 β 等离子体中的 Greenwald 值
abstract_zh: 在 DIII-D 高极向 β 等离子体中已经实现了高压、剥离限制基座，其基座归一化 βN,ped > 2 和基座顶部密度 nped 等于或高于格林沃尔德密度 nG，以及高全局归一化 βN > 3 和能量限制 H98 ∼ 1.2–1.7。较高的 βN 允许高于格林沃尔德值的较高基座密度和较高的基座压力，即使注入扭矩较低也是如此。 MHD 建模证实，实验剖面位于剥离模式不稳定边界附近，具有高归一化压力梯度 α 和高边缘电流密度。实验分析和稳定性计算表明，具有强Shafranov位移、高α、高边缘q和弱/负磁剪切的高极向β通过解耦剥离和气球化模式并稳定气球化模式来提高基座稳定性，从而有助于进入剥离-气球化模式的第二稳定区。进入第二个稳定状态可打开类似 Super-H 的通道，而不需要极强的成形或强扭矩注入。高压剥离基座允许基座密度超出格林沃尔德极限，同时保持强 E ×B 剪切：即使当 nped > nG 时，基座压力也会随着基座密度的增加而增加，直到达到理想的 MHD 不稳定边界，此时出现巨型 ELM。巨型 ELM 由强 n = 1 分量主导，导致边缘压力大幅降低，但核心压力的变化可以忽略不计，这与扭结/剥离模式引起的不稳定性一致。佩

title: Design of high-gain laser fusion with heatwave-driven fast ignition scheme for inertial fusion energy
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: We design a high-gain laser fusion employing a fast ignition scheme for inertial fusion energy with a total laser energy less than 1 megajoule. A solid-sphere target which is robust to hydro instabilities is utilized instead of a fragile shell target used in the central ignition. Following the implosion with precisely tailored laser pulses, the high-density fuel core will be heated immediately to the ignition temperature in 10 picoseconds by petawatt laser lights before the core plasma collapses. To achieve efficient laser fusion, we have to overcome challenges: how to achieve the dense fuel core, how to efficiently deliver heating lasers through the corona plasma surrounding the fuel core, how to efficiently couple the heating laser energy into the fuel core plasma, and how to achieve high burn-up fraction of DT fuel. To address these challenges, our design employs 250 kJ of implosion laser energy and 30–40 kJ of heating laser with intensity greater than 10 W cm to realize the efficient core heating with heatwave, yielding about 15 MJ (gain ).
title_zh: 热波驱动惯性聚变能快速点火方案的高增益激光聚变设计
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种高增益激光聚变，采用惯性聚变能量快速点火方案，总激光能量小于1兆焦耳。采用对水不稳定性具有鲁棒性的实心球靶，而不是中央点火中使用的易碎壳靶。在使用精确定制的激光脉冲进行内爆之后，高密度燃料核心将在核心等离子体塌陷之前通过拍瓦激光在 10 皮秒内立即加热到点火温度。为了实现高效的激光聚变，我们必须克服挑战：如何实现致密的燃料核心，如何通过燃料核心周围的电晕等离子体有效地传递加热激光，如何有效地将加热激光能量耦合到燃料核心等离子体中，以及如何实现DT燃料的高燃耗分数。为了应对这些挑战，我们的设计采用250 kJ的内爆激光能量和30-40 kJ的强度大于10 W cm的加热激光来实现热波的高效核心加热，产生约15 MJ（增益）。

title_zh: 每日简报：人类胚胎基因组被精确改变
abstract_zh: 使用“碱基编辑”来精确调整人类胚胎的做法引起了研究人员的分歧。此外，中国污染较少的汽车拯救了多少生命，以及如何引导世界走向可持续的未来。使用“碱基编辑”来精确调整人类胚胎的做法引起了研究人员的分歧。此外，中国污染较少的汽车拯救了多少生命，以及如何引导世界走向可持续的未来。

title: Targeting Cancer-Specific Mutations with RNA-Triggered Chromatin Shredding
source: Nature
abstract: Genetic mutations that drive cancer often occur in tumor suppressor proteins, including the p53 transcription factor which is altered in ~40-50% of cases1,2. However, current therapies fail to target most such mutations because the mutant proteins typically lack defined drug-binding pockets, and restoring the endogenous function has proven challenging. Here, we programmed CRISPR-Cas12a2, an RNA-guided nuclease with trans-nucleolytic cleavage activities3,4, to selectively kill cancer cells by targeting cancer-specific transcripts. This approach limits cell growth by inducing trans shredding of chromatin, triggering DNA damage responses and cell death. Unlike existing methods, RNA-guided Cas12a2 senses cellular RNA signatures, enabling precise targeting of undruggable mutations. Transcript-activated chromatin shredding provides a new approach to precision disease treatments for undruggable targets.
title_zh: 通过 RNA 触发的染色质粉碎来靶向癌症特异性突变
abstract_zh: 导致癌症的基因突变通常发生在肿瘤抑制蛋白中，包括 p53 转录因子，该因子在约 40-50% 的病例中发生改变1,2。然而，目前的疗法无法针对大多数此类突变，因为突变蛋白通常缺乏明确的药物结合袋，并且恢复内源功能已被证明具有挑战性。在这里，我们编程了 CRISPR-Cas12a2，一种具有反式溶核活性的 RNA 引导核酸酶 3,4，通过靶向癌症特异性转录本来选择性杀死癌细胞。这种方法通过诱导染色质反式破碎、触发 DNA 损伤反应和细胞死亡来限制细胞生长。与现有方法不同，RNA 引导的 Cas12a2 能够感知细胞 RNA 特征，从而能够精确靶向不可成药的突变。转录激活的染色质粉碎为不可成药靶标的精准疾病治疗提供了一种新方法。

title: Distributed control circuits across a brain-and-cord connectome
source: Nature
abstract: Just as genomes revolutionized molecular genetics, connectomes (maps of neurons and synapses) are transforming neuroscience. To date, the only organisms with complete connectomes are worms1–3, sea squirts4, and comb jellies5 (103–104 synapses). By contrast, the fruit fly is more complex (108 synaptic connections), with a brain that supports learning and spatial memory6,7 and an intricate ventral nerve cord analogous to the vertebrate spinal cord8–12. Here we report the first densely-reconstructed adult fly connectome that unites the brain and ventral nerve cord, and we leverage this resource to investigate principles of neural control. We show that effector neurons (motor neurons, endocrine cells, and efferent neurons targeting the viscera) are primarily influenced by sensory neurons in the same body part, forming local feedback loops. These local loops are linked by long-range circuits involving ascending and descending neurons organized into behavior-centric modules. Single ascending and descending neurons are often positioned to influence the voluntary movements of multiple body parts, together with the endocrine cells or visceral organs that support those movements. Brain regions involved in learning and navigation supervise these circuits. These results reveal an architecture that is distributed, parallelized, and embodied, reminiscent of distributed control architectures in engineered systems13,14.
title_zh: 跨大脑和绳索连接组的分布式控制电路
abstract_zh: 正如基因组彻底改变了分子遗传学一样，连接组（神经元和突触图谱）正在改变神经科学。迄今为止，唯一具有完整连接体的生物是蠕虫1-3、海鞘4和栉水母5（103-104个突触）。相比之下，果蝇更为复杂（108 个突触连接），具有支持学习和空间记忆的大脑 6,7 以及类似于脊椎动物脊髓的复杂腹侧神经索 8-12。在这里，我们报告了第一个密集重建的成蝇连接组，它将大脑和腹神经索结合在一起，我们利用这一资源来研究神经控制的原理。我们发现效应神经元（运动神经元、内分泌细胞和针对内脏的传出神经元）主要受到同一身体部位的感觉神经元的影响，形成局部反馈回路。这些局部环路通过远程环路连接，涉及组织成以行为为中心的模块的上升和下降神经元。单个上升和下降神经元通常会影响多个身体部位的自主运动，以及支持这些运动的内分泌细胞或内脏器官。参与学习和导航的大脑区域监督这些回路。这些结果揭示了一种分布式、并行化和具体化的架构，让人想起工程系统中的分布式控制架构13,14。

title: GPR15-guided CD8+ T regulatory cells control intestinal inflammation
source: Nature
abstract: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) causes chronic suffering from gastrointestinal inflammation and dysfunction that can progress to colon cancer1,2. The disease prevalence is increasing and there is an urgent need to better understand its pathogenic mechanisms to improve treatment. We show that GPR15, a G protein-coupled receptor (GPCR) expressed in immune cells and previously described as an entry co-factor for human and simian immunodeficiency viruses3, is a marker and homing receptor for a subset of intramucosal GPR15-guided regulatory CD8+ T lymphocytes (CD8+ TIGR). Deleterious GPR15 gene variants in humans cause defective homing of CD8+ TIGR and are associated with severe early-onset IBD. Moreover, CD8+ TIGR cells are reduced in the intestinal mucosa of sporadic IBD patients. In mice, GPR15 deficiency impairs colonic homing of CD8+ TIGR cells, leading to accumulation of inflammatory macrophages and increased susceptibility to colitis. CD8+ TIGR cells potently kill macrophages activated by intestinal damage or disease using Fas ligand (FasL) and TNF-related weak inducer of apoptosis (TWEAK). The identification of CD8+ TIGR cells yields new insights into organ-specific immune regulation and potential therapeutics for IBD.
title_zh: GPR15引导的CD8+ T调节细胞控制肠道炎症
abstract_zh: 炎症性肠病 (IBD) 会导致慢性胃肠道炎症和功能障碍，并可能进展为结肠癌1,2。该疾病的患病率正在增加，迫切需要更好地了解其致病机制以改善治疗。我们发现，GPR15 是一种在免疫细胞中表达的 G 蛋白偶联受体 (GPCR)，之前被描述为人类和猿类免疫缺陷病毒的进入辅助因子3，它是粘膜内 GPR15 引导的调节性 CD8+ T 淋巴细胞 (CD8+ TIGR) 子集的标记物和归巢受体。人类中有害的 GPR15 基因变异会导致 CD8+ TIGR 归巢缺陷，并与严重的早发性 IBD 相关。此外，散发性IBD患者肠粘膜中CD8+ TIGR细胞减少。在小鼠中，GPR15 缺陷会损害 CD8+ TIGR 细胞的结肠归巢，导致炎症巨噬细胞积聚并增加结肠炎的易感性。 CD8+ TIGR 细胞使用 Fas 配体 (FasL) 和 TNF 相关的弱凋亡诱导剂 (TWEAK) 有效杀死因肠道损伤或疾病而激活的巨噬细胞。 CD8+ TIGR 细胞的鉴定为器官特异性免疫调节和 IBD 的潜在治疗提供了新的见解。

title: Ultralow-voltage electrochemical organic light-emitting transistors with pinned and wide lateral recombination
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Light emission from organic transistors holds strong potential for user-interactive functionality across applications ranging from wearable and biointegrated systems to neuromorphic electronics. However, conventional single-active-layer organic transistors suffer from inefficient charge carrier injection, resulting in high drain voltages (>80 V in field-effect devices and >3.5 V in electrochemical devices with p–i–n junctions) and narrow, spatially dynamic recombination zones (−2 at 3.5 V, and operation with two 1.5-V batteries. This work advances single-active-layer OLETs and paves the way for organic electronic systems with intuitive, user-friendly visualization functions.
title_zh: 具有钉扎和宽横向复合的超低压电化学有机发光晶体管
abstract_zh: 有机晶体管的光发射在从可穿戴和生物集成系统到神经形态电子产品等各种应用中具有强大的用户交互功能潜力。然而，传统的单活性层有机晶体管存在载流子注入效率低的问题，导致漏极电压较高（在场效应器件中>80 V，在具有p-i-n结的电化学器件中>3.5 V）和狭窄的空间动态复合区（3.5 V时为−2，并使用两个1.5 V电池运行。这项工作改进了单活性层OLET，并为具有直观、用户友好的可视化功能的有机电子系统铺平了道路。

title: Amine oxide lipid nanoparticles for delivery of cyclic dinucleotides
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: The clinical potential of cyclic dinucleotides (CDNs) as potent agonists of stimulator of interferon gene (STING) has been hampered by the lack of robust delivery systems. While lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) excel with large nucleic acids, they are unsuitable for delivering small, zwitterionic and highly hydrophilic CDNs. Here, we find that the tertiary amine oxide lipid (AOL) promotes stable encapsulation of CDNs into LNP through enhanced hydrogen bonding and electrostatic interactions, resulting in ultra-high encapsulation efficiency of 86.8%. Compared to cationic liposomes, AOL-incorporating LNP exhibits superior tumor penetration and cytosolic cargo delivery, eliciting broad and potent intratumoral STING activation. In line with growing emphasis on combination therapy in oncology, we further incorporate lipidated mitoxantrone in the LNP as an inducer of immunogenic cell death to enhance tumor antigen presentation and STING-driven immunotherapy. The obtained LNP provokes potent immunostimulatory and anti-tumor effects in multiple challenging animal models, including triple-negative breast cancer, pancreatic cancer and melanoma.
title_zh: 用于递送环状二核苷酸的氧化胺脂质纳米颗粒
abstract_zh: 环状二核苷酸（CDN）作为干扰素基因刺激物（STING）的有效激动剂的临床潜力因缺乏强大的递送系统而受到阻碍。虽然脂质纳米粒子 (LNP) 擅长处理大核酸，但它们不适合传递小型、两性离子和高亲水性 CDN。在这里，我们发现叔胺氧化物脂质（AOL）通过增强的氢键和静电相互作用促进CDNs稳定封装到LNP中，从而产生86.8%的超高封装效率。与阳离子脂质体相比，结合 AOL 的 LNP 表现出优异的肿瘤渗透性和胞质货物递送能力，引发广泛而有效的肿瘤内 STING 激活。随着肿瘤学中对联合治疗的日益重视，我们进一步在 LNP 中加入脂质化米托蒽醌作为免疫原性细胞死亡的诱导剂，以增强肿瘤抗原呈递和 STING 驱动的免疫治疗。获得的 LNP 在多种具有挑战性的动物模型中激发了有效的免疫刺激和抗肿瘤作用，包括三阴性乳腺癌、胰腺癌和黑色素瘤。

title: Dynamic evolution in stage-evolving Pd catalysis: unlocking efficient and selective hydrogenation of lignin-derived aldehydes
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Selective hydrogenation of lignin-derived aldehydes, particularly achieving high catalyst atomic efficiency under ambient conditions, remains challenging. Here, we developed a stage-evolving Pd catalysis that bridges the functions of distinct Pd states to address this limitation. Operando monitoring reveals a sequential transformation from homogeneous Pd2+ to graphene-confined Pd nanoparticles (~3.26 nm), with each stage making a specific contribution. In the vanillin hydrogenation at 30 °C, this system achieves 99.4% conversion within 30 min with 95.0% yield toward 2-methoxy-4-methylphenol and a remarkable turnover frequency of 673.9 h−1, outperforming conventional static sites Pd catalysts reduced by H2 or NaBH4 (≤42.5% conversion, 12.1% yield). Comprehensive in-situ spectroscopic characterizations, combined with kinetic and theoretical investigations, have elucidated the interfacial reaction pathways governing vanillin hydrogenation at distinct Pd active sites and established the correlation between multi-stage catalysis and product selectivity. Mechanistically, the initial Pd2+ phase facilitates C = O adsorption and subsequent hydrogenation to C-OH (47.47 kJ/mol), whereas the in-situ generated Pd/Graphene promotes H2 homolytic dissociation into H* (rather than hydrogen transfer from the isopropanol solvent) and drives the rate-determining hydrodeoxygenation of C-OH (52.44 kJ/mol). This work paves the way for the rational design of dynamic catalytic systems to achieve atomically efficient hydrogenation of lignin-derived aldehydes.
title_zh: 阶段演化 Pd 催化的动态演化：解锁木质素衍生醛的高效选择性加氢
abstract_zh: 木质素衍生醛的选择性氢化，特别是在环境条件下实现高催化剂原子效率，仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们开发了一种阶段演化的 Pd 催化，它桥接了不同 Pd 状态的功能，以解决这一限制。操作监测揭示了从均质 Pd2+ 到石墨烯限制的 Pd 纳米颗粒（~3.26 nm）的连续转变，每个阶段都做出特定的贡献。在30℃的香草醛加氢反应中，该系统在30分钟内实现了99.4%的转化率，2-甲氧基-4-甲基苯酚的收率达到95.0%，周转频率高达673.9 h−1，优于传统的由H2或NaBH4还原的静态位点Pd催化剂（≤42.5%转化率，12.1%收率）。全面的原位光谱表征，结合动力学和理论研究，阐明了在不同的 Pd 活性位点控制香草醛氢化的界面反应途径，并建立了多级催化和产物选择性之间的相关性。从机理上讲，初始的 Pd2+ 相促进 C = O 吸附和随后加氢为 C-OH (47.47 kJ/mol)，而原位生成的 Pd/石墨烯促进 H2 均解离解为 H*（而不是氢从异丙醇溶剂转移）并驱动 C-OH (52.44 kJ/mol) 的决定速率的加氢脱氧。这项工作为合理设计动态催化系统以实现木质素衍生醛的原子有效氢化铺平了道路。

title: Polymer-Based Flexible Wireless Sensors for Health Monitoring
source: Nano-Micro Letters
abstract: Polymer-based flexible wireless sensors have demonstrated significant potential in health monitoring. However, existing studies have predominantly focused on material design, energy harvesting, and wireless communication, while research addressing signal attenuation, noise accumulation, and data distortion within wireless links remains relatively limited. Physiological signals are highly susceptible to multi-source interference during acquisition and transmission; without effective data processing and intelligent analysis strategies, monitoring outcomes may fail to meet the accuracy and stability requirements of clinical applications. To address this research gap, this review constructs a comprehensive framework encompassing signal sensing, link transmission, and intelligent processing, building on advances in flexible materials and wireless energy supply modes. Special attention is given to the critical roles of channel compensation, noise suppression, feature extraction, lightweight artificial intelligence models, and edge computing in enhancing data quality and reducing energy consumption. Furthermore, the review systematically analyzes the impact of wireless link stability and energy management on monitoring performance. By reinforcing the synergistic mechanisms between data processing and communication, this work aims to provide design principles and development directions for the next generation of high-reliability, low-power, and intelligent wireless flexible health monitoring systems. Highlights:1 A system-level review of polymer-based flexible wireless sensors for epidermal, subcutaneous, and short-term implantable health monitoring is presented, elucidating the coupling among materials, interfaces, and wireless links.2 Materials design and application studies are systematically integrated to clarify how different material systems influence sensing performance, signal stability, and monitoring reliability.3 Key challenges and future trends are summarized, with emphasis on mitigating material-level noise, high sensitivity, multifunctional integration, and clinical translation potential.
title_zh: 用于健康监测的聚合物柔性无线传感器
abstract_zh: 基于聚合物的柔性无线传感器在健康监测方面已展现出巨大的潜力。然而，现有的研究主要集中在材料设计、能量收集和无线通信上，而针对无线链路内信号衰减、噪声积累和数据失真的研究仍然相对有限。生理信号在采集和传输过程中极易受到多源干扰；如果没有有效的数据处理和智能分析策略，监测结果可能无法满足临床应用的准确性和稳定性要求。为了弥补这一研究空白，本综述基于柔性材料和无线供能模式的进步，构建了一个涵盖信号传感、链路传输和智能处理的综合框架。特别关注通道补偿、噪声抑制、特征提取、轻量级人工智能模型和边缘计算在提高数据质量和降低能耗方面的关键作用。此外，该评论系统地分析了无线链路稳定性和能源管理对监控性能的影响。通过强化数据处理和通信之间的协同机制，本工作旨在为下一代高可靠、低功耗、智能无线柔性健康监测系统提供设计原则和发展方向。亮点：1 基于聚合物的柔性无线传感器的系统级审查

title: Stretchable high-fill-factor silicon–liquid metal platform for multilevel visual acquisition and depth sensing
source: Nature Materials
abstract: High-density stretchable pixelated electronics that conform to complex, non-developable surfaces are key enablers of next-generation robotic vision systems, skin-mountable sensors and wearable electronics. Existing strategies for stretchable pixelated device arrays—such as buckling mechanics, pop-up structures, serpentine interconnects and kirigami designs—have offered partial solutions. However, a strategy that simultaneously achieves high device performance, stretchability, fill factor and integration density has remained elusive. Here we present a next-generation platform for stretchable pixelated electronics that integrates high-performance single-crystalline silicon pixels with finely patterned liquid metal interconnects on ultrathin elastomeric substrates. We developed a monolithic microfabrication strategy that enables customizable, densely packed and mechanically compliant pixelated device arrays. Using this platform, we demonstrate shape-reconfigurable imaging devices that achieve superb fill factors of up to 81% and a biaxial stretchability of 100%. We also present a human-eye-inspired robotic vision system with tunable focus and a skin-mountable lens-free imaging system. The complementary operation of retinal and epidermal imaging systems enables multiscale visual acquisition and depth sensing.
title_zh: 用于多级视觉采集和深度传感的可拉伸高填充因子硅液态金属平台
abstract_zh: 符合复杂、不可展开表面的高密度可拉伸像素化电子产品是下一代机器人视觉系统、皮肤安装传感器和可穿戴电子产品的关键推动者。可拉伸像素化设备阵列的现有策略（例如屈曲机制、弹出结构、蛇形互连和剪纸设计）已经提供了部分解决方案。然而，同时实现高器件性能、可拉伸性、填充因子和集成密度的策略仍然难以实现。在这里，我们提出了用于可拉伸像素化电子产品的下一代平台，该平台将高性能单晶硅像素与超薄弹性体基板上的精细图案液态金属互连集成在一起。我们开发了一种单片微加工策略，可实现可定制、密集封装且机械兼容的像素化设备阵列。使用该平台，我们展示了可重构形状的成像设备，该设备可实现高达 81% 的出色填充因子和 100% 的双轴拉伸性。我们还推出了一种受人眼启发的机器人视觉系统，具有可调焦距和可安装在皮肤上的无透镜成像系统。视网膜和表皮成像系统的互补操作可实现多尺度视觉采集和深度感测。

title: Advancing battery failure diagnosis by knowledge-augmented large language models
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Battery failure diagnosis is crucial for ensuring the safety and reliability of energy storage systems. However, existing approaches from electrochemical modeling to deep learning often face limitations including heavy reliance on extensive training data, poor generalization, and interpretability issues. To address these challenges, we propose BattFailScholar, a knowledge- augmented large language model (LLM) framework for battery failure diagnosis. Our approach first constructs a case-level battery failure knowledge graph encompassing material properties, multi-source signals, and failure pathways. A knowledge-augmented generation method is then developed to enhance LLM diagnostic reasoning with failure feature-aware retrieval and optimization algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate that BattFailScholar achieves a 19.7% performance improvement in LLM-based diagnosis, with enhanced capability in alleviating long-tail problems and failure risk assessment. Moreover, the system achieves 86.2% accuracy in identifying potential failure mechanisms or causes, demonstrating strong potential for discovering failure chains and providing practical, reliable diagnostic support for battery research and development.
title_zh: 通过知识增强的大语言模型推进电池故障诊断
abstract_zh: 电池故障诊断对于保证储能系统的安全性和可靠性至关重要。然而，从电化学建模到深度学习的现有方法通常面临局限性，包括严重依赖大量训练数据、泛化性差和可解释性问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 BattFailScholar，这是一种用于电池故障诊断的知识增强大语言模型 (LLM) 框架。我们的方法首先构建了一个案例级电池故障知识图，其中包含材料属性、多源信号和故障路径。然后开发了一种知识增强生成方法，通过故障特征感知检索和优化算法来增强 LLM 诊断推理。实验结果表明，BattFailScholar 在基于 LLM 的诊断方面实现了 19.7% 的性能提升，增强了缓解长尾问题和失败风险评估的能力。此外，该系统在识别潜在故障机制或原因方面的准确率达到86.2%，展示了发现故障链并为电池研发提供实用、可靠的诊断支持的强大潜力。

title: Glass formation of metal organic-inorganic complexes
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Some metal-organic-inorganic complexes (MOICs) are known for their glass-forming ability. However, the composition range of glass-forming MOICs is rather limited as the mechanism of MOIC glass formation has not been well understood. Here, we uncover the structural factors controlling MOIC glass formation and thereby develop new MOIC glass formers. MOIC glass formation relies on the creation of a hydrogen-bonded structural network. By properly choosing metal centers, anions, and organic ligands of MOICs, a supramolecular structural network can be constructed, thereby allowing property modulation. Furthermore, MOIC systems with mixed crystals are generated by ligand-mixing and then vitrified by melt-quenching. The glass-transition temperature (Tg) of the derived glasses can be linearly tuned through the substitution of benzimidazole for imidazole. Interestingly, vitrification led to disordering of hydrogen-bonded networks in MOICs at short-, medium-, and long-range scales. This work enables the expansion of the composition range of MOIC glasses with various functionalities.
title_zh: 金属有机-无机配合物的玻璃形成
abstract_zh: 一些金属-有机-无机络合物（MOIC）以其玻璃形成能力而闻名。然而，由于 MOIC 玻璃形成的机理尚未得到很好的了解，因此形成玻璃的 MOIC 的组成范围相当有限。在这里，我们揭示了控制 MOIC 玻璃形成的结构因素，从而开发出新的 MOIC 玻璃形成剂。 MOIC 玻璃的形成依赖于氢键结构网络的形成。通过适当选择MOIC的金属中心、阴离子和有机配体，可以构建超分子结构网络，从而实现性能调节。此外，具有混合晶体的 MOIC 系统是通过配体混合生成的，然后通过熔融淬火玻璃化。衍生玻璃的玻璃化转变温度（Tg）可以通过用苯并咪唑取代咪唑来线性调节。有趣的是，玻璃化导致 MOIC 中短程、中程和长程尺度的氢键网络无序。这项工作扩大了具有各种功能的 MOIC 玻璃的成分范围。

title: Halide ion-modulated crystallization of poly(triazine imide) for efficient photocatalytic overall water splitting
source: Matter
abstract: A halide ion-modulated crystallization strategy is developed by tuning the molten salt ion composition, yielding poly(triazine imide) (PTI) with high crystallinity and partial ion depletion. The resulting structure effectively regulates defect states and charge carrier dynamics, suppresses multiple recombination pathways, facilitates charge transport and separation, and significantly improves solar to hydrogen conversion efficiency.
title_zh: 聚三嗪酰亚胺的卤化物离子调制结晶用于高效光催化整体水分解
abstract_zh: 通过调整熔盐离子组成，开发了卤化物离子调制结晶策略，产生具有高结晶度和部分离子耗尽的聚（三嗪酰亚胺）（PTI）。由此产生的结构有效地调节缺陷态和载流子动力学，抑制多种复合途径，促进电荷传输和分离，并显着提高太阳能到氢的转换效率。

title: Hydrogels as interfacial materials for the water-energy nexus
source: Joule
abstract: Hydrogels offer a soft-matter platform for controlling water, ion, heat, and charge transport at interfaces central to the water-energy nexus. This review examines how hydrogel chemistry and architecture regulate chemical/electrochemical-potential gradients and transport kinetics, enabling solar water generation, atmospheric water harvesting, hydrovoltaic power generation, and aqueous batteries. These principles guide the design of scalable, resilient hydrogel interfaces for sustainable water and energy technologies.
title_zh: 水凝胶作为水-能量关系的界面材料
abstract_zh: 水凝胶提供了一个软物质平台，用于控制水-能量关系中心界面处的水、离子、热量和电荷传输。这篇综述研究了水凝胶化学和结构如何调节化学/电化学势梯度和传输动力学，从而实现太阳能发电、大气集水、水力发电和水电池。这些原则指导了可持续水和能源技术的可扩展、有弹性的水凝胶界面的设计。

title: Sustainable battery recycling through spatial and technological alignment
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: End-of-life (EOL) battery recycling is crucial for sustainable energy transition, yet existing systems often suffer from spatial, technological and policy mismatches that limit environmental benefits. Here we present a multi-scale analytical framework that integrates machine learning, life-cycle assessment and spatial integrated scenario modelling to evaluate the environmental footprint and resource recovery potential of battery recycling systems. This framework enables high-resolution projections of battery retirement trends, assessment of recycling technologies and optimization of supply–demand strategies. Using China as a case study, we analysed EOL battery flows across 364 cities and over 300 recycling projects involving 24 battery chemistries. The results reveal that, during 2020–2030, total EOL battery volumes amount to 16.67–19.99 Mt, with a northeast–southwest–northwest hotspot migration pattern. Interprovincial coordination can increase treatment capacity utilization by 67.12% but cannot eliminate spatial mismatches between EOL battery supply and available treatment capacity. Our optimization scenarios show that supply–demand planning could reduce emissions by up to 44% and increase lithium recovery by 53%. This work provides a scalable tool for designing low-carbon, high-efficiency battery recycling systems, contributing to the circular economy and energy transitions.
title_zh: 通过空间和技术协调实现可持续电池回收
abstract_zh: 报废 (EOL) 电池回收对于可持续能源转型至关重要，但现有系统经常面临空间、技术和政策不匹配的问题，从而限制了环境效益。在这里，我们提出了一个多尺度分析框架，集成了机器学习、生命周期评估和空间集成场景建模，以评估电池回收系统的环境足迹和资源回收潜力。该框架能够对电池报废趋势进行高分辨率预测、回收技术评估和供需策略优化。我们以中国为案例研究，分析了 364 个城市的停产电池流和涉及 24 种电池化学品的 300 多个回收项目。结果表明，2020-2030年期间，EOL电池总量为16.67-19.99 Mt，热点迁移格局为东北-西南-西北。省际协调可以提高处理能力利用率67.12%，但不能消除EOL电池供应与可用处理能力之间的空间错配。我们的优化情景表明，供需规划可以减少高达 44% 的排放量，并将锂回收率提高 53%。这项工作为设计低碳、高效的电池回收系统提供了一个可扩展的工具，有助于循环经济和能源转型。

title: 192-dimensional wavelength-/mode-/polarization-multiplexed photonic architecture for highly-parallel optical computing
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Photonic matrix–vector multiplication (MVM) constitutes a core computational primitive in on-chip photonic neural networks (PNNs), enabling ultrahigh-speed multiply–accumulate operations. Most existing photonic MVM implementations do not fully exploit the intrinsic multi-dimensional degrees of freedom of light, thereby constraining parallelism, scalability, and functional flexibility. Here, we present a 192-dimensional multiplexed photonic computing architecture that simultaneously harnesses thirty-two wavelengths, three spatial modes, and dual polarizations, enabling highly parallel and fully reconfigurable optical computation within a single integrated platform. By dynamically selecting and combining multiplexed channels, we demonstrate flexible convolution-kernel reconfiguration, supporting large and variable kernel sizes up to 13 × 13, as well as multi-channel parallel signal processing. Enabled by large-scale and adaptable convolution operations, we experimentally demonstrate effective suppression of structured noise, enhanced extraction of diverse spatial features, and preservation of holistic contour information—capabilities that are difficult to achieve using conventional small-kernel architectures alone. The optical chip can achieve a throughput of 15.36 tera-operations per second (TOPS), which can be further improved by adopting higher-speed modulation and expanding the optical dimension channels. Overall, the proposed architecture establishes a powerful and scalable photonic computing paradigm, with strong potential for computer vision, biomedical imaging, and next-generation artificial intelligence systems, especially those demanding high-precision visual processing.
title_zh: 用于高度并行光计算的 192 维波长/模式/偏振复用光子架构
abstract_zh: 光子矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 构成片上光子神经网络 (PNN) 的核心计算原语，可实现超高速乘法累加运算。大多数现有的光子 MVM 实现没有充分利用光固有的多维自由度，从而限制了并行性、可扩展性和功能灵活性。在这里，我们提出了一种 192 维多路复用光子计算架构，它同时利用 32 种波长、三种空间模式和双偏振，在单个集成平台内实现高度并行和完全可重构的光学计算。通过动态选择和组合多路复用通道，我们演示了灵活的卷积核重新配置，支持高达 13 × 13 的大型且可变的核大小，以及多通道并行信号处理。通过大规模和适应性强的卷积运算，我们通过实验证明了结构噪声的有效抑制、不同空间特征的增强提取以及整体轮廓信息的保存，这些功能仅使用传统的小内核架构很难实现。该光芯片可实现每秒15.36万亿次操作（TOPS）的吞吐量，通过采用更高速的调制和扩展光维度通道可以进一步提高吞吐量。总体而言，所提出的架构建立了一个强大且可扩展的光子计算范式，在计算机视觉、生物医学成像和新领域具有强大的潜力。
