title: Self‐Optimization With Oriented Facet Reconstruction for Universal Electrocatalytic C–N Coupling
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Electrocatalytic C–N coupling represents a green synthesis platform, yet the dynamic evolution of catalyst surfaces during the reaction remains poorly understood. Here, we report a nitrate‐dominated, preferential facet evolution on Cu single crystals that directs less active (110) and (100) facets toward the highly active (111) configuration. The Cu(111) surface delivers a urea yield of 5.2 mg h
                    −1
                     cm
                    −2
                    from CO
                    2
                    and NO
                    3
                    −
                    , outperforming (110) and (100) by about 4‐ and 26‐fold, respectively, while maintaining excellent stability. Experimental and theoretical analyses reveal that this facet reconstruction is associated with spontaneous chemical interaction between nitrate and metallic copper, alongside the thermodynamic stability of the Cu(111) facet. Significantly, the pristine Cu(111) surface consistently outperforms Cu(110) and Cu(100), highlighting its intrinsic catalytic superiority. This work provides insights into nitrate‐dominated C–N coupling, advancing the design of dynamically active electrocatalysts.

title: Regiodivergent Hydrogermylation of Alkynes Enabled by Dinuclear Cobalt Catalysts Bearing Different Ligands
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Transition‐metal‐catalyzed hydrogermylation of alkynes represents an ideal atom‐economical method to prepare vinylgermanes that are valuable reagents in medicinal chemistry, material science and organic synthesis. Nevertheless, its development―particularly in achieving high regioselectivity with earth‐abundant 3d metal catalysts―remains as a formidable challenge. Herein, we report regiodivergent hydrogermylation reactions of alkynes employing structure well‐defined dicobalt carbonyl complexes as catalysts: the reaction using [(IPent)Co
                    2

Both cobalt catalysts effect the hydrogermylation of alkyl‐ and aryl‐substituted terminal alkynes with tertiary hydrogermanes with good functional group compatibility in good to high yields and selectivity. Mechanistic studies establish alkyne‐bridged dicobalt carbonyl species as the active intermediates in both catalytic systems and the distinct steric nature of the metalloligands LCo (L = IPent, Xantphos) governs the observed regiodivergent selectivity. The application of these dicobalt‐catalysts to alkyne hydroelementation reactions allows the selective preparation of different configurational isomers of vinylgermanes/silanes that can be further utilized for the stereoselective synthesis of alkene derivatives.

title: Framework materials for nuclear waste treatment
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Driven by energy demand and environmental safety, the ability to treat and dispose of nuclear waste is sought to fulfil the demand for sustainable nuclear power. Radioactive byproducts generated by nuclear fission, including cationic radionuclides (235UO22+, 137Cs+, 90Sr2+, noble metals and partial actinide elements), anionic radionuclides (99TcO4−, 129/131I3−, 129/131I−, etc.), gaseous effluents (129/131I2, 85Kr, 127Xe, 222Rn, etc.), and tritium, should be managed safely and efficiently, underscoring the need for robust scientific solutions to minimize environmental contamination and foster public confidence. For this purpose, framework materials like metal–organic frameworks (MOFs), covalent organic frameworks (COFs), hydrogen-bonded organic frameworks (HOFs), supramolecular assembly frameworks (SAFs) and porous aromatic frameworks (PAFs) have emerged as highly promising platforms for radionuclide extraction and removal relying on their unique properties of abundant structures, customizable functionality, tunable pore sizes, and high specific surface area. Thus far, there is a lack of a comprehensive review that systematically integrates materials design, research progress, and practical applications for achieving comprehensive radionuclide separation. This review begins with a comprehensive overview of the scientific significance and structural characteristics of framework materials, followed by a summary of their design principles, synthetic strategies, and functional versatility. It then presents a detailed examination of recent applications across various radionuclide classes, with an in-depth discussion of advanced design paradigms, performance across diverse scenarios, and mechanisms. Finally, future perspectives are outlined to address unresolved scientific and technical challenges and to accelerate the practical implementation of next-generation framework materials. This work provides a foundational platform for engineering innovation and the broader application of framework materials, which is crucial for the effective and sustainable management of nuclear waste.
title_zh: 核废料处理骨架材料
abstract_zh: 在能源需求和环境安全的推动下，人们寻求处理和处置核废料的能力，以满足可持续核电的需求。核裂变产生的放射性副产物，包括阳离子放射性核素（235UO22+、137Cs+、90Sr2+、贵金属和部分锕系元素）、阴离子放射性核素（99TcO4−、129/131I3−、129/131I−等）、气态流出物（129/131I2、 85Kr、127Xe、222Rn 等）和氚应得到安全有效的管理，强调需要强有力的科学解决方案来最大程度地减少环境污染并增强公众信心。为此，金属有机框架（MOF）、共价有机框架（COF）、氢键有机框架（HOF）、超分子组装框架（SAF）和多孔芳香框架（PAF）等框架材料凭借其丰富的结构、可定制的功能、可调的孔径和高比表面积的独特性质，已成为非常有前途的放射性核素提取和去除平台。迄今为止，还缺乏系统地整合材料设计、研究进展和实际应用以实现放射性核素全面分离的全面综述。本文首先全面概述了框架材料的科学意义和结构特征，然后总结了其设计原理、合成策略和功能多样性。然后详细审查了各种放射性核素的最新应用

title: Self-assembly for cuproptosis-based cancer therapy and imaging
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Cuproptosis, a copper-dependent programmed cell death pathway, has emerged as a promising strategy for cancer therapy. While previous reviews have primarily focused on the fundamental mechanisms of cuproptosis and the development of inducing agents, the self-assembly-driven, stimuli-responsive cuproptosis nanoplatforms have remained relatively underexplored. To fill this gap, this review provides a comprehensive analysis of recent advancements in stimuli-responsive, dynamic self-assembly nanosystems for cuproptosis-based cancer therapy and imaging. We begin by elucidating the molecular mechanisms that underpin cuproptosis, followed by a systematic exploration of the design principles behind self-assembly-based cuproptosis inducers. These inducers leverage selective copper-ion coordination chemistry, coupled with diverse intermolecular forces, to enable precise spatiotemporal regulation. Furthermore, we highlight how these nanoassemblies undergo intelligent structural and functional transformations in response to both endogenous and exogenous stimuli, enabling controlled activation of cuproptosis. This review also explores breakthrough applications that integrate cuproptosis with synergistic therapeutic strategies and imaging guidance, highlighting a promising direction for enhancing cancer treatment. Finally, we discuss the critical challenges and barriers that must be addressed to push this emerging field toward clinical translation.
title_zh: 用于基于铜凋亡的癌症治疗和成像的自组装
abstract_zh: Cuprotosis 是一种铜依赖性程序性细胞死亡途径，已成为一种有前途的癌症治疗策略。虽然之前的评论主要集中在铜凋亡的基本机制和诱导剂的开发上，但自组装驱动的、刺激响应的铜凋亡纳米平台的探索仍然相对不足。为了填补这一空白，这篇综述对用于基于铜凋亡的癌症治疗和成像的刺激响应、动态自组装纳米系统的最新进展进行了全面分析。我们首先阐明支持铜凋亡的分子机制，然后系统地探索基于自组装的铜凋亡诱导剂背后的设计原理。这些诱导剂利用选择性铜离子配位化学，再加上不同的分子间力，以实现精确的时空调节。此外，我们强调了这些纳米组件如何响应内源性和外源性刺激而经历智能结构和功能转变，从而实现铜凋亡的受控激活。这篇综述还探讨了将铜凋亡与协同治疗策略和影像指导相结合的突破性应用，突出了增强癌症治疗的有希望的方向。最后，我们讨论了推动这一新兴领域走向临床转化所必须解决的关键挑战和障碍。

title: Developing the hybrid scenario in DIII-D and KSTAR for W-compatible long-pulse operation
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Long-pulse, high-performance operation with tungsten plasma-facing components is a crucial challenge for achieving steady-state (SS) goals in ITER and future fusion devices. This paper presents a joint international effort between the DIII-D and KSTAR tokamaks aimed at demonstrating the compatibility of the high hybrid scenario with a tungsten divertor and superconducting coils. A DIII-D hybrid scenario recipe is successfully tailored to KSTAR’s operational constraints, which facilitates cross-device studies. The results show successful 30 s long-pulse operation in KSTAR at a normalized beta ( = 2.4) with a benign 4/3 mode and effective mitigation of tungsten accumulation. Despite this success, the KSTAR scenario exhibits a greater than 25% reduction in thermal confinement compared to the DIII-D reference. To investigate this discrepancy, we performed a predictive TGYRO validation study, which suggests that the difference is likely caused by a weaker temperature pedestal in the KSTAR discharge due to a higher and narrower density pedestal. In addition, such lower thermal confinement leads to higher impurity accumulation, possibly due to a change in neoclassical transport with increased inward pinch, which further degrades global confinement. We also report that stationary, long-pulse operation with sustained thermal confinement requires consistent fueling and wall conditioning. These findings highlight the importance of optimized fueling and real-time wall conditioning in achieving a high temperature pedestal and strong global confinement during stable long-pulse operation. We propose potential approaches toward fully SS, long-pulse operation, including real-time wall conditioning using an impurity dropper in KSTAR and future tokamaks.
title_zh: 在 DIII-D 和 KSTAR 中开发混合方案以实现 W 兼容的长脉冲操作
abstract_zh: 使用面向钨等离子体的组件进行长脉冲、高性能运行是实现 ITER 和未来聚变装置稳态 (SS) 目标的关键挑战。本文介绍了 DIII-D 和 KSTAR 托卡马克之间的国际联合努力，旨在证明高混合方案与钨偏滤器和超导线圈的兼容性。 A DIII-D hybrid scenario recipe is successfully tailored to KSTAR’s operational constraints, which facilitates cross-device studies.结果表明，KSTAR 在归一化 beta (= 2.4) 下成功进行了 30 秒长脉冲操作，具有良性 4/3 模式，并有效缓解了钨积累。尽管取得了这一成功，但与 DIII-D 参考相比，KSTAR 方案的热约束减少了 25% 以上。为了研究这种差异，我们进行了预测性 TGYRO 验证研究，该研究表明，这种差异可能是由于 KSTAR 放电中较高且较窄的密度基座而导致较弱的温度基座造成的。此外，这种较低的热约束导致更高的杂质积累，可能是由于新古典输运的变化以及向内收缩的增加，这进一步降低了全局约束。我们还报告说，具有持续热限制的固定、长脉冲操作需要一致的燃料和壁调节。这些发现强调了优化燃料供给和实时壁调节对于在稳定的长脉冲运行期间实现高温基座和强大的全局限制的重要性。

title: Discharge-Triggered Electronic Delocalization via Asymmetric Motifs Suppresses Jahn-Teller Distortion in Mn-Based Layered Oxides
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Mn-based layered oxide cathodes with anionic redox activity are promising candidates for sodium-ion batteries (SIBs) owing to their high operating voltage and energy density.However, the inevitable Mn 3+ generation after cycles results in severe Jahn-Teller distortion, damaging the long cycling stability of the cathodes. Herein, we present a metal-to-metal charge transfer (MMCT) mechanism that acts at the end of discharge to inhibit the generation of Mn 3+ , thereby improving the structural sustainability of the electrode. A P2-Na 0.69 Li 0.23 Ru 0.17 Mn 0.6 O 2 cathode is selected as a model. The doping of highly electronegative Ru regulates the covalency of asymmetrical Mn-O-Ru, ensuring the electron transfer between Mn 3+ and Ru 4+ , which reduces Mn 3+ content and mitigates the Jahn-Teller distortion.As a result, the electrode shows a robust structural stability with a minimal unit cell volume change of only 0.2%. Moreover, the cathode exhibits excellent electrochemical performance, maintaining capacity retention of over 90% after 900 cycles at 2-4.3 V. The findings provide fresh insights for inhibiting the Jahn-Teller effect, offering a new paradigm for the application of Mn-based layered cathodes with high energy density for sustainable SIBs.
title_zh: 通过不对称图案放电触发的电子离域抑制锰基层状氧化物中的 Jahn-Teller 畸变
abstract_zh: 具有阴离子氧化还原活性的锰基层状氧化物正极由于其高工作电压和能量密度而成为钠离子电池（SIB）的有希望的候选者。然而，循环后不可避免的生成Mn 3+ 会导致严重的Jahn-Teller畸变，损害正极的长循环稳定性。在此，我们提出了一种金属间电荷转移（MMCT）机制，该机制在放电结束时发挥作用，抑制Mn 3+ 的生成，从而提高电极的结构可持续性。选择P2-Na 0.69 Li 0.23 Ru 0.17 Mn 0.6 O 2 阴极作为模型。高负电性Ru的掺杂调节了不对称Mn-O-Ru的共价性，保证了Mn 3+ 和Ru 4+ 之间的电子转移，从而降低了Mn 3+ 含量并减轻了Jahn-Teller畸变。因此，该电极表现出强大的结构稳定性，最小晶胞体积变化仅为0.2%。此外，该正极表现出优异的电化学性能，在2-4.3 V下循环900次后容量保持率超过90%。这些研究结果为抑制Jahn-Teller效应提供了新的见解，为可持续SIBs中高能量密度的锰基层状正极的应用提供了新的范例。

title: A High-Adaptability Ambient Energy Harvester Enhanced by the Canyon Effect for Smart Agriculture
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Ambient energy harvesters show great potential for powering distributed sensor nodes. However, their output performance is often limited by a single-source energy, resulting in poor adaptability, stability, and energy utilization ratio in variable weather conditions. Herein, a high-adaptability ambient energy harvester enhanced by a bi-concave flow amplifier is proposed. The omnidirectional airflow smoothing enhancement design of the amplifier is inspired by the canyon effect. And the inclined surface of the amplifier offers building-block-like modular assembly, enabling synergistic non-invasive integration of electromagnetic-photovoltaic-triboelectric effect. The results indicate that the amplifier boosts the wind energy harvesting efficiency by 86.87 % and reduces the start-up wind speed to 0.4 m/s. Within the theoretical-simulationexperimental framework, the measured power densities reach 14.158 W/m 2 (wind), 63.47 W/m 2 (solar), and 25.42 W/m 2 (raindrop), demonstrating robust performance across varying weather conditions. Notably, leveraging the multi-energy sensing capabilities of the harvester, a self-powered weather warning system and an automated smart greenhouse control system have been developed. This system-level application offers a new perspective for the deep integration of energy harvesters with smart agriculture.
title_zh: 利用峡谷效应增强智能农业的高适应性环境能量采集器
abstract_zh: 环境能量采集器在为分布式传感器节点供电方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，其输出性能往往受到单一来源能源的限制，导致其在多变天气条件下的适应性、稳定性和能源利用率较差。在此，提出了一种由双凹流量放大器增强的高适应性环境能量收集器。放大器的全向气流平滑增强设计的灵感来自于峡谷效应。放大器的倾斜表面提供了积木式的模块化组装，实现了电磁-光伏-摩擦电效应的协同非侵入式集成。结果表明，该放大器将风能收集效率提高了86.87%，并将启动风速降低至0.4 m/s。在理论模拟实验框架内，测得的功率密度达到14.158 W/m 2 （风）、63.47 W/m 2 （太阳能）和25.42 W/m 2 （雨滴），在不同的天气条件下表现出强大的性能。值得注意的是，利用收割机的多能量传感功能，开发了自供电天气预警系统和自动化智能温室控制系统。这一系统级应用为能量采集器与智慧农业的深度融合提供了新的视角。

title: Modulating Interfacial Ion Flux via Electrode Coatings Enables Efficient Acidic CO₂ Electrolysis
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Acidic CO2 electrolysis offers great potential for high-efficiency single-pass CO2 conversion to valuable fuels and chemicals, yet is challenged by the kinetically favorable hydrogen evolution reaction. Electrode coatings can engineer a favorable electrode-electrolyte interface by regulating interfacial ion flux to steer the reaction pathway toward CO2 electroreduction; however, rational design rules for such coatings remain elusive. Here, we decouple the roles of binders and inorganic fillers in the coatings and demonstrate that coupling a cation-exchange ionomer (CEI) with a proton-blocking oxide yields a durable coating that enables efficient acidic CO2 electrolysis. Combined experimental and simulation results reveal that this optimal formulation promotes inward K+ transport while restricting H+ influx and outward OH- transport, thereby establishing a K+-enriched and alkaline interfacial microenvironment that enhances CO2/CO adsorption and lowers *CO dimerization barrier. As a representative demonstration, an Al2O3/CEI-coated Cu electrode achieves a maximum Faradaic efficiency (FE) of 81.3% for multi-carbon (C2+) products at 600 mA cm-2 and remarkably durable operation for 200 h at 200 mA cm-2. Furthermore, this proposed electrode coating strategy demonstrates the broad generality in engineering interfacial microenvironments across distinct catalyst platforms.
title_zh: 通过电极涂层调节界面离子通量可实现高效的酸性二氧化碳电解
abstract_zh: 酸性二氧化碳电解为高效单程二氧化碳转化为有价值的燃料和化学品提供了巨大的潜力，但受到动力学上有利的析氢反应的挑战。电极涂层可以通过调节界面离子通量来设计有利的电极-电解质界面，以引导反应路径走向CO2电还原；然而，此类涂层的合理设计规则仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们将涂层中粘合剂和无机填料的作用解耦，并证明将阳离子交换离聚物 (CEI) 与质子阻挡氧化物偶联可产生耐用的涂层，从而实现有效的酸性 CO2 电解。综合实验和模拟结果表明，该最佳配方促进了向内 K+ 传输，同时限制了 H+ 流入和向外 OH- 传输，从而建立了富含 K+ 的碱性界面微环境，增强了 CO2/CO 吸附并降低了 *CO 二聚势垒。作为代表性演示，Al2O3/CEI 涂层的铜电极在 600 mA cm-2 电流下对于多碳 (C2+) 产品实现了 81.3% 的最大法拉第效率 (FE)，并且在 200 mA cm-2 电流下可连续运行 200 小时。此外，这种提出的电极涂层策略证明了在不同催化剂平台上设计界面微环境的广泛通用性。

title: Multiscale cathode design for high-temperature proton exchange membrane fuel cells
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: High temperature proton exchange membrane fuel cells (HT-PEMFCs) are highly promising energy conversion devices featuring the benefits of their superior reaction kinetics, simplified water and thermal management systems, tolerance to CO-containing reactant gases, and being compatible with hydrogen production via industrial fuel reforming processes. However, due to the phosphoric acid (PA)-doped membranes being the primary proton exchange membranes (PEMs) used in HT-PEMFCs, the PA leaching from the membrane during the operation degrades platinum (Pt)-based oxygen reduction reaction (ORR) catalysts and the cathode catalyst layer, causing insufficient performance of HT-PEMFCs, which hinders their application. Although extensive research has been conducted to enhance the activity and durability of HT-PEMFCs, there remains a significant gap toward practical implementation, which stems from incomplete fundamental understanding of atomic-scale catalysts, reaction interfacial kinetics, and catalyst layer structure engineering. To fill the aforementioned research gap, this review summarizes recent developments in cathode catalysts, catalytic interface, and catalyst layers from a multiscale view of HT-PEMFCs. Beginning with the fundamental principles, the theoretical insights into PA-induced catalyst poisoning and catalyst layer degradation are first provided. Innovative design in ORR catalysts and catalytic interfaces with enhanced PA resistance and reaction kinetics is then presented. Additionally, approaches to optimizing the cathode catalyst layer are discussed from a practical application perspective. Finally, an outlook on the remaining challenges and prospects in this field is provided, aiming to facilitate the advancement of HT-PEMFCs.
title_zh: 高温质子交换膜燃料电池的多尺度阴极设计
abstract_zh: 高温质子交换膜燃料电池（HT-PEMFC）是非常有前途的能量转换装置，具有优越的反应动力学、简化的水和热管理系统、对含CO反应气体的耐受性以及与通过工业燃料重整过程生产氢气兼容的优点。然而，由于HT-PEMFC使用的主要质子交换膜(PEM)是磷酸(PA)掺杂膜，运行过程中从膜中浸出的PA会降解铂(Pt)基氧还原反应(ORR)催化剂和阴极催化剂层，导致HT-PEMFC性能不足，阻碍了其应用。尽管为了提高 HT-PEMFC 的活性和耐久性进行了广泛的研究，但由于对原子级催化剂、反应界面动力学和催化剂层结构工程的基本了解不完整，距离实际实施仍存在很大差距。为了填补上述研究空白，本文从 HT-PEMFC 的多尺度角度总结了阴极催化剂、催化界面和催化剂层的最新进展。从基本原理开始，首先提供了 PA 引起的催化剂中毒和催化剂层降解的理论见解。随后介绍了 ORR 催化剂和催化界面的创新设计，具有增强的 PA 耐受性和反应动力学。此外，还从实际应用角度讨论了优化阴极催化剂层的方法。

title: A kinetic descriptor of solvent polarization for rational electrolyte design in lithium–metal batteries
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: The construction of solvation structures is crucial for the rational design of electrolytes. However, previous efforts to regulate solvation structures have mainly focused on the static coordination environment around Li+, such as the anion coordination number or ligand identity, while the reconstruction and relaxation processes of solvation structures driven by polarization during Li+ migration remain largely unexplored, mainly due to the difficulty of direct observation. In this work, we capture the dynamic evolution of the total dipole moment of the system and propose an integral dielectric relaxation time descriptor (τi) to quantify the polarization response rate of coordinating solvents. This method simultaneously predicts bulk ion transport and interfacial characteristics of the electrolyte and reflects the combined effects of solvent size, viscosity, and intermolecular interactions. Based on this framework, we apply the τi descriptor to a deep eutectic electrolyte system, screen 95 additives, and design an optimized formulation that significantly enhances electrochemical performance, enabling an ultrahigh limiting current density of 6 mA cm−2 and stable cycling of high-voltage cathodes from −15 to 50 °C. These results establish τi as a kinetically grounded descriptor for the efficient screening and rational design of electrolytes for next-generation lithium–metal batteries.
title_zh: 用于锂金属电池合理电解质设计的溶剂极化动力学描述符
abstract_zh: 溶剂化结构的构建对于电解质的合理设计至关重要。 However, previous efforts to regulate solvation structures have mainly focused on the static coordination environment around Li+, such as the anion coordination number or ligand identity, while the reconstruction and relaxation processes of solvation structures driven by polarization during Li+ migration remain largely unexplored, mainly due to the difficulty of direct observation. In this work, we capture the dynamic evolution of the total dipole moment of the system and propose an integral dielectric relaxation time descriptor (τi) to quantify the polarization response rate of coordinating solvents. This method simultaneously predicts bulk ion transport and interfacial characteristics of the electrolyte and reflects the combined effects of solvent size, viscosity, and intermolecular interactions. Based on this framework, we apply the τi descriptor to a deep eutectic electrolyte system, screen 95 additives, and design an optimized formulation that significantly enhances electrochemical performance, enabling an ultrahigh limiting current density of 6 mA cm−2 and stable cycling of high-voltage cathodes from −15 to 50 °C. These results establish τi as a kinetically grounded descriptor for the efficient screening and rational design of electrolytes for next-generation lithium–metal batteries.

title: Deep learning based plasma response models to 3D external magnetic field perturbations in EAST
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The real-time response monitoring model and the physics feature based response optimization model are proposed on EAST using three deep learning models. Compared with the widely used fully connected neural network (FNN) and convolutional neural network—long short-term memory (CNN–LSTM) models, the inverted transformer (iTransformer) model, which uses the attention mechanism to more naturally capture multivariate dependencies, demonstrates the best overall performance. For real-time response monitoring, the iTransformer model is trained on 133157 experimental samples with 4-fold toroidal phase symmetry augmentation. This model establishes a direct nonlinear mapping from resonant magnetic perturbation (RMP) coils and electromagnetic measurement sensors to the plasma response. With an inference time per discharge of less than , it can provide real-time response monitoring under flexible three-dimensional (3D) fields. For experimental response optimization, the physics feature based iTransformer model is trained on 12080 filtered experimental samples. This model captures the dependence of the response amplitude on key parameters, including , , , , , , and . Combined with SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analysis, it provides interpretable insights into parameter influences and directly guides the optimization of 3D field experimental discharges. This work establishes a comprehensive framework for real-time monitoring and physics feature based optimization of plasma responses based on statistical patterns in large datasets, thereby paving the way for active control of error-field locked mode and edge localized mode (ELM).
title_zh: 基于深度学习的等离子体对 EAST 3D 外部磁场扰动的响应模型
abstract_zh: 使用三种深度学习模型在 EAST 上提出了实时响应监控模型和基于物理特征的响应优化模型。与广泛使用的全连接神经网络（FNN）和卷积神经网络-长短期记忆（CNN-LSTM）模型相比，使用注意力机制更自然地捕获多元依赖关系的反向变压器（iTransformer）模型表现出最佳的整体性能。为了实时响应监控，iTransformer 模型在 133157 个实验样本上进行训练，并具有 4 倍环形相位对称性增强。该模型建立了从谐振磁扰 (RMP) 线圈和电磁测量传感器到等离子体响应的直接非线性映射。每次放电的推理时间小于 ，可以在灵活的三维（3D）场下提供实时响应监控。为了优化实验响应，基于物理特征的 iTransformer 模型在 12080 个经过过滤的实验样本上进行训练。该模型捕获了响应幅度对关键参数的依赖性，包括 、 、 、 、 、 和 。与 SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 分析相结合，它提供了对参数影响的可解释的见解，并直接指导 3D 现场实验放电的优化。这项工作建立了一个全面的框架，用于基于大数据集中的统计模式的等离子体响应的实时监测和基于物理特征的优化，从而为主动控制误差铺平了道路。

title: Ligand-modulated metal–radical polarity match enables general 1,2-dicarbofunctionalization of ethylene
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Leveraging transition metal catalysis to direct multiple radical intermediates towards a single desired product offers many synthetic opportunities while presenting an important chemoselectivity challenge arising from selectivity in radical capture by the catalyst. How mechanistic design precisely tunes this selectivity remains limited, constraining the rational design of efficient catalytic systems. Here we demonstrate that the electronic bias of the radical intermediates and the ligand-modulated copper centre can be strategically harnessed to control the selectivity of copper-mediated radical capture. A strongly π-accepting terpyridine ligand modulates the electronic properties of the copper catalyst, enabling the selective capture of radical intermediates with complementary polarity through a metal–radical polarity-match mechanism. Building on this mechanistic framework, we have established a synthetically powerful, yet highly challenging ethylene 1,2-dicarbofunctionalization. This provides streamlined access to structurally diverse, medicinally relevant 1,2-dicarbofunctionalized ethanes that incorporate sp3-, sp2- and sp-hybridized carbogenic functional groups while offering mechanistic insights and design principles that facilitate the rational design of transition metal-catalysed radical transformations.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 配体调制的金属-自由基极性匹配可实现乙烯的一般 1,2-二碳官能化
abstract_zh: 利用过渡金属催化将多种自由基中间体引导至单一所需产物提供了许多合成机会，同时提出了由催化剂自由基捕获选择性引起的重要化学选择性挑战。机械设计如何精确调节这种选择性仍然有限，限制了高效催化系统的合理设计。在这里，我们证明可以策略性地利用自由基中间体和配体调节的铜中心的电子偏压来控制铜介导的自由基捕获的选择性。强π接受三联吡啶配体调节铜催化剂的电子特性，从而能够通过金属-自由基极性匹配机制选择性捕获具有互补极性的自由基中间体。在此机制框架的基础上，我们建立了一种合成强大但极具挑战性的乙烯 1,2-二碳官能化。这提供了对结构多样化、医学相关的 1,2-二碳官能化乙烷的简化获取，这些乙烷包含 sp3-、sp2- 和 sp- 杂化碳原官能团，同时提供机械见解和设计原则，促进过渡金属催化自由基转化的合理设计。该图像的替代文本可能是使用 AI 生成的。

title: Aromatic ring flips reveal reshaping of protein dynamics in crystals and complexes
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Protein conformational energy landscapes are shaped not only by intramolecular interactions but also by their environment. In protein crystals and protein–protein complexes, intermolecular contacts alter this energy landscape, but the exact nature of this alteration is difficult to decipher. Understanding how the crystal lattice affects protein dynamics is crucial for crystallography-based studies of motion, yet its influence on collective motions remains unclear. Aromatic ring flips in the hydrophobic core represent sensitive probes of such dynamics. Here, we compare the kinetics of aromatic ring flips in the protein GB1 in crystals, in complex with its binding partner IgG, and in solution, combining advanced isotope labelling with quantitative NMR methods. We show that rings in the core flip nearly a thousand times less frequently in crystals than in solution. Enhanced-sampling molecular dynamics simulations, based on a crystal structure of a GB1 variant reported in this work, reproduce these elevated barriers and reveal how the crystal restrains motions.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 芳香环翻转揭示了晶体和复合物中蛋白质动力学的重塑
abstract_zh: 蛋白质构象能量景观不仅由分子内相互作用决定，还受到其环境的影响。 In protein crystals and protein–protein complexes, intermolecular contacts alter this energy landscape, but the exact nature of this alteration is difficult to decipher. Understanding how the crystal lattice affects protein dynamics is crucial for crystallography-based studies of motion, yet its influence on collective motions remains unclear.疏水核心中的芳环翻转代表了这种动力学的敏感探针。 Here, we compare the kinetics of aromatic ring flips in the protein GB1 in crystals, in complex with its binding partner IgG, and in solution, combining advanced isotope labelling with quantitative NMR methods.我们发现，晶体中核心环的翻转频率比溶液中低近千倍。 Enhanced-sampling molecular dynamics simulations, based on a crystal structure of a GB1 variant reported in this work, reproduce these elevated barriers and reveal how the crystal restrains motions.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.

title: Simultaneous single-base resolution profiling of 5mC and 5hmC using BRIGHT-seq
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Cytosine modifications in DNA, particularly 5-methylcytosine (5mC) and 5-hydroxymethylcytosine (5hmC), are key epigenetic marks involved in gene regulation and chromatin organization. Simultaneous and base-resolution detection of 5mC and 5hmC is essential for understanding their interplay in gene regulation. However, existing methods often rely on differential subtraction strategies, making direct and concurrent analysis within a single assay challenging. Here, we present the Base Replacement for Integrated Genome-wide Methylation and Hydroxymethylation Tracking Sequencing (BRIGHT-seq), a sequencing strategy that enables direct and simultaneous detection of 5mC and 5hmC at single-base resolution within the same DNA molecule. By integrating enzymatic and chemical treatments, BRIGHT-seq converts 5mC to adenine and 5hmC to thymine, enabling direct identification of both modifications without relying on differential subtraction. We demonstrate the applicability of BRIGHT-seq by mapping 5mC and 5hmC landscapes across human and mouse genomes. BRIGHT-seq provides a useful and high-resolution tool for epigenetic research, facilitating future studies on the roles of 5mC and 5hmC in gene regulation and disease.
title_zh: 使用 BRIGHT-seq 对 5mC 和 5hmC 进行同步单碱基分辨率分析
abstract_zh: DNA 中的胞嘧啶修饰，特别是 5-甲基胞嘧啶 (5mC) 和 5-羟甲基胞嘧啶 (5hmC)，是参与基因调控和染色质组织的关键表观遗传标记。 5mC 和 5hmC 的同步和碱基分辨率检测对于了解它们在基因调控中的相互作用至关重要。然而，现有方法通常依赖于微分减法策略，这使得在单个测定中进行直接和并发分析具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了集成全基因组甲基化和羟甲基化跟踪测序的碱基替换 (BRIGHT-seq)，这是一种测序策略，能够在同一 DNA 分子内以单碱基分辨率直接同时检测 5mC 和 5hmC。通过整合酶处理和化学处理，BRIGHT-seq 将 5mC 转化为腺嘌呤，将 5hmC 转化为胸腺嘧啶，从而无需依赖差异减法即可直接识别这两种修饰。我们通过绘制人类和小鼠基因组中的 5mC 和 5hmC 景观来证明 BRIGHT-seq 的适用性。 BRIGHT-seq 为表观遗传学研究提供了一种有用的高分辨率工具，有助于未来研究 5mC 和 5hmC 在基因调控和疾病中的作用。

title: Deep learning four decades of human migration
source: Nature
abstract: Human migration is a fundamental driver of global demographic change, shaping population structure, labour markets and social policy across countries1,2,3. Although long-term migration patterns are often linked to economic development4, they can shift rapidly in response to shocks such as conflict, environmental crises and political change5. Despite its importance, migration remains difficult to measure consistently: existing data are sparse, concentrated in high-income settings and are fragmented across incompatible definitions, temporal resolutions and data types6,7,8. Past efforts have relied on partial datasets, including flow records, stock estimates and model-based reconstructions with limited coverage9,10,11,12,13,14. A central challenge is therefore to construct a globally consistent, high-resolution account of migration flows over time. Here we present a new dataset of annual origin-destination migration across 230 countries and regions from 1990 to the present, integrating diverse data sources into a unified modelling framework. By combining official statistics, census-based stocks, net migration estimates and past flow reconstructions, our approach produces temporally detailed and spatially comprehensive estimates that substantially extend existing resources. Using an ensemble of deep recurrent neural networks informed by geographic, economic, cultural and political covariates, we capture both persistent trends and short-term responses to changing conditions—all while propagating uncertainty to generate confidence bounds. Our results outperform existing five-year flow estimates on held-out data and provide finer temporal resolution, revealing previously obscured dynamics in global migration patterns. This framework highlights regions in which uncertainty remains high and data collection is most urgently needed. By releasing all data, code and trained models, we provide a transparent and reproducible foundation for future work. These advances enable a more timely and detailed understanding of human mobility, with implications for research and policy in an increasingly dynamic global system.
title_zh: 深度学习人类迁徙的四十年
abstract_zh: 人口迁移是全球人口变化的根本驱动力，影响着各国的人口结构、劳动力市场和社会政策1,2,3。尽管长期移民模式通常与经济发展4有关，但它们可能会因冲突、环境危机和政治变革等冲击而迅速发生变化5。尽管迁移很重要，但它仍然难以一致地衡量：现有数据稀疏，集中在高收入环境，并且在不兼容的定义、时间分辨率和数据类型中分散6、7、8。过去的努力依赖于部分数据集，包括覆盖范围有限的流量记录、种群估计和基于模型的重建9,10,11,12,13,14。因此，一个核心挑战是建立一个全球一致的、高分辨率的长期移民流动账户。在这里，我们提出了 1990 年至今 230 个国家和地区每年始发地-目的地迁移的新数据集，将不同的数据源整合到统一的建模框架中。通过结合官方统计数据、基于人口普查的种群、净移民估计和过去的流量重建，我们的方法产生了时间上详细和空间上全面的估计，从而大大扩展了现有资源。使用由地理、经济、文化和政治协变量提供信息的深层循环神经网络集合，我们可以捕获持续趋势和对不断变化的条件的短期响应，同时传播不确定性以产生置信区间。我们的业绩优于现有五年

title: Confirmation that bryozoan animals were present during the Cambrian explosion
source: Nature
abstract: Bryozoans are marine invertebrates that live in colonies and have long been considered absent from the Cambrian explosion — a rapid evolutionary event that began around 538 million years ago. Newly discovered fossils from the Cambrian period reveal that the bryozoan phylum had already diversified by this time. Fossils of two forms of bryozoans show evidence of soft tissue still preserved inside their mineralized skeletons.
title_zh: 证实寒武纪大爆发期间存在苔藓虫动物
abstract_zh: 苔藓虫是群居的海洋无脊椎动物，长期以来一直被认为没有出现在寒武纪大爆发中——这是一场大约 5.38 亿年前开始的快速进化事件。新发现的寒武纪化石表明，苔藓虫门此时已经多样化。两种苔藓动物的化石显示出其矿化骨骼内仍保存有软组织的证据。

title: Improved quantum processor logical error rates via correction and detection
source: Nature
abstract: Performing quantum algorithms for critical problems in physics and chemistry requires substantially lower error rates than the physical error rates of present quantum computers. Achieving such low logical error rates requires quantum error correction1,2 and physical error rates below a critical threshold value3,4,5,6,7,8. We experimentally demonstrate on a trapped-ion quantum charge-coupled device (QCCD)9,10 improvements in logical error rates ranging from 11× to 800× compared with several physical circuit baselines, including quantum computation on multiple qubits. Our results hinge on two quantum error correction code constructions optimized for an ion-trap processor: a 12-qubit code encoding two qubits inspired by Knill11 and a 16-qubit tesseract colour code encoding four qubits12,13. These constructions are combined with a scalable method of error detection and post-selection to achieve reduced logical error rates. Our results show that state-of-the-art quantum devices are already able to make use of fault tolerance and error correction to strongly suppress errors in non-trivial quantum circuit computations.
title_zh: 通过校正和检测提高量子处理器逻辑错误率
abstract_zh: 对物理和化学中的关键问题执行量子算法所需的错误率远低于现有量子计算机的物理错误率。要实现如此低的逻辑错误率，需要量子纠错1,2，并且物理错误率低于临界阈值3,4,5,6,7,8。我们通过实验证明了俘获离子量子电荷耦合器件 (QCCD)9,10 与几个物理电路基线相比，包括多个量子位上的量子计算，逻辑错误率提高了 11 倍到 800 倍。我们的结果取决于针对离子阱处理器优化的两种量子纠错代码结构：受 Knill11 启发编码两个量子位的 12 量子位代码和编码四个量子位 12,13 的 16 量子位超正方颜色代码。这些结构与错误检测和后选择的可扩展方法相结合，以降低逻辑错误率。我们的结果表明，最先进的量子设备已经能够利用容错和纠错来强烈抑制重要量子电路计算中的错误。

title: Amplified Arctic iceberg traffic reshapes benthic biodiversity
source: Nature
abstract: The Arctic is undergoing rapid warming, resulting in retreating sea ice and glaciers1, yet how cryospheric changes propagate into the deep ocean remains poorly understood2. Here we identify a climate-driven mechanism linking accelerating glacier disintegration to an increase in deep-sea hard-bottom habitats far beyond calving fronts. Seafloor observations in Fram Strait show a localized increase in the density and patchiness of dropstones delivered by debris-laden icebergs. At the same time, four decades of shipboard records show that the occurrence of icebergs increased abruptly in the early 2000s. Backtracking links these icebergs to the main outlet glaciers in northeast Greenland and the Russian High Arctic. In northeast Greenland, the timing of glacier destabilization coincides with this rise, whereas sparse satellite coverage in the Russian sector limits temporal attribution despite indications of enhanced glacier activity. A model sensitivity study shows that, apart from intensified calving, a more dynamic sea ice cover enhances downstream transport of glacial ice. Along these pathways, increased iceberg activity could reshape deep-sea habitats through enhanced melt and associated lithogenic input, and elevate navigational hazards as maritime traffic expands in the Arctic. Although modest compared with the iceberg discharges of Pleistocene Heinrich events, this mechanism provides a modern analogue of long-range cryospheric influence on the seafloor in a warming climate.
title_zh: 北极冰山交通的扩大重塑了底栖生物多样性
abstract_zh: 北极正在经历快速变暖，导致海冰和冰川消退1，但冰冻圈变化如何传播到深海仍知之甚少2。在这里，我们确定了一种气候驱动的机制，将冰川加速融化与远远超出崩解​​前沿的深海硬底栖息地的增加联系起来。弗拉姆海峡的海底观测显示，充满碎片的冰山所产生的落石密度和斑块状局部增加。与此同时，四十年的船上记录显示，冰山的出现在 2000 年代初急剧增加。回溯将这些冰山与格陵兰岛东北部和俄罗斯北极地区的主要出口冰川联系起来。在格陵兰岛东北部，冰川不稳定的时间与冰川上升的时间一致，而俄罗斯地区稀疏的卫星覆盖限制了时间归因，尽管有迹象表明冰川活动有所增强。模型敏感性研究表明，除了加剧的崩解之外，更具动态的海冰覆盖还增强了冰川冰的下游运输。沿着这些路径，冰山活动的增加可能会通过增加融化和相关的岩石输入来重塑深海栖息地，并随着北极海上交通的扩大而增加航行危险。尽管与更新世海因里希事件的冰山排放相比，这一机制较为温和，但这种机制提供了气候变暖时冰冻圈对海底的远程影响的现代模拟。

title: Diverse binding poses of agonistic neurotoxins on human Nav1.6
source: Nature
abstract: Voltage-gated sodium (Nav) channels are key targets of various venomous toxins. Deciphering the binding poses and mechanisms of action of representative toxins will help to dissect the functional mechanism of the channels and facilitate therapeutic development targeting Nav channels1,2. Here we present cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) structures of distinct binding poses of three agonistic peptide toxins on the human Nav1.6–β1 channel complex. The globular β-scorpion toxin Cn2 nestles between the extracellular segment of voltage-sensing domain (VSD) in the second repeat of the Nav1.6 core α-unit (VSDII) and the pore extracellular loops in the third repeat of the Nav1.6 core α-unit (ECLIII), where it is stabilized by interactions with both protein regions and the branched N1372-glycan. Cone snail ι-conotoxin RXIA adopts an elongated conformation, spanning VSDI and VSDIV to wrap around the shoulder of the pore domain (PD). The bullet ant-derived toxin δ-paraponeritoxin-Pc1a exists as a transmembrane helix that stands between VSDII and PDIII. Our findings, corroborated by functional characterizations, illustrate the diversity in peptide toxin binding poses and mechanisms of action, link stabilization of the up state of VSDI or VSDII to channel activation, and provide clues to the rational design of selective Nav channel modulators.
title_zh: 激动性神经毒素对人类 Nav1.6 的不同结合姿势
abstract_zh: 电压门控钠 (Nav) 通道是各种有毒毒素的关键目标。破译代表性毒素的结合姿势和作用机制将有助于剖析通道的功能机制并促进针对 Nav 通道的治疗开发1,2。在这里，我们展示了三种激动性肽毒素在人类 Nav1.6-β1 通道复合物上的不同结合姿势的冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 结构。球状 β-蝎子毒素 Cn2 坐落在 Nav1.6 核心 α-单元 (VSDII) 第二个重复中的电压传感结构域 (VSD) 的细胞外片段和 Nav1.6 核心 α-单元 (ECLIII) 第三个重复中的孔细胞外环之间，通过与两个蛋白质区域和支链 N1372-聚糖的相互作用而稳定。锥螺ι-芋螺毒素 RXIA 采用细长构象，跨越 VSDI 和 VSDIV，包裹在孔域 (PD) 的肩部。子弹蚁衍生毒素 δ-paraponeritoxin-Pc1a 以跨膜螺旋形式存在，位于 VSDII 和 PDIII 之间。我们的研究结果通过功能表征得到证实，说明了肽毒素结合姿势和作用机制的多样性，将 VSDI 或 VSDII 上态的稳定与通道激活联系起来，并为选择性 Nav 通道调制器的合理设计提供了线索。

title: Building user-driven climate adaptation products
source: Nature
abstract: Climate adaptation products have traditionally been developed using a supply-driven model reliant on available climate information, leading to usability gaps1,2,3,4. To better meet user needs, the climate services field has recognized a need to shift towards a demand-driven model emphasizing co-production, that is, user-driven, scientifically informed products created through shared knowledge practices1,2,3,4,5. However, co-production can be challenging, especially for researchers unfamiliar with the approach or for digital and software-based products with complex user needs2,5,6,7,8. User-centred design, from the human–computer interaction field, offers a process that could complement co-production approaches to product development, yet its potential remains underexplored2. Here we show how user-centred design can be integrated into, and strengthen, co-production approaches for building user-driven climate adaptation products. Through a systematic review of the co-production and user-centred design literature, we identify key processes, mechanisms and best practices for both approaches. Our findings offer practical guidance for researchers and propose an integrated approach for developing climate adaptation products that are useful, usable and used.
title_zh: 构建用户驱动的气候适应产品
abstract_zh: 气候适应产品传统上是使用依赖于现有气候信息的供应驱动模型来开发的，导致可用性差距1,2,3,4。为了更好地满足用户需求，气候服务领域已经认识到需要转向强调共同生产的需求驱动模式，即通过共享知识实践创建用户驱动的、科学的产品1,2,3,4,5。然而，联合生产可能具有挑战性，特别是对于不熟悉该方法的研究人员或具有复杂用户需求的数字和基于软件的产品2,5,6,7,8。来自人机交互领域的以用户为中心的设计提供了一个可以补充产品开发联合生产方法的流程，但其潜力仍未得到充分开发2。在这里，我们展示了如何将以用户为中心的设计融入并加强联合生产方法，以构建用户驱动的气候适应产品。通过对联合生产和以用户为中心的设计文献进行系统回顾，我们确定了这两种方法的关键流程、机制和最佳实践。我们的研究结果为研究人员提供了实用指导，并提出了开发有用、可用和使用的气候适应产品的综合方法。

title: A first-in-class pulsatile FXR agonist for bile-acid-related liver diseases
source: Nature
abstract: Nuclear receptors are central regulators of metabolism1, yet therapeutic strategies that enforce continuous receptor activation frequently lead to reduced efficacy and unacceptable toxicity. Here we report a first-principles drug design strategy that aligns pharmacokinetics with physiological signalling cycles. We developed linafexor, a potent non-bile-acid agonist of the farnesoid X receptor (FXR)2; it is engineered for rapid systemic clearance, which enables pulsatile receptor activation that mirrors endogenous bile acid dynamics3,4,5. Linafexor has robust efficacy across multiple preclinical models of metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis6, liver fibrosis7, primary biliary cholangitis and primary sclerosing cholangitis8,9. Transcriptomic analyses reveal that, unlike long-acting FXR agonists10,11, linafexor preserves cyclic FXR signalling, avoids receptor downregulation and prevents broad transcriptional dysregulation. Direct manipulation of delivery patterns demonstrates that sustained FXR activation—independent of compound identity—induces severe toxicity, establishing activation duration as a determinant of therapeutic index. In phase 1 clinical studies (ClinicalTrials.gov; NCT05082779), linafexor administered once daily produces transient FXR pathway engagement, marked by (1) induction of FGF1912,13,14, a key endocrine mediator of bile acid feedback regulation; and (2) suppression of C415, an intermediate reflecting hepatic bile acid synthesis, with no treatment-related adverse events. Together, these findings identify pulsatile FXR activation as a mechanistically grounded and clinically translatable strategy, and establish linafexor as a first-in-class therapeutic for bile acid–related liver diseases.
title_zh: 用于治疗胆汁酸相关肝脏疾病的一流脉冲 FXR 激动剂
abstract_zh: 核受体是新陈代谢的核心调节因子1，但强制持续激活受体的治疗策略常常会导致疗效降低和不可接受的毒性。在这里，我们报告了一种第一原理药物设计策略，该策略将药代动力学与生理信号循环相结合。我们开发了 linafexor，一种有效的法尼醇 X 受体 (FXR)2 非胆汁酸激动剂；它专为快速全身清除而设计，可实现反映内源性胆汁酸动力学的脉动受体激活3,4,5。 Linafexor 在代谢功能障碍相关的脂肪性肝炎 6、肝纤维化 7、原发性胆汁性胆管炎和原发性硬化性胆管炎 8、9 的多种临床前模型中具有强大的疗效。转录组学分析表明，与长效 FXR 激动剂 10,11 不同，linafexor 保留了循环 FXR 信号传导，避免受体下调并防止广泛的转录失调。直接操纵递送模式表明，持续的 FXR 激活（与化合物特性无关）会引起严重的毒性，从而将激活持续时间确定为治疗指数的决定因素。在 1 期临床研究（ClinicalTrials.gov；NCT05082779）中，每日一次的 linafexor 会产生短暂的 FXR 通路参与，其特点是 (1) 诱导 FGF1912,13,14，胆汁酸反馈调节的关键内分泌介质； (2)抑制C415（一种反映肝胆汁酸合成的中间体），没有与治疗相关的不良事件。总之，这些发现将脉冲 FXR 激活确定为一种机制

title: ‘Hidden hero’ peptides guard crops against sudden cold
source: Nature
abstract: A protein signal remains silent under normal conditions but is activated under cold stress to protect developing pollen. This ‘on-demand’ resilience mechanism could enable the development of ‘climate smart’ crops that maintain high yields in good years and food security under climate stress. A peptide signal ensures that, in cold conditions, developing pollen receives nutrients at the right time.
title_zh: “隐藏的英雄”肽保护农作物免受突如其来的寒冷
abstract_zh: 蛋白质信号在正常条件下保持沉默，但在冷应激下被激活以保护正在发育的花粉。这种“按需”弹性机制可以促进“气候智能”作物的开发，在丰年时保持高产，并在气候压力下保持粮食安全。肽信号确保在寒冷条件下，正在发育的花粉在正确的时间接收营养。

title: Mitochondria directly interact with the nuclear pore complex
source: Nature
abstract: Mitochondria regulate cellular processes through direct and indirect interactions with other organelles. A well-studied example has been contact with the endoplasmic reticulum at mitochondrial-associated endoplasmic reticulum membranes1, which control pathways including redox and calcium homeostasis2,3. Recent studies have also reported direct mitochondria–nuclear membrane contacts in cancer cells and yeast that promote pro-survival signalling4,5. Here we identify direct interactions between mitochondria and nuclear pores. Using two unbiased proteomic screens, GST pulldown and BioID, we found that VDAC1 was the top mitochondrial candidate that interacts with the filamentous nuclear pore protein RANBP2. In vitro RANBP2 CRISPR knockout, RANBP2 truncation or site-directed mutagenesis of RANBP2–VDAC1 interacting amino acids resulted in reduced mitochondria–nucleus proximity and decreased nuclear ATP and phosphocreatine levels. This was accompanied by a decline in the levels of the nuclear phosphoproteome and downregulation of pathways involved in histone modification, cellular differentiation and transcriptional regulation in vitro. Moreover, deletion of the RANBP2 C-terminal domain in vivo in mice resulted in embryonic lethality due to cardiac and neural crest differentiation defects. Collectively, these results describe a mechanism by which mitochondria directly interact with the nuclear pore complex, a phenomenon critical for regulation of nuclear energetics and cellular differentiation. Undoubtedly, additional roles of this interaction remain to be revealed.
title_zh: 线粒体直接与核孔复合体相互作用
abstract_zh: 线粒体通过与其他细胞器的直接和间接相互作用来调节细胞过程。一个经过充分研究的例子是线粒体相关内质网膜与内质网的接触1，它控制包括氧化还原和钙稳态在内的途径2,3。最近的研究还报道了癌细胞和酵母中线粒体与核膜的直接接触，促进了促生存信号传导 4,5。在这里，我们确定了线粒体和核孔之间的直接相互作用。使用两种无偏蛋白质组筛选（GST pulldown 和 BioID），我们发现 VDAC1 是与丝状核孔蛋白 RANBP2 相互作用的顶级线粒体候选者。体外 RANBP2 CRISPR 敲除、RANBP2 截短或 RANBP2-VDAC1 相互作用氨基酸的定点诱变导致线粒体-细胞核接近度降低以及核 ATP 和磷酸肌酸水平降低。伴随着核磷酸蛋白质组水平的下降以及参与组蛋白修饰、细胞分化和体外转录调节的途径的下调。此外，在小鼠体内删除 RANBP2 C 端结构域会因心脏和神经嵴分化缺陷而导致胚胎死亡。总的来说，这些结果描述了线粒体直接与核孔复合体相互作用的机制，这种现象对于核能量和细胞分化的调节至关重要。毫无疑问，这种相互作用的其他作用仍有待揭示。

title: A thalamus–brainstem attractor network drives history-biased decisions
source: Nature
abstract: Natural environments often change gradually, making it adaptive to bias decisions on the basis of the recent past — a phenomenon known as serial dependence1,2,3. Large-scale recordings during behaviour have identified that serial dependence is a common motif for decision-making, with neural representations of past experiences found throughout the brain4,5,6,7,8,9,10,11. However, it remains unclear whether this bias arises from dedicated neural circuits with history-specific computations. Using whole-brain, cellular-resolution imaging in zebrafish performing memory-guided evasive manoeuvres12,13,14, we identified a hierarchical circuit that maintains past information and biases future choices. Discrete attractors in the dorsal thalamus encoded the position of the most recent obstacle, maintaining a categorical memory via persistent activity lasting 10–20 s. Optogenetic manipulation of the dorsal thalamus abolished or imposed serial bias. A downstream hindbrain integrator received input from the thalamus and combined it with current sensory cues to produce graded responses reflecting multi-trial history. Leveraging a comprehensive brain atlas in zebrafish15, we constructed a whole-brain computational model that recapitulated behaviour and also predicted a key role for heterogeneous inhibitory subtypes in enabling flexible state transitions. This attractor–integrator architecture reveals a hierarchical and modular computation that unifies robust memory retention with flexible sensory integration, providing a general principle for history-biased decisions.
title_zh: 丘脑-脑干吸引子网络驱动历史偏见决策
abstract_zh: 自然环境经常逐渐变化，使其适应基于最近的历史的偏见决策——这种现象称为序列依赖性1,2,3。行为过程中的大规模记录表明，序列依赖性是决策的常见主题，在整个大脑中发现了过去经历的神经表征4,5,6,7,8,9,10,11。然而，目前尚不清楚这种偏差是否源于具有历史特定计算的专用神经回路。使用斑马鱼的全脑细胞分辨率成像来执行记忆引导的规避策略12,13,14，我们确定了一个分层电路，可以保留过去的信息并影响未来的选择。背侧丘脑中的离散吸引子对最近障碍物的位置进行编码，通过持续 10-20 秒的持续活动来维持分类记忆。背侧丘脑的光遗传学操作消除或施加了序列偏差。下游后脑积分器接收来自丘脑的输入，并将其与当前的感觉线索相结合，产生反映多试验历史的分级反应。利用斑马鱼的综合大脑图谱，我们构建了一个全脑计算模型，该模型可以概括行为，并预测异质抑制亚型在实现灵活状态转换中的关键作用。这种吸引子-积分器架构揭示了一种分层和模块化计算，将强大的记忆保留与灵活的感觉集成结合起来，为历史偏见决策提供了一般原则。

title: Measurement of reactor neutrino oscillation with the first JUNO data
source: Nature
abstract: Neutrino oscillations (see refs. 1,2 and references therein), a quantum effect manifesting at macroscopic scales, are governed by lepton flavour mixing angles and neutrino mass-squared differences3 that are fundamental parameters of particle physics, representing phenomena beyond the Standard Model. Precision measurements of these parameters are essential for testing the completeness of the three-flavour framework, determining the mass ordering of neutrinos and probing possible new physics. The Jiangmen Underground Neutrino Observatory (JUNO)4 is a 20-ktonne liquid-scintillator detector located 52.5 km from multiple reactor cores, designed to resolve the interference pattern of reactor neutrinos with sub-percent precision5,6. Here we report, using the first 59.1 days of data collected since detector completion in August 2025, the first simultaneous high-precision determination of two neutrino oscillation parameters, sin2θ12=0.3092±0.0087" role="presentation">sin2θ12=0.3092±0.0087{\sin }^{2}{\theta }_{12}=0.3092\,\pm \,0.0087 and Δm212=(7.50±0.12)×10−5eV2" role="presentation">Δm212=(7.50±0.12)×10−5eV2\Delta {m}_{21}^{2}=(7.50\,\pm \,0.12)\times 1{0}^{-5}\,{\mathrm{eV}}^{2} for the normal mass ordering scenario, improving the precision by a factor of 1.6 relative to the combination of all previous measurements. These results advance the basic understanding of neutrinos, validate the design of the detector and indicate the readiness of JUNO for resolving the neutrino mass ordering with a larger dataset. The rapid achievement with a short exposure highlights the potential of JUNO to push the frontiers of precision neutrino physics and paves the way for its broad scientific programme.
title_zh: 使用第一个 JUNO 数据测量反应堆中微子振荡
abstract_zh: 中微子振荡（参见参考文献 1,2 和其中的参考文献）是一种在宏观尺度上显现的量子效应，受轻子风味混合角和中微子质量平方差 3 控制，它们是粒子物理学的基本参数，代表了超出标准模型的现象。这些参数的精确测量对于测试三味框架的完整性、确定中微子的质量排序和探索可能的新物理至关重要。江门地下中微子观测站 (JUNO)4 是一个 20 吨液体闪烁体探测器，距离多个反应堆堆芯 52.5 公里，旨在以亚百分之一的精度解析反应堆中微子的干涉图案5,6。在此，我们报告使用自 2025 年 8 月探测器完成以来收集的前 59.1 天的数据，首次同时高精度确定两个中微子振荡参数 sin2θ12=0.3092±0.0087" role="presentation">sin2θ12=0.3092±0.0087{\sin }^{2}{\theta }_{12}=0.3092\,\pm \,0.0087 且 Δm212=(7.50±0.12)×10−5eV2" role="presentation">Δm212=(7.50±0.12)×10−5eV2\Delta {m}_{21}^{2}=(7.50\,\pm \,0.12)\times 1{0}^{-5}\,{\mathrm{eV}}^{2} 对于正常质量排序场景，相对于所有先前测量的组合，精度提高了 1.6 倍。这些结果增进了对中微子的基本理解，验证了探测器的设计，并表明 JUNO 已准备好使用更大的数据集解决中微子质量排序问题。快速取得成就

title: Lignin to adipic acid in a high-yield chemical and biological redox process
source: Nature
abstract: Viable manufacturing pathways to produce bio-based chemicals from renewable feedstocks, such as lignin derived from plant biomass, are needed to decarbonize the chemicals manufacturing sector. Converting the recalcitrant lignin polymer to valuable bioproducts remains a longstanding challenge in biorefining, with the highest reported single-product yield from lignin currently around 20 wt% (refs. 1,2,3,4). Most existing lignin depolymerization strategies target aryl–ether bond cleavage, which can produce aromatic monomers in yields of only about 30 wt%, and still as complex mixtures with C–C-linked dimers and oligomers5,6. The recalcitrance of these C–C linkages between aromatic moieties fundamentally limits single-product yields from lignin, prompting the development of strategies to efficiently cleave these C–C bonds3,7,8,9. Here we show how reductive processing of lignin from poplar accesses a hydrocarbon mixture of alkyl-aromatic monomers and oligomers that is privileged for oxidative conversion to monomeric aromatic carboxylic acids, comprising mostly benzoic acid and phthalic acid isomers in up to 73 wt% monomer yields, using a Co/Mn/Br catalyst. The soil bacterium Pseudomonas putida KT2440 was engineered to convert this mixture of aromatic carboxylic acids to muconolactone, a precursor to bio-based nylons, enabling final adipic acid yields up to 26 wt% (gram adipic acid per gram lignin) with a maximum theoretical yield of 57 wt%. This pairing of reductive and oxidative steps with lignin resembles processes in petrochemical refining and shows how lignin may be converted into a single, valuable bioproduct in high yields.
title_zh: 高产化学和生物氧化还原过程中木质素转化为己二酸
abstract_zh: 化学品制造行业脱碳需要采用可行的制造途径，利用可再生原料（例如源自植物生物质的木质素）生产生物基化学品。将顽固的木质素聚合物转化为有价值的生物产品仍然是生物精炼领域的长期挑战，据报道，木质素的最高单一产品收率目前约为 20 wt%（参考文献 1,2,3,4）。大多数现有的木质素解聚策略以芳基-醚键断裂为目标，其产生的芳香族单体的产率仅为约 30 wt%，并且仍然是 C-C 连接二聚体和低聚物的复杂混合物5,6。芳香族部分之间这些 C-C 键的不顺从从根本上限制了木质素的单一产物产量，促使开发有效裂解这些 C-C 键的策略3,7,8,9。在这里，我们展示了如何使用 Co/Mn/Br 催化剂对杨木中的木质素进行还原处理，获得烷基芳香族单体和低聚物的烃混合物，该混合物有利于氧化转化为单体芳香族羧酸，主要包含苯甲酸和邻苯二甲酸异构体，单体产率高达 73 wt%。土壤细菌恶臭假单胞菌 KT2440 经过改造，可将这种芳香族羧酸混合物转化为粘康酸内酯（生物基尼龙的前体），使最终己二酸产量高达 26 wt%（克己二酸每克木质素），最大理论产量为 57 wt%。这种与木质素的还原和氧化步骤的配对类似于石化精炼过程，并显示了木质素如何转化

title: Efficient and accurate neural-field reconstruction using resistive memory
source: Nature
abstract: Applications such as medical imaging, augmented and virtual reality, and embodied artificial intelligence (AI) depend on the ability to reconstruct complex signals from sparse observations. These applications are characterized by incomplete measurements and limited computational resources. Traditional approaches to digital hardware face the following challenges: explicit signal representations require heavy sampling and storage, data movement across the von Neumann bottleneck dominates energy and latency, and CMOS (complementary metal–oxide–semiconductor)-based circuits offer limited parallel efficiency. Here we present a software–hardware co-optimization framework for sparse-input signal reconstruction. At the software level, we use neural fields1 to implicitly represent signals using neural networks, which are further compressed by low-rank decomposition and structured pruning. At the hardware level, we design a resistive-memory-based computing-in-memory platform, featuring a Gaussian encoder and a multi-layer perceptron processing engine. The Gaussian encoder leverages the intrinsic stochasticity of resistive memory for efficient encoding, whereas the processing engine enables precise weight mapping through a hardware-aware quantization circuit. On a 40-nm 256 Kb resistive-memory macro, the system delivers 23.5×, 21.0× and 32.3× gains in projected energy efficiency, together with 10.8×, 38.8× and 6.2× gains in projected parallelism, for three-dimensional computed tomography sparse reconstruction, novel view synthesis and dynamic-scene novel view synthesis, without compromising on reconstruction quality. This work advances AI-driven signal reconstruction technology and paves the way for future efficient and robust medical AI and three-dimensional vision applications.
title_zh: 使用电阻记忆进行高效、准确的神经场重建
abstract_zh: 医学成像、增强和虚拟现实以及嵌入式人工智能 (AI) 等应用取决于从稀疏观察中重建复杂信号的能力。这些应用的特点是测量不完整和计算资源有限。传统的数字硬件方法面临以下挑战：显式信号表示需要大量采样和存储，跨越冯诺依曼瓶颈的数据移动在能量和延迟方面占主导地位，并且基于 CMOS（互补金属氧化物半导体）的电路提供有限的并行效率。在这里，我们提出了一个用于稀疏输入信号重建的软件-硬件协同优化框架。在软件层面，我们使用神经场1通过神经网络隐式表示信号，并通过低秩分解和结构化剪枝进一步压缩信号。在硬件层面，我们设计了一个基于电阻存储器的内存计算平台，具有高斯编码器和多层感知器处理引擎。高斯编码器利用电阻存储器固有的随机性进行高效编码，而处理引擎则通过硬件感知量化电路实现精确的权重映射。在 40 nm 256 Kb 电阻式存储宏上，该系统可在投影能源效率上实现 23.5×、21.0× 和 32.3× 增益，在投影并行度上实现 10.8×、38.8× 和 6.2× 增益，用于三维计算机断层扫描稀疏重建、新颖视图合成和动态场景新颖视图合成，无需补偿。

title: Mutation-dependent responses to sleep and exercise in clonal haematopoiesis
source: Nature
abstract: Clonal haematopoiesis (CH) activates inflammation and increases the risk of atherosclerosis1,2. Whether lifestyle alters CH clone expansion or the phenotypic programming of CH mutant cells, thereby affecting atherosclerosis, is unknown. Here, in humans and mice and across mutations in Jak2, Tet2, Trp53 and Dnmt3a, we demonstrate mutation-dependent responses to sleep and exercise in CH and show that mutant cells are uniquely sensitive to lifestyle. In two human datasets, moderate-to-vigorous physical activity was associated with lower prevalence of non-DNMT3A-driven CH. In atherogenic mice with Jak2V617F or Tet2 loss of function (LOF), but not Trp53 LOF or Dnmt3aR878H CH, uninterrupted sleep or exercise curtails clone expansion. In CH with the Jak2V617F mutation, sleep and exercise reduces clone expansion by selectively reprogramming mutant, but not cohabitant wild type, haematopoietic progenitor cells towards antiproliferative and metabolically healthy phenotypes by tempering bone marrow macrophage–haematopoietic progenitor cell IL-1β signalling. Sleep or exercise also lessens Jak2V617F-driven, Tet2 LOF-driven and Trp53 LOF-driven, but not Dnmt3aR878H-driven, atherosclerosis by locally reprogramming mutant vascular macrophages, independent of peripheral clone dynamics. In Jak2V617F, but not adjacent wild type, aortic macrophages, uninterrupted sleep blunts CLEC4E-dependent inflammasome activation, consequently diminishing lesions. Exercise, meanwhile, activates PAC1+ neurons in the locus coeruleus, raising the levels of peripheral noradrenaline, which signals through adrenergic receptor β2 (ADRβ2) whose expression is preserved by exercise in Jak2V617F, but not cohabitant wild type, aortic macrophages, selectively repressing their inflammatory programming and atherosclerosis. Our findings establish that healthy lifestyles gene-specifically diminish CH and selectively reprogram mutant haematopoietic progenitor cells and macrophages to maintain cardiovascular health.
title_zh: 克隆造血过程中睡眠和运动的突变依赖性反应
abstract_zh: 克隆造血 (CH) 会激活炎症并增加动脉粥样硬化的风险1,2。生活方式是否会改变 CH 克隆扩增或 CH 突变细胞的表型编程，从而影响动脉粥样硬化，目前尚不清楚。在这里，在人类和小鼠中，通过 Jak2、Tet2、Trp53 和 Dnmt3a 的突变，我们证明了 CH 对睡眠和运动的突变依赖性反应，并表明突变细胞对生活方式具有独特的敏感性。在两个人类数据集中，中度至剧烈的体力活动与非 DNMT3A 驱动的 CH 患病率较低相关。在 Jak2V617F 或 Tet2 功能丧失 (LOF)（但 Trp53 LOF 或 Dnmt3aR878H CH 除外）的致动脉粥样硬化小鼠中，不间断的睡眠或运动会抑制克隆扩增。在携带 Jak2V617F 突变的 CH 中，睡眠和运动通过选择性地重新编程突变型（而非共生型野生型）造血祖细胞，通过调节骨髓巨噬细胞 - 造血祖细胞 IL-1β 信号转导，使其达到抗增殖和代谢健康的表型，从而减少克隆扩张。睡眠或运动还可以通过局部重编程突变血管巨噬细胞来减轻 Jak2V617F 驱动、Tet2 LOF 驱动和 Trp53 LOF 驱动的动脉粥样硬化，但不能减轻 Dnmt3aR878H 驱动的动脉粥样硬化，与外周克隆动态无关。在 Jak2V617F 中，但相邻的野生型主动脉巨噬细胞中，不间断的睡眠会减弱 CLEC4E 依赖性炎症小体的激活，从而减少病变。与此同时，运动会激活蓝斑中的 PAC1+ 神经元，提高外周去甲肾上腺素的水平，后者通过肾上腺发出信号

title: Two-component exciton condensates in an electron–hole bilayer
source: Nature
abstract: Macroscopic quantum coherence emerges when bosons condense into a Bose–Einstein condensate (BEC)1,2,3,4,5. Excitons are a long-sought solid-state route to high-temperature BECs with strong interactions, electrical tunability and potentially multicomponent spinor order, but conclusive evidence for equilibrium condensation has remained elusive. Here we report evidence for two-component exciton BECs in MoSe2/hBN/WSe2 electron–hole bilayers6,7,8,9 by probing the spin–valley susceptibility of constituent electrons and holes. This heterostructure hosts equilibrium exciton fluids with four spin–valley flavours. Magneto-optical spectroscopy in a dilution refrigerator reveals three exciton condensate phases with distinct flavour polarizations. At zero magnetic field, the many-body ground state is a coherent superposition of two condensed intravalley exciton flavours. Under a magnetic field, the intravalley exciton condensate first switches to a two-component intervalley condensate through a first-order quantum phase transition at a weak critical field and then turns into a fully polarized single-component condensate at high fields. The condensate signatures form a dome in density–temperature space, persisting up to approximately 1.8 K. Our results establish van der Waals electron–hole bilayers as a versatile platform for strongly interacting, multicomponent exciton BECs.
title_zh: 电子空穴双层中的双组分激子凝聚
abstract_zh: 当玻色子凝聚成玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体 (BEC)1,2,3,4,5 时，就会出现宏观量子相干性。激子是一种长期寻找的高温 BEC 固态途径，具有强相互作用、电可调性和潜在的多组分旋量顺序，但平衡凝聚的决定性证据仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们通过探测组成电子和空穴的自旋谷敏感性，报告了 MoSe2/hBN/WSe2 电子空穴双层 6,7,8,9 中双组分激子 BEC 的证据。这种异质结构拥有具有四种自旋谷风味的平衡激子流体。稀释冰箱中的磁光光谱揭示了具有不同风味偏振的三个激子凝聚相。在零磁场下，多体基态是两个凝聚的谷内激子味道的相干叠加。在磁场作用下，谷内激子凝聚态首先在弱临界场处通过一阶量子相变转变为双组分谷间凝聚态，然后在高场处转变为完全极化的单组分凝聚态。凝聚态特征在密度-温度空间中形成圆顶，持续高达约 1.8 K。我们的结果将范德华电子-空穴双层确立为强相互作用、多组分激子 BEC 的通用平台。

title: A prognostic human brain network for diffuse midline glioma
source: Nature
abstract: Diffuse midline gliomas (DMGs) are near-universally lethal tumours of the childhood central nervous system1,2. In animal models, DMGs form brain-wide integrated networks through neuron-to-glioma synapses3,4,5,6 and glioma-to-glioma gap junctional coupling3. This extensive connectivity robustly promotes the growth and invasion of DMG3,4,5,6,7,8,9 and other glial malignancies10,11,12 through paracrine mechanisms and direct neuron-to-glioma synapses. However, the organization and clinical implications of these connections in the living human brain remain to be elucidated. Here, we develop tumour network mapping to compute the brain-wide connectivity profile of DMG, defining a conserved brain network across pontine and thalamic DMG associated with patient short-term survival (DMG network). Tumour functional connectivity with the DMG network was independently predictive of patient overall survival across two external validation cohorts. Tumour growth mapped to DMG network-specific trajectories and peak in-network neurometabolic changes across development spatiotemporally aligned with the peak age incidence of DMG. Analyses of single-nucleus RNA sequencing data confirmed diverse synaptic gene enrichment in high-connectivity DMG. Strikingly, incidental surgical resection of high-connectivity thalamic DMG tissue conferred a significant survival advantage. Collectively, these data define a conserved and prognostically important brain network in children with DMG, consistent with the hypothesis that DMGs exploit otherwise healthy brain circuits to promote tumour growth.
title_zh: 弥漫性中线神经胶质瘤的预后人脑网络
abstract_zh: 弥漫性中线神经胶质瘤 (DMG) 是儿童中枢神经系统几乎普遍致命的肿瘤1,2。在动物模型中，DMG 通过神经元到神经胶质瘤突触 3、4、5、6 和神经胶质瘤到神经胶质瘤间隙连接耦合 3 形成全脑集成网络。这种广泛的连接通过旁分泌机制和直接的神经元-神经胶质瘤突触强有力地促进 DMG3,4,5,6,7,8,9 和其他神经胶质恶性肿瘤 10,11,12 的生长和侵袭。然而，这些连接在活人大脑中的组织和临床意义仍有待阐明。在这里，我们开发肿瘤网络图谱来计算 DMG 的全脑连接概况，定义与患者短期生存相关的跨脑桥和丘脑 DMG 的保守大脑网络（DMG 网络）。在两个外部验证队列中，肿瘤与 DMG 网络的功能连接可独立预测患者的总体生存率。肿瘤生长映射到 DMG 网络特定轨迹，并且发育过程中的网络内神经代谢峰值变化在时空上与 DMG 峰值年龄发生率一致。单核 RNA 测序数据的分析证实了高连接性 DMG 中多种突触基因的富集。引人注目的是，偶然手术切除高连接性丘脑 DMG 组织具有显着的生存优势。总的来说，这些数据定义了 DMG 儿童中一个保守且对预后重要的大脑网络，这与 DMG 利用其他健康的大脑回路促进肿瘤生长的假设一致。

title: In situ nanocrystal confinement for efficient blue perovskite LEDs
source: Nature
abstract: Metal halide perovskites have emerged as promising semiconductors for light-emitting diodes (LEDs) owing to their excellent luminescence properties1. However, their performance remains limited, primarily owing to the inherent contradiction between ‘high crystallinity’ and ‘small size’ in the in situ synthesis of perovskite nanocrystals on substrates. Here we report efficient blue perovskite LEDs (PeLEDs) achieved via in situ polymerization-driven nanocrystal confinement to synthesize perovskite films composed of high-quality nanocrystals. The in situ-formed polymer network imposes nanoscale spatial constraints during perovskite nanocrystal growth, enabling nanocrystals with small sizes and a high photoluminescence quantum yield of 83%. Furthermore, polymerizable monomers with sufficient coordination sites allow a prolonged lattice rearrangement of perovskite clusters, promoting the crystallinity of the nanocrystals. The synthesized perovskite nanocrystals are utilized in the fabrication of PeLEDs, resulting in an external quantum efficiency of 21.8% at 491 nm, which is among the highest performances in blue PeLEDs. This work simultaneously controls the thermal dynamics of perovskite crystallization and organic ligand reactions, which helps to advance understanding of the effect of ligand engineering on nanocrystal synthesis, benefiting the development of efficient PeLEDs and other optoelectronic technologies.
title_zh: 原位纳米晶体限制高效蓝色钙钛矿 LED
abstract_zh: 金属卤化物钙钛矿由于其优异的发光性能而成为有前途的发光二极管（LED）半导体1。然而，它们的性能仍然有限，这主要是由于在基底上原位合成钙钛矿纳米晶时“高结晶度”和“小尺寸”之间的固有矛盾。在此，我们报道了通过原位聚合驱动的纳米晶体限制合成由高质量纳米晶体组成的钙钛矿薄膜而实现的高效蓝色钙钛矿 LED (PeLED)。原位形成的聚合物网络在钙钛矿纳米晶体生长过程中施加了纳米级空间限制，使得纳米晶体具有小尺寸和高达83%的光致发光量子产率。此外，具有足够配位位点的可聚合单体允许钙钛矿簇的长时间晶格重排，从而促进纳米晶体的结晶度。合成的钙钛矿纳米晶体用于制造 PeLED，在 491 nm 处的外量子效率达到 21.8%，这是蓝色 PeLED 中最高性能之一。这项工作同时控制了钙钛矿结晶和有机配体反应的热动力学，有助于加深对配体工程对纳米晶体合成影响的理解，有利于高效PeLED和其他光电技术的发展。

title: Whole-genome duplication shaped cell-type evolution in the vertebrate brain
source: Nature
abstract: The complex brains of vertebrates have more cell types than those of their closest relatives. Whole-genome duplications (WGDs) occurred during early vertebrate evolution1, but it is unclear whether the duplicated genes (ohnologues) facilitated cell-type evolution. Here using brain single-cell transcriptomes from five chordates—human2, mouse3, lizard4, lamprey5 and amphioxus—we report that many cell-type families with conserved core transcription factors in vertebrates do not show one-to-one homology with amphioxus. Moreover, ohnologues, particularly those from the first WGD, were more important than small-scale duplication paralogues for vertebrate cell-type evolution. To explore whether ohnologues are mechanistically important for this process, we predicted ancestral cell-type states and compared them to amphioxus and experimentally investigated macroglia. The findings indicate that ohnologues had a role in early vertebrate cell-type diversification. Moreover, by examining paralogue expression across cell types and species, we show that expression changes were mainly driven by dosage selection and subfunctionalization. We also link ohnologues to cellular diversity at different anatomical and cell-type scales. Our findings demonstrate the importance of WGDs for the evolution of early vertebrate brain complexity and highlight that the resultant ohnologues continued to capacitate cell-type evolution long after they were formed.
title_zh: 全基因组复制塑造了脊椎动物大脑中的细胞类型进化
abstract_zh: 脊椎动物复杂的大脑比其近亲的大脑拥有更多的细胞类型。全基因组复制（WGD）发生在早期脊椎动物进化过程中1，但尚不清楚复制的基因（同源物）是否促进了细胞类型的进化。在这里，使用来自五种脊索动物（人类2、小鼠3、蜥蜴4、七鳃鳗5和文昌鱼）的大脑单细胞转录组，我们报告说，脊椎动物中具有保守核心转录因子的许多细胞类型家族并不与文昌鱼表现出一对一的同源性。此外，对于脊椎动物细胞类型的进化，同源物，特别是来自第一次全基因组测序的同源物，比小规模复制旁系同源物更重要。为了探索ohnologues在这一过程中是否具有重要的机制，我们预测了祖先细胞类型的状态，并将它们与文昌鱼进行比较，并通过实验研究了大胶质细胞。研究结果表明，同源物在早期脊椎动物细胞类型多样化中发挥作用。此外，通过检查跨细胞类型和物种的旁系同源表达，我们发现表达变化主要是由剂量选择和亚功能化驱动的。我们还将同源物与不同解剖和细胞类型尺度的细胞多样性联系起来。我们的研究结果证明了全基因组测序对于早期脊椎动物大脑复杂性进化的重要性，并强调了由此产生的同源物在形成很长时间后仍继续促进细胞类型的进化。

title: Gene ancestries reveal diverse microbial associations during eukaryogenesis
source: Nature
abstract: The origin of eukaryotes remains a central enigma in biology1. Continuing debates agree on the pivotal role of a symbiosis between an alphaproteobacterium and an Asgard archaeon2,3. However, the nature, timing and contributions of other potential bacterial partners4,5,6 and the role of interactions with viruses7,8,9 remain contentious. To address these questions, we used advanced phylogenomic approaches and comprehensive datasets spanning the known diversity of cellular life and viruses. Our analysis provided a revised reconstruction of the last eukaryotic common ancestor (LECA) proteome, in which we traced the phylogenetic origin of each protein family. We found compelling evidence for multiple waves of horizontal gene transfer from diverse bacterial donors, with some likely to have preceded mitochondrial endosymbiosis. We inferred plausible traits of the major donors and their functional contributions to the LECA. Our findings support a contribution of horizontal gene transfers to shaping the proteomes of pre-LECA ancestors and suggest a facilitating role of Nucleocytoviricota viruses. Taken together, our results suggest that ancient eukaryotes may have originated within complex microbial ecosystems through a succession of diverse associations that left a footprint of horizontally transferred genes.
title_zh: 基因祖先揭示了真核发生过程中不同的微生物关联
abstract_zh: 真核生物的起源仍然是生物学中的一个中心谜团。关于α变形菌和阿斯加德古菌之间共生的关键作用，持续的争论已达成共识2,3。然而，其他潜在细菌伙伴的性质、时间和贡献4、5、6以及与病毒相互作用的作用7、8、9仍然存在争议。为了解决这些问题，我们使用了先进的系统发育学方法和涵盖已知的细胞生命和病毒多样性的综合数据集。我们的分析提供了最后一个真核共同祖先（LECA）蛋白质组的修订重建，其中我们追踪了每个蛋白质家族的系统发育起源。我们发现了来自不同细菌供体的多波水平基因转移的令人信服的证据，其中一些可能先于线粒体内共生。我们推断了主要捐赠者的合理特征及其对 LECA 的功能贡献。我们的研究结果支持水平基因转移对塑造前 LECA 祖先的蛋白质组的贡献，并表明核细胞病毒的促进作用。总而言之，我们的结果表明，古代真核生物可能起源于复杂的微生物生态系统，通过一系列不同的关联留下了水平转移基因的足迹。

title: A 5.3-million-year-old deep-sea whale necropolis in the Diamantina Zone
source: Nature
abstract: Whale falls are biodiversity oases at seabeds1,2,3,4,5,6, yet their record from the oceans has remained sparse and fragmentary6,7. Here we report the discovery of a vast whale necropolis in the Diamantina Zone (4,616- to 7,001-m depth), extending about 1,200 km along the sea floor of the southeastern Indian Ocean. This area has a deep and extensive accumulation comprising five modern natural whale-fall communities and 476 fossil cetaceans recorded. We show that carcasses host specialized communities dominated by brittle stars, bone-boring worms and chemosynthesis-based bivalves and that the fossil record in this area comprises both extant and extinct deep-diving beaked whales. Isotopic dating shows that whale falls in this region have occurred since at least 5.3 million years ago. These findings reshape the understanding of the limits and biogeography of whale-fall ecosystems and establish some deep sea floors as a fossil archive for tracing cetacean evolution over geological time.
title_zh: 迪亚曼蒂纳区拥有 530 万年前的深海鲸鱼墓地
abstract_zh: 鲸鱼瀑布是海底的生物多样性绿洲1,2,3,4,5,6，但来自海洋的记录仍然稀疏和零碎6,7。在此，我们报告在迪亚曼蒂纳区（深度 4,616 至 7,001 米）发现了一个巨大的鲸鱼墓地，该墓地沿着印度洋东南部海底延伸约 1,200 公里。该地区有深厚而广泛的沉积物，包括五个现代天然鲸落群落和记录的 476 种鲸目动物化石。我们表明，尸体上存在着以海蛇尾、钻骨蠕虫和基于化学合成的双壳类为主的专门群落，并且该地区的化石记录包括现存和灭绝的深潜喙鲸。同位素测年表明，该地区的鲸鱼坠落事件至少自 530 万年前就已发生。这些发现重塑了对鲸落生态系统的限制和生物地理学的理解，并建立了一些深海海底作为化石档案，用于追踪鲸类在地质时期的进化。

title: Structural basis for chaperone-guided assembly of RNA-induced silencing complex
source: Nature
abstract: The RNA-induced silencing complex (RISC), comprising an Argonaute (AGO) protein and a small RNA, is the central effector in RNA silencing. Small RNAs are loaded onto AGO as bulky duplexes in an HSP70- and HSP90-dependent process1,2,3, but the molecular mechanism remains poorly understood. Here we identify the human AGO–HSP90–p23 complex, which captures AGO in an RNA-free state, termed the AGO maturation complex (AMC). The purified AMC enables RNA loading and AGO folding, faithfully recapitulating de novo RISC assembly. Using cryogenic electron microscopy, we determined the structure of AMC bound to a microRNA duplex. In contrast to its conformation in the RISC, AGO adopts a highly open conformation in the AMC: the N domain and the RNA-binding module (PAZ–MID–PIWI) are fully detached and anchored to opposite sides of the HSP90 dimer, connected solely by the unfolded L1 linker. This arrangement exposes a positively charged cleft that accommodates an RNA duplex. AGO folding is facilitated by a small RNA duplex containing a 5′-terminal phosphate—but not by single-stranded RNAs—revealing a role for the RNA duplex as a chaperone-like cofactor that directs AGO domain assembly. These findings elucidate the RISC assembly mechanism and establish the AMC as a molecular tool for probing optimal RNA features and chemical modifications for the rational design of small interfering RNA therapeutics. Our study also sheds light on how chaperones, together with ligands, can guide the folding of client proteins.
title_zh: 分子伴侣引导RNA诱导沉默复合物组装的结构基础
abstract_zh: RNA 诱导沉默复合物 (RISC) 由 Argonaute (AGO) 蛋白和小 RNA 组成，是 RNA 沉默的核心效应器。小 RNA 在 HSP70 和 HSP90 依赖性过程中作为大双链体加载到 AGO 上1,2,3，但分子机制仍知之甚少。在这里，我们鉴定了人类 AGO-HSP90-p23 复合物，它捕获无 RNA 状态的 AGO，称为 AGO 成熟复合物 (AMC)。纯化的 AMC 能够进行 RNA 加载和 AGO 折叠，忠实地再现了从头 RISC 组装。使用低温电子显微镜，我们确定了与 microRNA 双链体结合的 AMC 的结构。与 RISC 中的构象相反，AGO 在 AMC 中采用高度开放的构象：N 结构域和 RNA 结合模块 (PAZ-MID-PIWI) 完全分离并锚定到 HSP90 二聚体的相对侧，仅通过未折叠的 L1 连接子连接。这种排列暴露了一个容纳 RNA 双链体的带正电荷的裂缝。 AGO 折叠是由含有 5' 末端磷酸盐的小 RNA 双链体促进的，但不是由单链 RNA 促进的，这揭示了 RNA 双链体作为指导 AGO 结构域组装的分子伴侣样辅助因子的作用。这些发现阐明了 RISC 组装机制，并将 AMC 确立为一种分子工具，用于探索最佳 RNA 特征和化学修饰，以合理设计小干扰 RNA 疗法。我们的研究还揭示了分子伴侣如何与配体一起指导客户蛋白的折叠。

title: Giant crustacean of the deep sea steals a trick from bacteria
source: Nature
abstract: Organisms called bathynomids boast a bacterial gene that helps them to regulate their metabolism in the cold depths. Organisms called bathynomids boast a bacterial gene that helps them to regulate their metabolism in the cold depths.
title_zh: 深海巨型甲壳类动物从细菌那里偷走了一招
abstract_zh: 被称为深海生物的生物拥有一种细菌基因，可以帮助它们在寒冷的深处调节新陈代谢。被称为深海生物的生物拥有一种细菌基因，可以帮助它们在寒冷的深处调节新陈代谢。

title: Space-time holograms based on programmable metasurfaces
source: Nature Electronics
abstract: Programmable metasurfaces can be used to generate holograms for imaging and sensing applications. However, creating high-capacity dynamic holograms that are programmable and have high refresh rates remains challenging. Here we report on space-time holograms based on programmable metasurfaces. The approach provides thousands of independent holographic channels working simultaneously at different harmonics. We use spatial-time coding to split a monotone injected wave into multi-harmonic reflected beams, and we develop a fast convergence phase-retrieval algorithm to manipulate the wavefront intensities at each harmonic. Using a programmable metasurface with 6,144 elements, we experimentally show that the approach can generate 62 holographic images (digits and Latin letters) simultaneously. We also show that the platform can create 1,024-channel holograms with spot distribution patterns and that it can be used for multi-target tracking.
title_zh: 基于可编程超表面的时空全息图
abstract_zh: 可编程超表面可用于生成用于成像和传感应用的全息图。然而，创建可编程且具有高刷新率的大容量动态全息图仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们报告基于可编程超表面的时空全息图。该方法提供了数千个独立的全息通道，它们在不同的谐波下同时工作。我们使用时空编码将单调注入波分成多谐波反射光束，并开发了一种快速收敛相位检索算法来操纵每个谐波的波前强度。使用具有 6,144 个元素的可编程超表面，我们通过实验证明该方法可以同时生成 62 个全息图像（数字和拉丁字母）。我们还表明，该平台可以创建具有点分布模式的 1,024 通道全息图，并且可用于多目标跟踪。

title: Strain-insensitive wet-tissue-adhesive biphasic bioelectronics for physicochemical monitoring and adaptive therapy
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Implantable bioelectronics are rapidly advancing towards multifunctional platforms capable of real-time monitoring and therapeutic intervention. However, designing implants with stable, long-term integration with soft, dynamic biological tissues, especially under strain or movement, is still challenging. Here we introduce a stretchable, strain-insensitive, wet-tissue-adhesive elastomer–hydrogel biphasic platform for cross-functional bioelectronics, enabling simultaneous physical sensing, chemical monitoring and neural modulation in vivo. This platform, termed ElHyX, features a molecularly integrated elastomer–hydrogel architecture, functionalized with conductive fillers to achieve mechanical compliance, robust electrical performance and strong tissue adhesion without the need for sutures or additional surface treatments. Using direct ink writing, we fabricated customizable ElHyX-based devices for in vivo electrocardiogram monitoring, glucose sensing and nerve stimulation. A closed-loop system for diabetic management in rats was also developed, where real-time biosignal detection autonomously triggered neuromodulation to regulate blood glucose levels. Overall, our findings establish ElHyX as a versatile, scalable platform for next-generation bioelectronics, capable of continuous physicochemical monitoring and autonomous therapeutic intervention in complex biological environments.
title_zh: 用于理化监测和适应性治疗的应变不敏感湿组织粘附双相生物电子学
abstract_zh: 植入式生物电子学正在迅速发展为能够实时监测和治疗干预的多功能平台。然而，设计与柔软、动态的生物组织稳定、长期整合的植入物，尤其是在应变或运动下，仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们介绍了一种可拉伸、应变不敏感、湿组织粘合弹性体-水凝胶双相平台，用于跨功能生物电子学，可在体内同时进行物理传感、化学监测和神经调节。该平台被称为 ElHyX，具有分子集成的弹性体-水凝胶结构，通过导电填料进行功能化，以实现机械顺应性、强大的电气性能和强大的组织粘附力，无需缝合或额外的表面处理。使用直接墨水书写，我们制造了基于 ElHyX 的可定制设备，用于体内心电图监测、葡萄糖传感和神经刺激。还开发了一种用于大鼠糖尿病管理的闭环系统，其中实时生物信号检测自动触发神经调节来调节血糖水平。总体而言，我们的研究结果将 ElHyX 确立为下一代生物电子学的多功能、可扩展平台，能够在复杂的生物环境中进行连续的理化监测和自主治疗干预。
