title: Operationalizing biodiversity credits to catalyze coral reef management and investment
source: One Earth
abstract: Effective biodiversity conservation for coral reef ecosystems requires both climate mitigation and enhanced management. The current scale of reef management, and the resulting capacity to deliver ecosystem benefits, is limited by a lack of adequate, accessible, sustainable, and scalable funding. Our perspective explores the opportunities and challenges of emerging biodiversity frameworks and nature-based funding instruments (especially biodiversity credits) to catalyze investments needed to increase the scale, nature, and effectiveness of coral reef conservation. Foundational work needed to establish high-integrity coral reef biodiversity credits is under way, including the development of a robust biodiversity accounting framework relevant across a broad range of coral reef habitats and regions. Explicit focus on ecosystem structure, composition, and functions provides a clear direction and rationale for selecting relevant metrics for biodiversity accounting. However, ongoing targeted research and innovation are needed to increase efficacy and efficiency of coral reef management while adapting to changing conditions and demands.
title_zh: 实施生物多样性信贷以促进珊瑚礁管理和投资
abstract_zh: 珊瑚礁生态系统的有效生物多样性保护需要减缓气候变化和加强管理。目前的珊瑚礁管理规模以及由此带来的生态系统效益能力，因缺乏充足、可利用、可持续和可扩展的资金而受到限制。我们的观点探讨了新兴生物多样性框架和基于自然的融资工具（特别是生物多样性信用）的机遇和挑战，以促进扩大珊瑚礁保护的规模、性质和有效性所需的投资。建立高度完整的珊瑚礁生物多样性信用所需的基础工作正在进行中，包括制定与广泛的珊瑚礁栖息地和区域相关的稳健的生物多样性核算框架。明确关注生态系统的结构、组成和功能，为选择生物多样性核算的相关指标提供了明确的方向和理由。然而，需要持续进行有针对性的研究和创新，以提高珊瑚礁管理的效力和效率，同时适应不断变化的条件和需求。

title: SIRT7 regulates dosage compensation and safeguards the female X chromosome
source: Nature
abstract: Sirtuins are deacetylases implicated in stress responses and longevity in mammals1,2. Although their differential impact on disease for the two sexes has been noted3,4,5,6,7, the underlying reasons are unclear. Here, using Sirt7 as a model in mice, we examine the mechanisms leading to sex differences and find that Sirt7−/− female mice have decreased fitness throughout their lifespan. Notably, SIRT7 preferentially localizes to the sex chromosomes. In female individuals, SIRT7 loss affects X-chromosome inactivation, the first arm of dosage compensation that equalizes X-linked gene expression between males and females8,9,10. Xist is overexpressed and gene silencing becomes more efficient. However, SIRT7 loss has greatest impact on the active X (Xa) chromosome. The Xa chromosome becomes hyperacetylated at Lys36 of histone H3, structurally disorganized, prone to DNA damage and overexpressed. Increased Xa-chromosome expression leads to genome imbalance and augmented X-chromosome upregulation—the second arm of dosage compensation that balances X-chromosome versus autosomal gene expression. These data reveal an essential crosstalk between sirtuins and the sex chromosomes, with SIRT7 safeguarding X-chromosome integrity and dosage balance with autosomes. We propose that the sex bias in SIRT7 biology can be explained in part by unequal effects on the sex chromosomes.
title_zh: SIRT7 调节剂量补偿并保护女性 X 染色体
abstract_zh: Sirtuins 是一种脱乙酰酶，与哺乳动物的应激反应和长寿有关1,2。尽管人们已经注意到它们对两性疾病的不同影响3,4,5,6,7，但根本原因尚不清楚。在这里，我们使用 Sirt7 作为小鼠模型，研究了导致性别差异的机制，并发现 Sirt7−/− 雌性小鼠在其整个生命周期中健康状况都在下降。值得注意的是，SIRT7 优先定位于性染色体。在女性个体中，SIRT7 缺失会影响 X 染色体失活，这是平衡男性和女性之间 X 连锁基因表达的剂量补偿的第一部分8,9,10。 Xist 过度表达，基因沉默变得更加有效。然而，SIRT7 缺失对活跃 X (Xa) 染色体的影响最大。 Xa 染色体在组蛋白 H3 的 Lys36 处过度乙酰化，结构混乱，容易发生 DNA 损伤并过度表达。 Xa 染色体表达增加会导致基因组失衡并增强 X 染色体上调，这是平衡 X 染色体与常染色体基因表达的剂量补偿的第二个方面。这些数据揭示了 Sirtuins 和性染色体之间的重要串扰，SIRT7 保护 X 染色体的完整性以及与常染色体的剂量平衡。我们认为 SIRT7 生物学中的性别偏见可以部分解释为对性染色体的不平等影响。

title: Molecular glue degraders of HuR suppress BRAF-mutant colorectal cancer
source: Nature
abstract: BRAF gain-of-function mutations, particularly BRAF(V600E), affect roughly 10% of all patients with colorectal cancer (CRC), and portend poor prognosis with limited therapeutic interventions. BRAF inhibitors such as encorafenib are ineffective due to MAPK pathway reactivation driven by BRAF dimerization. Combined inhibition of BRAF and EGFR, although approved therapies, results in short survival benefits and frequent treatment resistance and relapse1,2,3. Here, through rational chemical library design coupled with parallel proteomic screening, we identified dHuR as a molecular glue degrader of human antigen R (HuR), an RNA-binding protein that drives tumour growth, invasion and therapy resistance. dHuR binds to the CRBN ubiquitin ligase to create a unique benzofuran-tethered composite surface to recruit HuR as a neosubstrate by engaging its β-hairpin G-loop degron, as revealed by the cryo-electron microscopy structure of the ternary complex. dHuR abrogated BRAF expression by inducing its exon 18 skipping, and demonstrated superior suppression of BRAF-mutant CRC tumours including those gaining resistance to BRAF inhibitors. Finally, we performed kinome library CRISPR screening and revealed that inactivation of EGFR or MEK enhanced dHuR cytotoxicity, thus establishing a combinatorial strategy to treat patients with refractory BRAF-mutant CRC.
title_zh: HuR 分子胶降解剂抑制 BRAF 突变结直肠癌
abstract_zh: BRAF 功能获得性突变，尤其是 BRAF(V600E)，影响大约 10% 的结直肠癌 (CRC) 患者，并且预示着治疗干预措施有限的预后不良。由于 BRAF 二聚化驱动的 MAPK 通路重新激活，BRAF 抑制剂（例如 encorafenib）无效。 BRAF 和 EGFR 的联合抑制虽然已获得批准，但会导致短期的生存获益以及频繁的治疗耐药和复发 1,2,3。在这里，通过合理的化学文库设计结合平行蛋白质组学筛选，我们确定 dHuR 是人类抗原 R (HuR) 的分子胶降解剂，HuR 是一种驱动肿瘤生长、侵袭和治疗抵抗的 RNA 结合蛋白。 dHuR 与 CRBN 泛素连接酶结合，形成独特的苯并呋喃系留复合表面，通过结合其 β-发夹 G 环降解决定子来招募 HuR 作为新底物，如三元复合物的冷冻电子显微镜结构所示。 dHuR 通过诱导其外显子 18 跳跃来消除 BRAF 表达，并表现出对 BRAF 突变的 CRC 肿瘤（包括对 BRAF 抑制剂产生耐药性的肿瘤）的卓越抑制作用。最后，我们进行了激酶组文库 CRISPR 筛选，发现 EGFR 或 MEK 失活增强了 dHuR 细胞毒性，从而建立了治疗难治性 BRAF 突变 CRC 患者的组合策略。

title: Interfacial ion depletion at high concentration guides electrolyte design for aqueous aluminum-iodine batteries
source: Joule
abstract: Concentrated electrolytes are widely used to stabilize aqueous multivalent batteries, with the assumption that more salt provides better protection. Yang et al. show that this is not always the case: beyond a critical concentration, functional cations become trapped in the bulk by chloride-coordinated aluminum complexes and fail to reach the electrode interface. By identifying an optimal concentration window, the authors enable a durable, high-rate aqueous aluminum-iodine battery and offer a design principle for future multivalent battery electrolytes.
title_zh: 高浓度界面离子损耗指导水系铝碘电池的电解质设计
abstract_zh: 浓电解质被广泛用于稳定水性多价电池，假设更多的盐可以提供更好的保护。杨等人。表明情况并非总是如此：超过临界浓度，功能性阳离子会被氯化物配位的铝络合物捕获在本体中，并且无法到达电极界面。通过确定最佳浓度窗口，作者实现了耐用、高倍率水性铝碘电池，并为未来的多价电池电解质提供了设计原理。

title: Decoupled and non-volatile prestress programming of tensegrity metamaterials enables persistent mechanical function
source: Matter
abstract: Yu et al. develop a pufferfish-inspired tensegrity platform that uses humidity to program internal prestress and a mechanical lock to store it as non-volatile memory. Once set, the structure maintains its mechanical state without continuous energy input, enabling persistent functions including timed release, impact protection, and adaptive load bearing.
title_zh: 张拉整体超材料的解耦和非易失性预应力编程可实现持久的机械功能
abstract_zh: 于等人。开发一个受河豚启发的张拉整体平台，该平台使用湿度对内部预应力进行编程，并使用机械锁将其存储为非易失性存储器。一旦设定，该结构无需连续能量输入即可保持其机械状态，从而实现持久功能，包括定时释放、冲击保护和自适应承载。

title: Light-induced quantum friction of carbon nanotubes in water
source: Nature
abstract: Friction slows down moving objects at both macroscopic and microscopic scales1. At the electronic level, quantum friction describes direct transfer of momentum between a liquid and the electrons of a solid2. Owing to its microscopic nature, this phenomenon remains experimentally challenging to capture3. Here we show that near-infrared fluorescent single-walled carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) exhibit light-induced quantum friction in water. It is measured by observing an excitation-power-dependent linear decrease of around 50% in the diffusion constants of functionalized SWCNTs in aqueous solution. This effect disappears when excitons are localized, as in the case of SWCNTs with quantum defects. We further show that the chemical manipulation of exciton concentration by molecules that increase or decrease SWCNT fluorescence also modulates the diffusion constant by up to a factor of 2. Optical pump terahertz (THz) probe spectroscopy shows an instantaneous response (around 30 cm−1) that we assign to direct exciton–water coupling in the range of water Debye modes. It is followed by an increasing (>100 ps) response in the range of intermolecular translational modes of the hydrogen bond network of water (>100 cm−1), resembling heating. Classical molecular dynamics simulations further support a mechanism in which the fluctuating dipole moments of excitons create frictional forces. These findings establish light-induced quantum friction between excitons in SWCNTs and water and show that electronic excitations can be used to control nanoscale motion and fluid properties.
title_zh: 碳纳米管在水中的光诱导量子摩擦
abstract_zh: 摩擦力会在宏观和微观尺度上减慢移动物体的速度1。在电子层面，量子摩擦描述了液体和固体电子之间动量的直接传递2。由于其微观性质，这种现象在实验上仍然难以捕获3。在这里，我们展示了近红外荧光单壁碳纳米管（SWCNT）在水中表现出光诱导的量子摩擦。它是通过观察水溶液中官能化 SWCNT 的扩散常数随激发功率线性下降约 50% 来测量的。当激子局域化时，这种效应就会消失，就像具有量子缺陷的单壁碳纳米管一样。我们进一步表明，通过增加或减少单壁碳纳米管荧光的分子对激子浓度的化学操纵也将扩散常数调节高达2倍。光泵太赫兹（THz）探针光谱显示出瞬时响应（约30 cm−1），我们将其归因于水德拜模式范围内的直接激子-水耦合。接下来是水氢键网络 (>100 cm−1) 的分子间平移模式范围内的增加 (>100 ps) 响应，类似于加热。经典分子动力学模拟进一步支持激子波动偶极矩产生摩擦力的机制。这些发现建立了单壁碳纳米管中的激子和水之间的光诱导量子摩擦，并表明电子激发可用于控制纳米级运动和流体特性。

title: 5f metal-incorporated 2D clusterphene: Enabling high-efficiency photocatalysis through continuous planar carrier migration
source: Matter
abstract: Integrating uranyl units with polyoxoniobates at the subnanoscale creates a 2D UNbO clusterphene with a continuous carrier-migration path that minimizes electron-hole recombination, enabling efficient visible-light-driven alkene cleavage and paving the way for advanced 5f metal-based heterogeneous photocatalysts.
title_zh: 5f金属掺入的2D簇吩：通过连续平面载流子迁移实现高效光催化
abstract_zh: 在亚纳米尺度上将铀酰单元与多氧铌酸盐集成，形成具有连续载流子迁移路径的2D UNbO簇吩，可最大限度地减少电子-空穴复合，实现高效的可见光驱动的烯烃裂解，并为先进的5f金属基异质光催化剂铺平道路。

title: Copper-tailored d-p-π multi-orbital coupling in sulfurized polyaniline enables ultralong cycling aqueous sulfur batteries
source: Matter
abstract: The practical application of sulfur-based batteries is severely limited by factors such as slow reaction kinetics and structural collapse. This work successfully constructs a highly conductive and stable copper-modified sulfide polyaniline cathode by introducing d-p-π multi-orbital coupling using copper. Coupled with a Zn anode, the pouch cell delivers stable power output under harsh conditions, offering a new orbital engineering route for durable sulfur-based batteries.
title_zh: 硫化聚苯胺中的铜定制d-p-π多轨道耦合可实现超长循环水性硫电池
abstract_zh: 硫基电池的实际应用受到反应动力学缓慢和结构崩溃等因素的严重限制。该工作通过利用铜引入d-p-π多轨道耦合，成功构建了高导电且稳定的铜改性硫化物聚苯胺阴极。与锌阳极相结合，软包电池可以在恶劣条件下提供稳定的功率输出，为耐用的硫基电池提供了新的轨道工程路线。

title: H2S donor-pretreated vascular endothelial cell-derived extracellular vesicles for multi-pathway vascular repair
source: Matter
abstract: We report a translatable EVs nanoplatform for coordinated vascular repair by simply stimulating vascular endothelial cells with a hydrogen sulfide (H2S) donor in vitro. These EVs target injured arteries, reduce local inflammation, inhibit neointimal hyperplasia, and promote endothelial regeneration, while avoiding toxicity risks of systemic H2S delivery. In a rat carotid artery injury model, these EVs achieve effective vascular repair and good biosafety, offering a promising strategy for treating vascular diseases.
title_zh: H2S供体预处理的血管内皮细胞来源的细胞外囊泡用于多途径血管修复
abstract_zh: 我们报告了一种可翻译的 EV 纳米平台，通过在体外用硫化氢 (H2S) 供体简单地刺激血管内皮细胞来协调血管修复。这些 EV 以受损动脉为目标，减少局部炎症，抑制内膜增生，促进内皮再生，同时避免全身 H2S 输送的毒性风险。在大鼠颈动脉损伤模型中，这些EV实现了有效的血管修复和良好的生物安全性，为治疗血管疾病提供了一种有前途的策略。

title: Unexpectedly large entropic barrier controls bond rearrangements in vitrimers
source: Matter
abstract: This work reveals that rare, highly specific bond geometries create a dominant entropic barrier for bond exchange in vitrimers, redefining how dynamic network rearrangements are understood and enabling more predictive design of dynamic materials.
title_zh: 出乎意料的大熵势垒控制了玻璃体中的键重排
abstract_zh: 这项工作揭示了罕见的、高度特异性的键几何形状为 vitrimer 中的键交换创造了主要的熵势垒，重新定义了动态网络重排的理解方式，并实现了动态材料的更具预测性的设计。

title: Watching catalysis take a walk
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Electrocatalytic surfaces are dynamic, but few methods correlate nanometre-scale current with structure across large areas. Interferometric electro-optical microscopy now images electrochemical currents at 50 nm and 10 ms resolution, revealing that hydrogen evolution on MoS2 initiates and propagates along specific crystallographic directions.
title_zh: 观看催化散步
abstract_zh: 电催化表面是动态的，但很少有方法将纳米级电流与大面积的结构联系起来。干涉电光显微镜现在可以以 50 nm 和 10 ms 的分辨率对电化学电流进行成像，揭示 MoS2 上的析氢起始并沿着特定的晶体方向传播。

title: Interface-mediated crystallization enables PEDOT:PSS-free all-perovskite tandems with 29.1% efficiency and enhanced durability
source: Joule
abstract: Replacing hygroscopic PEDOT:PSS with a phenothiazine-functionalized interface suppresses metastable phase segregation and directs Sn-Pb perovskite crystallization. A dual-anchor interlayer can form a robust interconnection in tandem devices. The PEDOT:PSS-free monolithic all-perovskite tandem achieves a record efficiency of 29.1% and long-term stability, demonstrating that precise interface design simultaneously enables high efficiency and durability.
title_zh: 界面介导的结晶使不含 PEDOT:PSS 的全钙钛矿串联材料具有 29.1% 的效率和增强的耐用性
abstract_zh: 用吩噻嗪功能化界面取代吸湿性 PEDOT:PSS 可抑制亚稳态相偏析并引导 Sn-Pb 钙钛矿结晶。双锚中间层可以在串联器件中形成稳健的互连。不含 PEDOT:PSS 的单片全钙钛矿串联器件实现了 29.1% 的创纪录效率和长期稳定性，表明精确的界面设计同时实现了高效率和耐用性。

title: Double‐Sided Mechanical Interlocking Enables Soft‐Rigid Conductive Interfaces With a Record High Toughness for Flexible Electronics
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The pronounced mismatch between polymeric electrodes and metallic components hinders the formation of robust electrical contacts. While most approaches rely on chemical design to strengthen interfacial interactions, we present a double‐sided mechanical interlocking strategy that provides both stability and adaptability. A conductive fabric scaffold bridges polymers and metals, with adhesives sequentially applied to both sides. The adhesive infiltrates and encapsulates scaffold fibers, forming a thread–hole adhesion that can only be disrupted by bulk failure. This mechanism achieves a record high interfacial toughness of 730 J m
                    −
                    2
                    between conductive elastomer and copper using commercial silver pastes. Peeling tests show delamination occurs between silver paste and copper, indicating even higher toughness could be obtained with better‐performing products of conductive adhesive. Notably, the interface stability surpasses that of the electrode itself, remaining intact even when the electrode fails. The design is broadly compatible with elastomeric or hydrogel matrices and with diverse commercial adhesives. It enables the construction of reliable epidermal electronics and hydrogel‐based devices. Overall, this interlocking strategy provides a versatile platform for integrating soft and rigid conductors in hybrid electronic systems.
title_zh: 双面机械联锁使软刚性导电接口具有创纪录的高韧性，适用于柔性电子产品
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    聚合物电极和金属部件之间的明显不匹配阻碍了牢固电接触的形成。虽然大多数方法依赖化学设计来加强界面相互作用，但我们提出了一种双面机械联锁策略，可提供稳定性和适应性。导电织物支架桥接聚合物和金属，两侧依次涂有粘合剂。粘合剂渗透并封装支架纤维，形成螺纹孔粘附，这种粘附只能通过整体破坏来破坏。该机制实现了 730 J m 的创纪录高界面韧性
                    -
                    2
                    使用商业银浆在导电弹性体和铜之间进行连接。剥离测试显示银浆和铜之间发生分层，表明性能更好的导电胶产品可以获得更高的韧性。值得注意的是，界面稳定性超过了电极本身，即使电极失效也能保持完好。该设计与弹性体或水凝胶基质以及各种商业粘合剂广泛兼容。它能够构建可靠的表皮电子设备和基于水凝胶的设备。总体而言，这种互锁策略为在混合电子系统中集成软导体和硬导体提供了一个多功能平台。

title: Crystallization Pathway Optimization and High‐Index Facet Stabilization for Perovskite Photovoltaics
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Perovskite solar cells (PSCs) face a critical challenge in balancing high power conversion efficiency (PCE) with operational stability, largely governed by the crystallization kinetics and facet configuration of perovskite films. Here, we report a kinetically segmented crystallization strategy mediated by a conformationally preorganized macromolecular regulator, cellulose 2,4,6‐trichlorophenylcarbamate (3Cl‐NC). Through multidentate coordination, 3Cl‐NC establishes localized precursor‐rich microenvironments that promote heterogeneous nucleation. During thermal annealing, this association transitions into a thermally activated dynamic coordination state that retards long‐range precursor transport while maintaining local availability for controlled crystal growth. This segmented regulation suppresses metastable δ‐phase accumulation and facilitates photoactive α‐phase formation. Furthermore, 3Cl‐NC thermodynamically stabilizes the high‐Miller‐index (210) orientation, establishing a synergistic architecture that intrinsically enhances lattice structural stability. Consequently, the resulting perovskite films exhibit higher phase purity, relieved residual stress, and suppressed ion migration, enabling devices to achieve a champion PCE of 26.59% (certified 26.29%) with improved long‐term stability.
title_zh: 钙钛矿光伏的结晶路径优化和高折射率面稳定
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）在平衡高功率转换效率（PCE）与运行稳定性方面面临着严峻的挑战，这在很大程度上取决于钙钛矿薄膜的结晶动力学和晶面配置。在这里，我们报告了一种由构象预组织大分子调节剂纤维素2,4,6-三氯苯基氨基甲酸酯（3Cl-NC）介导的动力学分段结晶策略。通过多齿配位，3Cl-NC 建立了局部富含前体的微环境，促进异质成核。在热退火过程中，这种缔合转变为热激活的动态配位态，延迟了长程前体传输，同时保持受控晶体生长的局部可用性。这种分段调节抑制亚稳态δ相积累并促进光敏α相形成。此外，3Cl-NC 热力学稳定了高米勒指数 (210) 取向，建立了一种协同结构，从本质上增强了晶格结构稳定性。因此，所得钙钛矿薄膜表现出更高的相纯度、减轻的残余应力和抑制的离子迁移，使器件能够实现 26.59%（认证为 26.29%）的冠军 PCE，并提高长期稳定性。

title: Scalable hierarchical textile fibers toward personalized wearable atmospheric water harvesting
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Sorption-based atmospheric water harvesting (AWH) offers a decentralized, sustainable solution to global freshwater scarcity, enabling clean water in diverse environments. However, translating ideal sorption properties of small-scale materials into practical, large-scale systems faces critical kinetic challenges. Here, we conceptualize a hierarchical textile fiber for wearable AWH, addressing the scaling limitations of traditional sorbents. These fibers feature an open-pore surface topology and internal hierarchical pore structures, which accelerate surface vapor liquefaction and subsequent water transport, demonstrating exceptional water uptake and rapid sorption kinetics across varying relative humidity (RH). When woven into textiles, the fibers maintain efficient vapor diffusion through their macroporous, breathable architecture, achieving a 3- to 10-fold improvement over traditional sorbents at scale. We engineered a wearable prototype combining the AWH textile with a portable collector, achieving 3.76 to 7.45 liters
                    water
                    per kilogram
                    sorbent
                    per day and collecting 410 to 894 milliliters across 20 to 80% RH. By overcoming kinetic limitations, our study advances AWH toward scalability and wearability with implications for global water sustainability.
title_zh: 可扩展的分层纺织纤维用于个性化可穿戴大气水收集
abstract_zh:
基于吸附的大气水收集 (AWH) 为全球淡水短缺问题提供了一种分散的、可持续的解决方案，从而在不同的环境中提供清洁水。然而，将小尺寸材料的理想吸附特性转化为实际的大规模系统面临着关键的动力学挑战。在这里，我们概念化了用于可穿戴 AWH 的分层纺织纤维，解决了传统吸附剂的缩放限制。这些纤维具有开孔表面拓扑结构和内部分层孔隙结构，可加速表面蒸气液化和随后的水传输，在不同的相对湿度 (RH) 下表现出出色的吸水性和快速吸附动力学。当编织成纺织品时，纤维通过其大孔、透气的结构保持有效的蒸汽扩散，与传统吸附剂相比，在规模上实现了 3 至 10 倍的改进。我们设计了一款将 AWH 纺织品与便携式收集器相结合的可穿戴原型，容量达到 3.76 至 7.45 升
                    水
                    每公斤
                    吸附剂
                    每天收集 410 至 894 毫升，相对湿度为 20% 至 80%。通过克服动力学限制，我们的研究将 AWH 推向可扩展性和耐磨性，并对全球水的可持续性产生影响。

title: Multiphase nanocomposite prelithiation agents for service life lithium replenishment in Si-based Li-ion batteries
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: High–energy density lithium-ion batteries (LIBs) using Si-based anodes are expected to dominate the lithium-ion power battery market in the near future. However, the Si anode suffers from continuous capacity degradation during initial and subsequent cycles. Prelithiation agents can effectively replenish lithium and enhance battery capacity, while currently investigated cathode prelithiation agents generally only prelithiate at the initial cycle. Herein, we have developed a multiphase nanocomposite prelithiation agent (MNCP) on the basis of two distinct mechanisms—oxygen oxidation and conversion reaction—aiming to provide service life lithium replenishment for Si-based LIBs. MNCP presents several tunable delithiation plateaus to prelithiate anodes in the initial and extending cycles with exceeding 600 milliampere-hours per gram without gas generation. This work emphasizes a mechanism-based design strategy for functional prelithiation agents, aiming to comprehensively optimize the performance of advanced LIBs.
title_zh: 用于硅基锂离子电池使用寿命补锂的多相纳米复合材料预锂化剂
abstract_zh: 使用硅基阳极的高能量密度锂离子电池（LIB）预计将在不久的将来主导锂离子动力电池市场。然而，硅阳极在初始和随后的循环过程中会遭受持续的容量下降。预锂化剂可以有效补充锂并增强电池容量，而目前研究的正极预锂化剂通常仅在初始循环时进行预锂化。在此，我们基于两种不同的机制（氧氧化和转化反应）开发了一种多相纳米复合材料预锂化剂（MNCP），旨在为硅基锂离子电池的使用寿命提供锂补充。 MNCP 提供了几个可调的脱锂平台，可以在初始循环和扩展循环中对阳极进行预锂化，每克电流超过 600 毫安时，且不会产生气体。这项工作强调基于机制的功能性预锂化剂设计策略，旨在全面优化先进锂离子电池的性能。

title: Far-red chlorophyll d clusters extend photosystem I absorption toward the red limit
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Oxygenic photosynthesis is usually limited to visible light, but the marine cyanobacterium
                    Acaryochloris marina
                    pushes this boundary by harvesting far-red photons with chlorophyll d. The best-studied strain, MBIC11017, unexpectedly lacks low-energy chlorophylls (“red forms”) in photosystem I, limiting absorption beyond 740 nanometers. Here, we show that another strain,
                    A. marina
                    NIES-2412, has evolved a strategy to absorb far-red photons up to 760 nanometers. Combining time-resolved fluorescence spectroscopy with cryo–electron microscopy at 2.64-angstrom resolution, we identify two distinct classes of chlorophyll d red forms in its photosystem I. One class originates from classical charge-transfer–exciton mixing, while the other arises purely from excitonic interactions. Mapping all 96 chlorophylls d reveals the precise pigments responsible for these far-red states. We also uncover a previously unreported subunit, PsaX2, which stabilizes the photosystem I complex and shapes pigment geometry and energetics to enable the formation of red forms. Last, we show that the protein modifications responsible for binding and tuning these red forms are widespread across the
                    Acaryochloris
                    genus but not within the model MBIC11017 strain. Far-red photons lie close to the energetic limit of oxygenic photosynthesis; their efficient use therefore requires fine-tuning of the photosynthetic machinery. To our knowledge, our findings provide the structural and mechanistic basis of one of the most red-shifted photosystem I complexes identified to date, highlighting a distinct adaptive strategy in far-red light environments and offering design principles for extending photosynthesis in crops into the infrared.
title_zh: 远红叶绿素 d 簇将光系统 I 吸收扩展到红色极限
abstract_zh:
产氧光合作用通常仅限于可见光，但海洋蓝藻
                    滨螨螨
                    通过用叶绿素 d 收集远红光子来突破这一界限。研究最充分的菌株 MBIC11017 出人意料地在光系统 I 中缺乏低能叶绿素（“红色形式”），限制了 740 纳米以上的吸收。在这里，我们展示了另一种菌株，
                    A. 玛丽娜
                    NIES-2412 已经发展出一种吸收高达 760 纳米远红光子的策略。将时间分辨荧光光谱与 2.64 埃分辨率的冷冻电子显微镜相结合，我们在其光系统 I 中识别出两类不同类型的叶绿素 d 红色形式。一类源自经典的电荷转移激子混合，而另一类纯粹由激子相互作用产生。绘制所有 96 种叶绿素 d 的图谱揭示了造成这些远红状态的精确色素。我们还发现了一个以前未报道的亚基 PsaX2，它可以稳定光系统 I 复合物并塑造颜料几何形状和能量，从而能够形成红色形式。最后，我们表明负责结合和调节这些红色形式的蛋白质修饰在整个人类中广泛存在。
                    螨绿藻
                    属但不在模型 MBIC11017 菌株内。远红光子接近含氧光合作用的能量极限；因此，它们的有效利用需要对光合机制进行微调。据我们所知，我们的发现提供了结构和机制基础

title: PM2.5 air pollution inequities in the US by sector and state: Past trajectories and future directions
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
On average in the United States (US), low-income communities and communities of color face disproportionate burdens of air pollution and associated health impacts. Much of the effort to reduce these disparities will need to occur at the state level, through the targeting of specific emission sources and exposures. We present the first analysis of exposure disparities in the US that systematically investigates temporal trends, disaggregated by economic sector and state. Our approach combines a recently released time-series (2002 to 2019) emission inventory (EQUATES) with a computationally efficient air pollution model (InMAP Source-Receptor Matrix) to predict annual average exposure to ambient PM
                    2.5
                    in each census tract in the contiguous US, disaggregated by emission sector. We find that, in general, absolute disparities have decreased, but relative disparities remain largely unchanged. This pattern holds for some sectors (e.g., transportation and electricity) but not others (e.g., disparities are largely unchanged for agriculture emissions and are generally increasing for residential and cooking emissions). Some state-sector combinations exhibit distinct patterns (e.g., most-recent disparities in New York are dominated by cooking and in Florida by construction). Of all sectors, industrial emissions contribute the largest exposures and the greatest exposure disparities. Agriculture and residential energy use are also large contributors to most-recent disparities, underscoring that inequities persist in sectors historically subject to less regulatory focus. Overall, our findings reveal how disparities have changed during 2002 to 2019 for each sector-state combination and elucidate which sectors each state should focus on to address recent disparities.
title_zh: 美国 PM2.5 空气污染不平等（按部门和州划分）：过去的轨迹和未来的方向
abstract_zh:
平均而言，在美国，低收入社区和有色人种社区面临着不成比例的空气污染负担和相关的健康影响。减少这些差异的大部分努力需要在州一级进行，通过针对特定的排放源和暴露进行。我们首次对美国的暴露差异进行了分析，系统地调查了按经济部门和州分类的时间趋势。我们的方法将最近发布的时间序列（2002 年至 2019 年）排放清单 (EQUATES) 与计算高效的空气污染模型（InMAP 源-受体矩阵）相结合，以预测环境 PM 的年平均暴露量
                    2.5
                    美国本土每个人口普查区的数据，按排放部门分类。我们发现，总体而言，绝对差距有所缩小，但相对差距基本保持不变。这种模式适用于某些行业（例如交通和电力），但不适用于其他行业（例如，农业排放的差距基本上没有变化，而住宅和烹饪排放的差距通常在增加）。一些国有部门组合表现出不同的模式（例如，纽约最近的差距主要是烹饪，而佛罗里达州的差距主要是建筑）。在所有部门中，工业排放的暴露量最大，暴露差异也最大。农业和住宅能源使用也是造成最近差异的重要因素，这凸显了历史上受限制的部门中持续存在不平等现象。

title: Lymph node microenvironment remodeling unlocks local antibody-mediated B cell depletion
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Lymph nodes (LNs) can act as reservoirs in CD20
                    +
                    B cell malignancies and autoimmune diseases. Although anti-CD20 monoclonal antibodies (mAbs) have substantially improved patient outcomes, relapse and disease progression remain frequent, underscoring critical limitations that constrain their full therapeutic potential. Here, we reveal that the LN microenvironment is an important modulator of anti-CD20 mAb efficacy. Within LNs, malignant B cells can exhibit a sessile, tissue-retained behavior, which limits their access to the blood circulation required for efficient systemic antibody-mediated cell depletion. Although LN B cells are spatially segregated from FcγR
                    +
                    effector cells, remodeling of the LN microenvironment through irradiation enabled anti-CD20 mAb-mediated B cell depletion. Our findings identify LN architecture as a structural barrier to depleting antibody-based therapies and highlight tissue remodeling as a strategy to enhance therapeutic responses within lymphoid organs.
title_zh: 淋巴结微环境重塑解锁局部抗体介导的 B 细胞耗竭
abstract_zh:
淋巴结 (LN) 可充当 CD20 的储存库
                    +
                    B细胞恶性肿瘤和自身免疫性疾病。尽管抗 CD20 单克隆抗体 (mAb) 显着改善了患者的治疗效果，但复发和疾病进展仍然频繁，这凸显了限制其全部治疗潜力的关键局限性。在这里，我们揭示了 LN 微环境是抗 CD20 mAb 功效的重要调节剂。在 LN 内，恶性 B 细胞可以表现出固着、组织保留的行为，这限制了它们进入有效的全身抗体介导的细胞耗竭所需的血液循环。尽管 LNB 细胞与 FcγR 在空间上分离
                    +
                    效应细胞，通过辐射重塑 LN 微环境，从而实现抗 CD20 mAb 介导的 B 细胞耗竭。我们的研究结果将淋巴结结构确定为消耗抗体疗法的结构障碍，并强调组织重塑是增强淋巴器官内治疗反应的策略。

title: Restoration of endogenous electric fields with a glucose-powered symbiotic bioabsorbable bandage for diabetic wound healing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Endogenous electric fields (EFs) are essential for tissue regeneration but are diminished under hyperglycemia conditions, thereby impeding diabetic wound healing. Here, we report a biodegradable, glucose-powered electronic fabric bandage (GEB) that restores wound-edge electrical fields and enables closed-loop wound healing. To avoid compromising clinical applicability, we integrated all components into a soft, lightweight, and breathable bandage design to replace the traditional bulky electrical stimulator design. We also show the universal glucose-powered electricity generation and therapeutic functions of the electronic bandage across species and organs in diabetic wound models. In diabetic mouse wounds, porcine skin defects, and intestinal injury, the bandage uses endogenous glucose for power generation, thereby reducing local glucose levels and restoring the endogenous EF that guided cell migration, reprogrammed macrophage polarization, and promoted angiogenesis, to accelerate wound healing. These findings should establish an “endogenous glucose-powered symbiotic bioelectronics” paradigm for next-generation bioelectronic medicine.
title_zh: 用葡萄糖驱动的共生生物可吸收绷带恢复内源电场以促进糖尿病伤口愈合
abstract_zh: 内源电场（EF）对于组织再生至关重要，但在高血糖条件下会减弱，从而阻碍糖尿病伤口愈合。在这里，我们报告了一种可生物降解的、葡萄糖驱动的电子织物绷带（GEB），它可以恢复伤口边缘电场并实现闭环伤口愈合。为了避免影响临床适用性，我们将所有组件集成到柔软、轻便、透气的绷带设计中，以取代传统笨重的电刺激器设计。我们还展示了糖尿病伤口模型中跨物种和器官的电子绷带的通用葡萄糖供电发电和治疗功能。在糖尿病小鼠伤口、猪皮肤缺损和肠道损伤中，该绷带利用内源性葡萄糖发电，从而降低局部葡萄糖水平并恢复引导细胞迁移、重新编程巨噬细胞极化和促进血管生成的内源性EF，从而加速伤口愈合。这些发现应该为下一代生物电子医学建立“内源性葡萄糖驱动的共生生物电子学”范例。

title: Bacterial extracellular vesicles promote membrane repair and tolerance to polymyxin B
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Bacterial extracellular vesicles (EVs) are nanosized lipid structures released under stress, yet their interactions with antibiotics remain poorly understood. We tracked real-time interactions between
                    Escherichia coli
                    , EVs, and fluorescent polymyxin B (Pmb) using single-cell imaging and cytometric approaches. EVs rapidly sequester Pmb, facilitating its removal from bacterial envelopes, and act as plugs by adhering to or fusing with damaged sites. Pmb triggers early Cpx/σE- and Rcs-dependent stress responses, linked to a ∼25% reduction in cell surface area, a ∼50-fold increase in vesiculation, and remodeling of membrane properties. After an adaptive lag phase, sustained EV release supports detoxification and envelope repair, enabling growth recovery and transient tolerance to Pmb. Together, these findings reveal previously unrecognized functions of EVs in membrane repair and tolerance to membrane-active antibiotics.
title_zh: 细菌细胞外囊泡促进膜修复和对多粘菌素 B 的耐受性
abstract_zh:
细菌细胞外囊泡（EV）是在压力下释放的纳米级脂质结构，但它们与抗生素的相互作用仍然知之甚少。我们跟踪了之间的实时互动
                    大肠杆菌
                    、EV 和荧光多粘菌素 B (Pmb)，使用单细胞成像和细胞计数方法。 EV 可以快速隔离 Pmb，促进其从细菌包膜中去除，并通过粘附或与受损位点融合来充当塞子。 Pmb 触发早期 Cpx/σE 和 Rcs 依赖性应激反应，与细胞表面积减少约 25%、囊泡形成增加约 50 倍以及膜特性重塑有关。经过适应性滞后阶段后，持续的 EV 释放支持解毒和包膜修复，从而实现生长恢复和对 Pmb 的短暂耐受。总之，这些发现揭示了 EV 在膜修复和对膜活性抗生素的耐受性方面以前未被认识的功能。

title: Metasurface-enabled astronomical polarimetry
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: In the past decade or so, metasurface optical components have received considerable scientific and industrial interest. The miniaturization afforded by metasurfaces could benefit astronomy in particular, which is an often-cited potential application area for metasurfaces. However, few developed examples in which metasurface components offer a unique benefit to astronomical instrumentation—substantiated by the production of scientific data—have been shown. Here, we present the Solar Imaging Metasurface Polarimeter (SIMPol), a first-of-its-kind telescope for snapshot imaging polarimetry of the sun enabled by a high-performance metasurface polarization-analyzing grating, which provides for single element, snapshot imaging polarimetry. We demonstrate SIMPol’s integration into a major observatory telescope facility and the characterization of Zeeman signatures of solar magnetism. This work—among the first to demonstrate an advantage presented by metasurface optics to a real application in astronomical instrumentation—heralds the application of metasurfaces and emergent nanophotonic technologies in astronomy more broadly.
title_zh: 支持超表面的天文偏振测量
abstract_zh: 在过去十年左右的时间里，超表面光学元件引起了科学和工业界的广泛关注。超表面提供的小型化尤其有利于天文学，这是超表面经常被引用的潜在应用领域。然而，很少有开发的例子表明超表面组件为天文仪器提供了独特的好处（通过科学数据的产生得到证实）。在这里，我们推出了太阳成像超表面偏振计 (SIMPol)，这是一款用于太阳快照成像偏振测量的同类望远镜，由高性能超表面偏振分析光栅实现，可提供单元件快照成像偏振测量。我们展示了 SIMPol 与主要天文望远镜设施的集成以及太阳磁性塞曼特征的表征。这项工作是第一个展示超表面光学在天文仪器实际应用中所带来的优势的工作，预示着超表面和新兴纳米光子技术在天文学中更广泛的应用。

title: Programmed oral delivery of peptide therapeutics for multiorgan targeting in metabolic disorders of hyperglycemia and hyperuricemia
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Systemic metabolic disorders such as diabetes and hyperuricemia demand multiorgan therapeutic intervention, yet single-target therapies often fail to restore homeostasis. Here, we present an orally administered, multistage-targeted nanoplatform (P1P2NPs) for the sequential delivery of therapeutic peptides to distinct organs. P1P2NPs is composed of a bioresponsive polymer poly(β-amino ester)-disulfide bond-poly(carboxybetaine) (PAE-SS-PCB), 1,2-distearoyl-
                    sn
                    -glycero-3-phosphoethanolamine-block poly(carboxybetaine) (DSPE-PCB) and Eudragit L100-55, designed to release peptide P2 (Val-Pro-Tyr-Pro-Gln) in the intestine for dipeptidyl peptidase-IV (DPP-IV) inhibition, while hepatic-targeted peptide P1(Pro-Pro-Lys-Asn-Trp) is selectively liberated in the liver to suppress xanthine oxidase (XOD). Fabricated through sequential emulsification and layer-by-layer assembly, P1P2NPs exhibit spatiotemporal control over drug release, enabling precise modulation of intestinal and hepatic metabolic pathways. In a murine model of diabetic-hyperuricemia comorbidity, the nanoplatform demonstrated synergistic efficacy by normalizing glucose and uric acid levels through multiorgan targeting. This work establishes a paradigm for spatially controlled peptide delivery, offering a versatile strategy for treating complex metabolic diseases.
title_zh: 针对高血糖和高尿酸血症代谢性疾病的多器官靶向肽治疗的程序化口服给药
abstract_zh:
糖尿病和高尿酸血症等全身代谢性疾病需要多器官治疗干预，但单靶点治疗往往无法恢复体内平衡。在这里，我们提出了一种口服多级靶向纳米平台（P1P2NP），用于将治疗肽顺序递送到不同的器官。 P1P2NPs由生物响应性聚合物聚(β-氨基酯)-二硫键-聚(羧基甜菜碱)(PAE-SS-PCB)、1,2-二硬脂酰-
                    锡
                    -甘油-3-磷酸乙醇胺嵌段聚羧基甜菜碱 (DSPE-PCB) 和 Eudragit L100-55，旨在在肠道中释放肽 P2 (Val-Pro-Tyr-Pro-Gln) 以抑制二肽基肽酶-IV (DPP-IV)，同时在肝脏中选择性地释放靶向肝脏的肽 P1(Pro-Pro-Lys-Asn-Trp) 以抑制黄嘌呤氧化酶（XOD）。 P1P2NPs 通过顺序乳化和逐层组装制成，具有对药物释放的时空控制，能够精确调节肠道和肝脏代谢途径。在糖尿病高尿酸血症合并症的小鼠模型中，纳米平台通过多器官靶向使葡萄糖和尿酸水平正常化，表现出协同功效。这项工作建立了空间控制肽递送的范例，为治疗复杂的代谢疾病提供了一种多功能策略。

title: Marine population-genetic inferences reveal stronger oceanic structure in protists than Archaeplastida (plants) and Metazoa (animals)
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: While the biogeographic patterns of animals and plants are well defined, the distribution of the microbial eukaryotic world remains contentious. Classically, protists were assumed to be cosmopolitan, dispersing everywhere with little geographic constraint. We tested this hypothesis by compiling 88 marine cytochrome oxidase subunit I metabarcoding studies to perform a global population-genetic analysis. We uncovered a fundamental biogeographic divide: most animal (Metazoa) and plant (Archaeplastida) phyla have haplotype diversity that is strictly concentrated within specific ocean basins, while most protist phyla share identical haplotypes across multiple, distant oceans. The combination of large geographic ranges with moderate among-ocean genetic differentiation in protists is inconsistent with strict historical cosmopolitanism and is compatible with high connectivity and range expansion dynamics, including, but not limited to, recent colonization events. Our findings provide a unified population-genetic perspective on marine eukaryotic biogeography and refine current views of microbial dispersal at ocean-basin scales.
title_zh: 海洋种群遗传推论揭示了原生生物比古质体（植物）和后生动物（动物）更强的海洋结构
abstract_zh: 虽然动物和植物的生物地理模式已经明确，但微生物真核世界的分布仍然存在争议。传统上，原生生物被认为是世界性的，分散在各地，几乎没有地理限制。我们通过汇编 88 项海洋细胞色素氧化酶亚基 I 元条形码研究来进行全球群体遗传分析，从而检验了这一假设。我们发现了一个基本的生物地理鸿沟：大多数动物（后生动物）和植物（古质体）门具有严格集中在特定海洋盆地内的单倍型多样性，而大多数原生生物门在多个遥远的海洋中共享相同的单倍型。原生生物的大地理范围与适度的海洋间遗传分化相结合，与严格的历史世界主义不一致，并且与高连通性和范围扩张动态相容，包括但不限于最近的殖民事件。我们的研究结果为海洋真核生物地理学提供了统一的种群遗传视角，并完善了当前对海洋盆地尺度微生物扩散的看法。

title: Loss of erythrocyte sialic acid in sepsis disrupts inhibitory Siglec interactions, driving neutrophil hyperactivation and NET outspread
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Systemic inflammation is accompanied by overwhelming neutrophil activation, resulting in extensive formation of neutrophil extracellular traps (NETs). Although NETs are beneficial for pathogen entrapment, they become detrimental; therefore, their endogenous regulation is pivotal for survival. In this context, the observation that healthy individuals’ red blood cells (RBCs) can inhibit NET formation induced by lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-primed neutrophils is noteworthy. However, during systemic inflammation, NET formation in the vasculature is robust despite constant neutrophil exposure to RBCs. Herein, we reveal that for RBCs and neutrophils from septic individuals, but not from those with local inflammation, interactions cease and NET inhibition is abolished. This is observed even if only one cell type originates from an inflamed individual, and occurs in both human and murine cells. Moreover, 6 to 10 d post–sepsis induction (mice) or diagnosis (humans), during the resolution of inflammation, interactions are restored and hence fail during the critical stages of inflammation. Mechanistically, this is not due to passive LPS absorption by RBCs, which would limit its availability for neutrophils. In contrast, the cessation of NET inhibition is due to inflammation-induced RBC desialylation (removal of α2,3-linked sialic acids) and decreased expression of inhibitory Siglec-E/9 and -G, but not Siglec-F/5, on neutrophils. Accordingly, concurrent addition of exogenous polysialic acid (PolySia) and pharmacologically controlled accumulation of Siglec molecules on neutrophils preserves the ability of erythrocytes to inhibit PAD4-dependent NET formation upon interaction with neutrophils of endotoxemic mice. These findings open avenues for clinically controlling NET formation during systemic inflammation, given the abundance of erythrocytes in the blood.
title_zh: 脓毒症中红细胞唾液酸的丢失破坏了抑制性 Siglec 相互作用，导致中性粒细胞过度激活和 NET 扩散
abstract_zh: 全身炎症伴随着压倒性的中性粒细胞活化，导致中性粒细胞胞外陷阱（NET）的广泛形成。尽管 NET 有利于病原体捕获，但它们也会变得有害。因此，它们的内源性调节对于生存至关重要。在这种情况下，值得注意的是健康个体的红细胞 (RBC) 可以抑制脂多糖 (LPS) 引发的中性粒细胞诱导的 NET 形成。然而，在全身炎症过程中，尽管中性粒细胞不断暴露于红细胞，但脉管系统中的 NET 形成却很强烈。在此，我们发现，对于来自脓毒症个体（而非局部炎症个体）的红细胞和中性粒细胞，相互作用停止并且 NET 抑制被消除。即使只有一种细胞类型源自发炎个体，也会观察到这种情况，并且在人类和小鼠细胞中都会发生。此外，脓毒症诱导（小鼠）或诊断（人类）后6至10天，在炎症消退期间，相互作用恢复，因此在炎症的关键阶段失效。从机制上讲，这并不是由于红细胞被动吸收脂多糖，这会限制中性粒细胞对其的利用。相反，NET 抑制的停止是由于炎症诱导的 RBC 去唾液酸化（去除 α2,3 连接的唾液酸）以及中性粒细胞上抑制性 Siglec-E/9 和 -G 的表达减少，但不是 Siglec-F/5。因此，同时添加外源性聚唾液酸 (PolySia) 和药物控制 Siglec 分子在中性粒细胞上的积累可以保留

title: A decline in skeletal muscle NOX4 abrogates exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbates biological aging
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: A decline in nuclear factor erythroid 2–related factor 2 (NFE2L2)–orchestrated adaptive homeostasis and oxidative distress are thought to be key features of aging. In contracting skeletal muscle, the reactive oxygen species–producing enzyme NADPH oxidase 4 (NOX4) is a potent inducer of NFE2L2 adaptive homeostasis. Here, we report that skeletal muscle NOX4 levels decline in aged mice and humans, resulting in abrogated NFE2L2 adaptive homeostasis, increased protein oxidative damage, and decreased muscle function. We show that deleting NOX4 in skeletal muscle exacerbates the physiological decline associated with aging, resulting in overt sarcopenia and frailty, characterized by physical inactivity, increased adiposity, systemic inflammation, whole-body insulin resistance, and advanced liver disease in aged chow-fed mice. The systems-wide physiological decline in aged skeletal muscle NOX4-deficient mice could be corrected by restoring NOX4 using viral approaches or activating NFE2L2 downstream with sulforaphane and reinstating adaptive homeostatic responses otherwise induced by exercise. Our findings provide important insights into the basis for the decline in NFE2L2-orchestrated adaptive homeostasis that accompanies physical inactivity with age and identify key mechanisms by which exercise may promote healthy aging.
title_zh: 骨骼肌 NOX4 的下降会破坏运动引起的适应性稳态并加剧生物衰老
abstract_zh: 核因子红细胞 2 相关因子 2 (NFE2L2) 协调的适应性稳态和氧化应激的下降被认为是衰老的关键特征。在收缩骨骼肌时，产生活性氧的酶 NADPH 氧化酶 4 (NOX4) 是 NFE2L2 适应性稳态的有效诱导剂。在此，我们报告老年小鼠和人类骨骼肌 NOX4 水平下降，导致 NFE2L2 适应性稳态被破坏、蛋白质氧化损伤增加和肌肉功能下降。我们发现，删除骨骼肌中的 NOX4 会加剧与衰老相关的生理衰退，导致老年小鼠出现明显的肌肉减少症和虚弱，其特征是缺乏身体活动、肥胖增加、全身炎症、全身胰岛素抵抗和晚期肝病。老年骨骼肌 NOX4 缺陷小鼠的系统性生理衰退可以通过使用病毒方法恢复 NOX4 或用萝卜硫素激活下游 NFE2L2 并恢复由运动引起的适应性稳态反应来纠正。我们的研究结果为了解 NFE2L2 协调的适应性稳态下降的基础提供了重要的见解，这种下降伴随着身体不活动随着年龄的增长而下降，并确定了运动可以促进健康衰老的关键机制。

title: Experimental violation of a Bell-like inequality for causal order
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Quantum mechanics is compatible with scenarios where physical processes happen in an indefinite order. In theory, this feature could be detected through violations of inequalities on the observed correlations, analogous to Bell inequalities. However, experimental demonstrations of such violations have been missing until recently due to the complexity of the required setup. Here, we report an experimental violation of a Bell-like inequality involving the correlations of four parties, one of which is spacelike separated from the others. Our demonstration uses 3-kilometer fiber spools to simulate spacelike separation and achieves high-speed operations in photonic time-bin encoding, nanosecond synchronization, and accurate temperature stabilization. These experimental advances enable a violation by 5.7 SDs and open a path toward a certification of indefinite order in conditions that guarantee spacelike separation with existing state-of-the-art devices. However, the certification is not device independent, as it relies on knowledge about the setup to exclude bidirectional signaling—a loophole inherent to implementations in classical acyclic spacetimes, which may be resolved in future quantum-spacetime tests.
title_zh: 实验违反因果顺序的贝尔式不等式
abstract_zh: 量子力学与物理过程以不确定顺序发生的场景兼容。理论上，这一特征可以通过违反观察到的相关性的不等式来检测，类似于贝尔不等式。然而，由于所需设置的复杂性，直到最近才对此类违规行为进行实验演示。在这里，我们报告了一种对贝尔式不等式的实验违反，涉及四方的相关性，其中一方与其他方之间是空间分离的。我们的演示使用 3 公里长的光纤线轴来模拟类空间分离，并在光子时间仓编码、纳秒同步和精确的温度稳定方面实现高速操作。这些实验性进展使得违反 5.7 SD 成为可能，并为在保证与现有最先进设备进行类空间分离的条件下进行无限序认证开辟了道路。然而，该认证并不是独立于设备的，因为它依赖于有关排除双向信号传输的设置的知识——这是经典非循环时空中实现固有的漏洞，可能会在未来的量子时空测试中得到解决。

title: Oil-impregnated densified wood veneer with high electrical insulation enabled by nanosized oil channels
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Growing energy demands and renewable integration are stressing the aging power grid infrastructure. Lignocellulosic oil-impregnated paper is widely used in power transformers but suffers from critical limitations, such as low dielectric strength, mechanical strength, and thermal conductivity, causing premature transformer failures. Here, we demonstrate a superior electrically insulating oil-impregnated paper design using the naturally anisotropic structure of densified wood veneer to achieve nanosized channels of oil that efficiently disrupt electrical breakdown pathways. The developed oil-impregnated densified wood (ODW) creates aligned cellulose fibers with 166 ± 87–nanometer oil nanochannels, achieving record dielectric strength of 105 kilovolts per millimeter. The structure also delivers a mechanical strength of up to 384 megapascals and a thermal conductivity of 0.33 watts per meter per kelvin, enabling enhanced longevity upon thermal aging tests. The ODW could replace conventional transformer insulation to enhance power transformer performance and improve lifetime. Moreover, its anisotropic oil-filled nanochannel design offers a general strategy for hybrid dielectrics in medium- and high-voltage applications.
title_zh: 油浸致密木单板具有纳米级油通道带来的高电绝缘性
abstract_zh: 不断增长的能源需求和可再生能源并网给老化的电网基础设施带来了压力。木质纤维素油浸纸广泛用于电力变压器，但存在严重的局限性，例如介电强度、机械强度和导热性低，导致变压器过早失效。在这里，我们展示了一种卓越的电绝缘油浸纸设计，利用致密木单板的自然各向异性结构来实现纳米级的油通道，从而有效地破坏电击穿路径。开发的油浸致密木材 (ODW) 可产生具有 166 ± 87 纳米油纳米通道的排列纤维素纤维，实现每毫米 105 kV 的创纪录介电强度。该结构还具有高达 384 兆帕的机械强度和每米每开尔文 0.33 瓦的导热率，从而能够在热老化测试中延长使用寿命。 ODW 可以取代传统的变压器绝缘材料，以增强电力变压器的性能并延长使用寿命。此外，其各向异性充油纳米通道设计为中压和高压应用中的混合电介质提供了通用策略。
