title: Mice produce interneurons in the septum as a response to aversive experiences and antidepressant treatment
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Adult neurogenesis sustains olfactory function, facilitates the acquisition of new memories, and provides resilience against depression in mice. Neural stem cells (NSCs) elicit selective responses to different physiological and pathological stimuli, thereby modulating neuron production. Here, we show that fear conditioning stimulates neurogenesis in the adult mouse brain septum by activating NSCs in the dorsal septum (dsNSCs) situated near a plexus of serotonergic axons originating from raphe nucleus neurons—key regulators of mood, anxiety, and stress responses. Elevation of serotonin (5HT) levels with the antidepressant and anxiolytic drug fluoxetine similarly promoted dsNSC proliferation and neurogenesis. The adult-born GABAergic interneurons integrate into septal nuclei. These findings suggest a potential adaptive response in mice to stress-inducing aversive experiences and elevated 5HT in the adult septum.
title_zh: 小鼠在隔膜中产生中间神经元，作为对厌恶经历和抗抑郁治疗的反应
abstract_zh: 成年神经发生维持嗅觉功能，促进新记忆的获得，并为小鼠提供抵抗抑郁的能力。神经干细胞（NSC）对不同的生理和病理刺激产生选择性反应，从而调节神经元的产生。在这里，我们表明，恐惧调节通过激活背隔（dsNSC）中的神经干细胞来刺激成年小鼠脑中隔的神经发生，该神经干细胞位于源自中缝核神经元的血清素能轴突丛附近，而中缝核神经元是情绪、焦虑和应激反应的关键调节因子。抗抑郁药和抗焦虑药氟西汀提高血清素 (5HT) 水平同样促进 dsNSC 增殖和神经发生。成年出生的 GABA 能中间神经元整合到间隔核中。这些发现表明，小鼠对压力诱发的厌恶经历和成体隔膜中 5HT 升高存在潜在的适应性反应。

title: PathTIGR: A pathway topology-informed graph representation learning framework for immunotherapy response prediction
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Immunotherapy has revolutionized cancer treatment, yet substantial inter-patient response heterogeneity limits therapeutic benefit to specific patient subsets. Here, we present PathTIGR, a pathway topology-informed graph representation learning framework that systematically integrates biological pathway network topology knowledge with genome variation information for immunotherapy response prediction. PathTIGR uses a three-component design: (i) pathway graph encoder with multihead attention embeding pathway topology knowledge and cancer genomic variants to pathway representation, (ii) transformer module capturing pathway regulatory dependencies, and (iii) multilayer perceptron synthesizing pathway-level representations to predict immunotherapy response. This architecture enables PathTIGR to capture complex molecular interactions underlying immunotherapy response. Comprehensive validation across multiple independent immunotherapy cohorts demonstrates that PathTIGR achieves superior predictive performance compared to established biomarkers and state-of-the-art deep learning approaches while maintaining biological interpretability through identification of key signatures underlying response heterogeneity. PathTIGR represents an interpretable graph-based learning framework that enhances immunotherapy response prediction and elucidates molecular determinants of therapeutic efficacy, thereby facilitating the advancement of precision cancer immunotherapy.
title_zh: PathTIGR：用于免疫治疗反应预测的通路拓扑信息图表示学习框架
abstract_zh: 免疫疗法彻底改变了癌症治疗，但患者间反应的显着异质性限制了特定患者亚群的治疗益处。在这里，我们提出了 PathTIGR，一种基于通路拓扑的图表示学习框架，它系统地将生物通路网络拓扑知识与基因组变异信息相结合，用于免疫治疗反应预测。 PathTIGR 采用三组件设计：(i) 具有多头注意力的通路图编码器，将通路拓扑知识和癌症基因组变异嵌入到通路表示中，(ii) 转换器模块捕获通路调节依赖性，以及 (iii) 多层感知器合成通路级表示以预测免疫治疗反应。这种架构使 PathTIGR 能够捕获免疫治疗反应背后的复杂分子相互作用。多个独立免疫治疗队列的综合验证表明，与现有的生物标志物和最先进的深度学习方法相比，PathTIGR 实现了卓越的预测性能，同时通过识别反应异质性背后的关键特征来保持生物可解释性。 PathTIGR 代表了一种可解释的基于图的学​​习框架，可增强免疫治疗反应预测并阐明治疗效果的分子决定因素，从而促进精准癌症免疫治疗的进步。

title: Chiral nanoparticles drive enantiomer-specific osteogenic differentiation of stem cells and accelerate bone regeneration
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Precise control over stem cell differentiation is of crucial importance in regenerative medicine, such as stem cell–based bone repair. Chiral nanoparticles (NPs) exhibit enantiomer-dependent interactions with stem cells, providing a promising strategy for guiding cell behaviors. Here, we investigated the role of chiral NPs in modulating osteogenic differentiation of stem cells. L-CF-NPs, D-CF-NPs, and A-CF-NPs with controllable nanoscale chirality were synthesized to investigate the effect of enantioselectivity on stem cell fate. In vitro, L-CF-NPs resulted in the highest cellular uptake through clathrin-mediated, integrin-involved endocytosis. This led to the most pronounced up-regulation of osteogenic marker expression, mineralization (via MAPK/JNK/ERK), and angiogenic marker expression. In vivo, volumetric 3D-bioprinted scaffolds incorporating L-CF-NPs resulted in the fastest bone regeneration in a rat model of critical-size bone defects. This work establishes nanoscale chirality as a design parameter for biomaterials, offering a promising approach to regenerating bone and other tissues.
title_zh: 手性纳米粒子驱动干细胞的对映体特异性成骨分化并加速骨再生
abstract_zh: 精确控制干细胞分化对于再生医学至关重要，例如基于干细胞的骨修复。手性纳米颗粒（NP）与干细胞表现出对映异构体依赖性相互作用，为指导细胞行为提供了一种有前途的策略。在这里，我们研究了手性纳米颗粒在调节干细胞成骨分化中的作用。合成了具有可控纳米级手性的L-CF-NP、D-CF-NP和A-CF-NP，以研究对映选择性对干细胞命运的影响。在体外，L-CF-NP 通过网格蛋白介导的整合素参与的内吞作用导致最高的细胞摄取。这导致成骨标志物表达、矿化（通过 MAPK/JNK/ERK）和血管生成标志物表达最显着的上调。在体内，包含 L-CF-NP 的体积 3D 生物打印支架在临界尺寸骨缺损的大鼠模型中实现了最快的骨再生。这项工作将纳米级手性确立为生物材料的设计参数，为骨骼和其他组织的再生提供了一种有前景的方法。

title: Rpd3L regulates transcription-replication conflict via H3K4 methylation–dependent and –independent chromatin mechanisms
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Faithful genome duplication requires coordination between transcription and replication. Disruption of this coordination causes transcription-replication conflicts (TRCs), leading to replication stress and genome instability. How chromatin regulators modulate these processes remains unclear. Here, we show that the Rpd3L histone deacetylase complex dynamically modulates chromatin state to control replication fork progression and buffer TRCs in
                    Saccharomyces cerevisiae
                    . Rpd3L is targeted through both histone H3 lysine 4 methylation–dependent recruitment and methylation-independent mechanisms engaged under replication stress. Loss of H3K4 methylation or Rpd3L function promotes histone acetylation, accelerates fork progression through transcribed regions, and increases transcription-associated genome instability. Balanced acetylation at multiple histone lysines is required to stabilize replication forks under stress. While histone deacetylase complexes have been implicated in repairing damaged forks, our findings reveal that Rpd3L acts preemptively to modulate chromatin state and replication dynamics during TRCs, defining a chromatin-based mechanism that safeguards genome stability.
title_zh: Rpd3L 通过 H3K4 甲基化依赖和独立染色质机制调节转录复制冲突
abstract_zh:
忠实的基因组复制需要转录和复制之间的协调。这种协调的破坏会导致转录复制冲突（TRC），从而导致复制压力和基因组不稳定。染色质调节因子如何调节这些过程仍不清楚。在这里，我们表明 Rpd3L 组蛋白脱乙酰酶复合物动态调节染色质状态以控制复制叉进展并缓冲 TRC
                    酿酒酵母
                    。 Rpd3L 通过组蛋白 H3 赖氨酸 4 甲基化依赖性招募和复制应激下的甲基化独立机制来靶向。 H3K4 甲基化或 Rpd3L 功能的丧失会促进组蛋白乙酰化，加速转录区域的分叉进展，并增加转录相关的基因组不稳定性。需要多个组蛋白赖氨酸的平衡乙酰化来稳定应激下的复制叉。虽然组蛋白脱乙酰酶复合物与修复受损的分叉有关，但我们的研究结果表明，Rpd3L 在 TRC 期间先发制人地调节染色质状态和复制动态，定义了一种基于染色质的机制，可保障基因组稳定性。

title: Strong and corrosion-resistant 3D-printed steel by self-assembled core-shell nanoparticles
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Metal additive manufacturing often produces coarse columnar grains and elemental segregation, resulting in anisotropic mechanical properties and degraded corrosion resistance. We present a powder blending strategy using multicomponent carbides (MCCs) to overcome these limitations in 316L stainless steel. Upon dissolution, MCCs drive the self-assembly of uniformly distributed core-shell oxynitride-carbide nanoparticles, which sequester detrimental nitrogen/oxygen impurities and markedly refine austenite grain size from 43.9 to 2.1 micrometers. This unique microstructure control yields an excellent combination of strength and ductility. Crucially, the corrosion resistance is enhanced by suppressing chromium segregation via tungsten, niobium, and tantalum partitioning to the cell boundaries and facilitating the formation of a protective tungsten trioxide–rich passive film. This work establishes an instructive paradigm for metal additive manufacturing, demonstrating how MCCs’ introduction can tailor nanoprecipitations, grain structure, and alloy chemistry to simultaneously improve strength and corrosion resistance in structural alloys.
title_zh: 通过自组装核壳纳米颗粒 3D 打印坚固且耐腐蚀的钢
abstract_zh: 金属增材制造经常产生粗大的柱状晶和元素偏析，导致机械性能各向异性和耐腐蚀性下降。我们提出了一种使用多组分碳化物 (MCC) 的粉末混合策略来克服 316L 不锈钢的这些限制。溶解后，MCC 会驱动均匀分布的核-壳氮氧化物-碳化物纳米颗粒的自组装，从而隔离有害的氮/氧杂质，并将奥氏体晶粒尺寸从 43.9 微米显着细化至 2.1 微米。这种独特的微观结构控制实现了强度和延展性的完美结合。至关重要的是，通过钨、铌和钽分配到晶胞边界来抑制铬偏析，并促进富含三氧化钨的保护性钝化膜的形成，从而增强耐腐蚀性。这项工作为金属增材制造建立了一个指导性范例，展示了 MCC 的引入如何定制纳米沉淀、晶粒结构和合金化学，以同时提高结构合金的强度和耐腐蚀性。

title: Hierarchical laser-programmed soft actuators for designing bionic robots with freeform morphing shapes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Bio-inspired shape-morphing structures, essential for next-generation soft robotics with unprecedented adaptability, demand actuators capable of complex and configurable three-dimensional motions. By overcoming traditional stimulus-responsive strategies facing the trade-off between manufacturing simplicity and kinematic sophistication, here, we introduce a spatially differentiated laser-programming technology for digital manufacturing laser-induced graphene-based soft actuators (LIG-SAs) with freeform morphing capabilities. Via cross-scale control of lasing energy and scribing direction, material heterogeneity and structural hierarchy can be tuned simultaneously for introducing decoupled electrothermal distribution and stiffness anisotropy, thus encoding LIG-SAs with four typical motion units: straight bending, directional curling, rigid supporting, and soft connecting. By arbitrarily grouping multimodal morphing units into concretized devices, this approach further empowers freeform design of bionic robots including octopus-like tentacles and inchworm/seal–like crawlers toward multitask locomotion of conformal grasping, path navigation, and obstacle avoidance. This framework bridges digital design with physical intelligence, unlocking previously unidentified avenues of soft robots for creating sophisticated and programmable morphologies.
title_zh: 用于设计具有自由变形形状的仿生机器人的分层激光编程软执行器
abstract_zh: 仿生形状变形结构对于具有前所未有的适应性的下一代软机器人至关重要，需要能够进行复杂且可配置的三维运动的执行器。通过克服传统的刺激响应策略面临制造简单性和运动学复杂性之间的权衡，在这里，我们引入了一种空间差异化激光编程技术，用于数字制造具有自由变形功能的激光诱导石墨烯软执行器（LIG-SA）。通过激光能量和划线方向的跨尺度控制，可以同时调整材料异质性和结构层次，以引入解耦的电热分布和刚度各向异性，从而用四种典型的运动单元编码LIG-SA：直弯曲、定向卷曲、刚性支撑和软连接。通过将多模态变形单元任意分组为具体化设备，这种方法进一步增强了仿生机器人的自由设计能力，包括章鱼般的触手和尺蠖/海豹般的爬行者，以实现保形抓取、路径导航和避障等多任务运动。该框架将数字设计与物理智能联系起来，解锁了软机器人以前未知的途径来创建复杂的可编程形态。

title: Single-nucleus profiling reveals a core disease signature and cell type–specific vulnerabilities in early Rett syndrome
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Rett syndrome (RTT) is an X-linked neurological disorder caused by
                    MECP2
                    mutations, creating distinct cellular environments in females (mosaic) versus males (nonmosaic). Despite female patients representing most cases, how mosaicism contributes molecularly to RTT pathogenesis, particularly in presymptomatic stages, remains poorly understood. To address this question, we profiled hippocampal transcriptomes of young female and male RTT mice using bulk and single-nucleus RNA sequencing. We identified a core disease signature of consistently dysregulated genes only in MeCP2
                    −
                    cells across RTT models. Moreover, we uncovered non–cell autonomous effects exclusively in female MeCP2
                    +
                    excitatory neurons, suggesting that these circuits are more vulnerable early in the mosaic RTT environment. The single-nuclei data also revealed an underappreciated MeCP2
                    −
                    interneuron subtype that had the most transcriptional dysregulation in both male and female RTT hippocampi. Together, these data highlight the different effects of MeCP2 loss on excitatory and inhibitory circuits between the mosaic and nonmosaic environments in early RTT pathogenesis.
title_zh: 单核分析揭示了早期雷特综合征的核心疾病特征和细胞类型特异性脆弱性
abstract_zh:
Rett 综合征 (RTT) 是一种 X 连锁神经系统疾病，由以下原因引起：
                    MECP2
                    突变，在女性（马赛克）和男性（非马赛克）中创造出不同的细胞环境。尽管女性患者占大多数病例，但镶嵌现象如何在分子水平上影响 RTT 发病机制，特别是在症状前阶段，仍然知之甚少。为了解决这个问题，我们使用批量和单核 RNA 测序分析了年轻雌性和雄性 RTT 小鼠的海马转录组。我们仅在 MeCP2 中发现了持续失调基因的核心疾病特征
                    -
                    跨RTT模型的细胞。此外，我们仅在女性 MeCP2 中发现了非细胞自主效应
                    +
                    兴奋性神经元，表明这些回路在马赛克 RTT 环境的早期更容易受到攻击。单核数据还揭示了一个被低估的 MeCP2
                    -
                    在男性和女性 RTT 海马中转录失调最严重的中间神经元亚型。总之，这些数据强调了 MeCP2 丢失对早期 RTT 发病机制中镶嵌和非镶嵌环境之间的兴奋和抑制回路的不同影响。

title: Distinct genomic architectures but the same gene underlie the convergent evolution of a plant supergene
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Evolution reflects a balance between innovation and constraint, often repurposing existing components in new contexts. Convergent evolution exemplifies this interplay, with similar traits evolving independently in different species, yet the genomic mechanisms enabling this repeatability remain poorly understood. Here, by analyzing 10 chromosome-scale genome assemblies, including seven newly generated, we found that the
                    S
                    -locus supergene (a cluster of tightly linked genes controlling a floral dimorphism called distyly) arose independently multiple times within the primrose family, Darwin’s iconic system for studying distyly. In each case, the same gene was independently duplicated and co-opted. However, the resulting genomic architectures differed, ranging from hemizygous (present on one chromosome copy) to heterozygous (on both copies), challenging the prevailing view that hemizygosity is intrinsic to
                    S
                    -loci and suggesting alternative evolutionary routes to distyly supergene formation. By uncovering multiple mechanisms for supergene origins, our work shows how convergent evolution can produce similar phenotypes by reusing the same genetic building blocks while exploring distinct genomic configurations.
title_zh: 不同的基因组结构，但相同的基因是植物超基因趋同进化的基础
abstract_zh:
进化反映了创新和约束之间的平衡，通常在新的环境中重新利用现有的组件。趋同进化例证了这种相互作用，相似的性状在不同物种中独立进化，但实现这种可重复性的基因组机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，通过分析 10 个染色体规模的基因组组装体（其中包括 7 个新生成的基因组组装体），我们发现
                    S
                    -位点超基因（一组紧密相连的基因，控制称为 distyly 的花二态性）在报春花科（达尔文研究 distyly 的标志性系统）中多次独立出现。在每种情况下，相同的基因都被独立复制和增选。然而，由此产生的基因组结构有所不同，从半合子（存在于一个染色体拷贝上）到杂合子（存在于两个拷贝上），挑战了半合子是染色体固有的普遍观点。
                    S
                    -位点并提出了远超基因形成的替代进化路线。通过揭示超基因起源的多种机制，我们的工作展示了趋同进化如何通过重复使用相同的遗传构建块同时探索不同的基因组配置来产生相似的表型。

title: High-energy-density aqueous magnesium metal battery textiles enable ultrasensitive pressure sensing across −40° to 100°C
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Smart wearable sensing systems necessitate self-powered, high-sensitivity pressure sensors that can operate efficiently across a wide temperature range. Here, we present a high-energy-density aqueous magnesium metal battery (AMMB) textile for ultrasensitive pressure sensing from −40° to 100°C. The AMMB-type pressure (AMMB-P) sensing textile features a porous quasi-solid-state polyethylene oxide–magnesium chloride electrolyte that inhibits magnesium corrosion via hydrogen-bond anchoring, paired with a breathable carbon cloth cathode and woven magnesium anode. The innovative design achieves an ultrahigh sensitivity of 687.32 millivolts per kilopascal, a low detection limit (0.96 pascals), long-term durability (200,000 cycles), and exceptional breathability (water vapor permeability, 2281.4 ± 249.8 grams per square meter per day; air permeability, 628.0 ± 9.1 millimeters per second). The unique anticrystallization properties of electrolyte ensure a stable operation of the AMMB-P sensing textile in extreme temperatures ranging from −40° to 100°C. Under high-pressure condition, our AMMB-P sensing textile can be converted into a reliable power source with high energy density of 287.92 watt-hours per kilogram, ensuring stable self-powered operation. Coupled with machine learning, the AMMB-P sensing array enables intelligent object recognition and autonomous robotic control even under harsh conditions. Our work advances self-powered pressure-sensing textiles tailored for extreme-environment exploration, enabling interactive perception in humanoid robots and individual health management under harsh service conditions.
title_zh: 高能量密度水性镁金属电池纺织品可在−40°至100°C范围内实现超灵敏压力传感
abstract_zh: 智能可穿戴传感系统需要自供电、高灵敏度压力传感器，能够在较宽的温度范围内高效运行。在这里，我们推出了一种高能量密度水性镁金属电池 (AMMB) 纺织品，可在 -40° 至 100°C 的温度范围内实现超灵敏压力传感。 AMMB 型压力 (AMMB-P) 传感纺织品采用多孔准固态聚环氧乙烷-氯化镁电解质，可通过氢键锚定抑制镁腐蚀，并搭配透气碳布阴极和编织镁阳极。创新设计实现了 687.32 毫伏每千帕的超高灵敏度、低检测限（0.96 帕斯卡）、长期耐用性（200,000 次循环）和卓越的透气性（水蒸气渗透性，2281.4 ± 249.8 克每平方米每天；透气性，628.0 ± 9.1 毫米每秒）。电解质独特的抗结晶特性确保AMMB-P传感织物在-40°C至100°C的极端温度下稳定运行。在高压条件下，我们的AMMB-P传感纺织品可以转化为可靠的电源，能量密度高达每公斤287.92瓦时，确保稳定的自供电运行。与机器学习相结合，AMMB-P 传感阵列即使在恶劣条件下也能实现智能物体识别和自主机器人控制。我们的工作改进了专为极端环境探索而设计的自供电压力感应纺织品，从而实现人形机器人和个人健康管理的交互式感知

title: Deep learning reveals enhanced ENSO predictability under historical anthropogenic forcing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Understanding how ENSO predictability responds to climate change is essential for improving future climate projections. In this study, we apply a deep learning model—convolutional neural network with a leave-one-out model strategy to Coupled Model Intercomparison Project Phase 6 (CMIP6) historical and preindustrial control simulations. We find that El Niño–Southern Oscillation (ENSO) predictability is statistically enhanced by 14.0 ± 1.8% enhancement under historical anthropogenic forcing. This improvement is linked to changes in key ocean-atmosphere feedbacks. Under historical forcing, the equatorial Pacific shows a shoaling of the thermocline. As a result, the surface ocean becomes more sensitive to wind forcing, and subsurface temperature becomes more responsive to thermocline variations. These processes strengthen the three-dimensional advective and thermocline feedbacks, which together enhance ENSO predictability. These findings highlight the importance of anthropogenic forcing in shaping ENSO predictability in a warming climate.
title_zh: 深度学习揭示历史人为强迫下 ENSO 的可预测性增强
abstract_zh: 了解 ENSO 的可预测性如何应对气候变化对于改善未来气候预测至关重要。在本研究中，我们将深度学习模型——具有留一模型策略的卷积神经网络应用于耦合模型比对项目第 6 阶段 (CMIP6) 历史和前工业控制模拟。我们发现，在历史人为强迫作用下，厄尔尼诺-南方涛动 (ENSO) 可预测性在统计上增强了 14.0 ± 1.8%。这种改进与关键海洋大气反馈的变化有关。在历史强迫作用下，赤道太平洋出现温跃层浅滩。结果，海洋表层对风力变得更加敏感，地下温度对温跃层变化变得更加敏感。这些过程增强了三维平流和温跃层反馈，共同增强了 ENSO 的可预测性。这些发现凸显了人为强迫在气候变暖中塑造 ENSO 可预测性方面的重要性。

title: Ultrasound priming gated by solid tumor hallmarks to guide CAR-T therapy
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: CAR-T therapy is highly effective in hematologic malignancies but remains challenging in solid tumors. To address this challenge, here, we developed SHIFTERS (solid-tumor hallmark inducible, focused-ultrasound triggered enhanced reprogramming system), an AND-gated circuit that rewires tumor hallmarks into the clinically validated antigen CD19 under focused-ultrasound (FUS) control. SHIFTERS uses a split Gal4-VP64 transcription factor with one module driven by a hypoxia-responsive promoter and the other by a FUS-inducible heat-shock promoter, restricting CD19 induction to sonicated, hallmark-positive regions. This design enables robust, sustained local CD19 expression to activate and train CD19 synNotch CAR-T cells. In 3D spheroids and in vivo models, hypoxia-gated SHIFTERS combined with synNotch CAR-T cells achieved strong tumor suppression, supporting FUS-guided, localized activation. SHIFTERS is modular and can be adapted to tumor-type–specific promoters such as enAFP in hepatocellular carcinoma to enable both spatial and cell type–specific targeting. Together, SHIFTERS provides a modular, tumor-constrained, ultrasound-controllable platform to improve the precision and efficacy of CAR-T therapy for solid tumors.
title_zh: 由实体瘤标志门控的超声启动来指导 CAR-T 治疗
abstract_zh: CAR-T疗法在血液系统恶性肿瘤中非常有效，但在实体瘤中仍然具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们在这里开发了 SHIFTERS（实体瘤标志可诱导、聚焦超声触发增强重编程系统），这是一种与门电路，可在聚焦超声 (FUS) 控制下将肿瘤标志重新连接到临床验证的抗原 CD19 中。 SHIFTERS 使用分裂的 Gal4-VP64 转录因子，其中一个模块由缺氧响应启动子驱动，另一个模块由 FUS 诱导的热休克启动子驱动，将 CD19 诱导限制在超声处理的标志阳性区域。这种设计能够实现稳健、持续的局部 CD19 表达，以激活和训练 CD19 synNotch CAR-T 细胞。在 3D 球体和体内模型中，缺氧门控 SHIFTERS 与 synNotch CAR-T 细胞相结合，实现了强大的肿瘤抑制，支持 FUS 引导的局部激活。 SHIFTERS 是模块化的，可以适应肿瘤类型特异性启动子，例如肝细胞癌中的 enAFP，以实现空间和细胞类型特异性靶向。 SHIFTERS 共同提供了一个模块化、肿瘤受限、超声可控的平台，以提高实体瘤 CAR-T 疗法的精度和疗效。

title: Nonequilibrium ion transport in a hybrid battery material
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Hybrid materials, which combine inorganic and molecular components, often exhibit structural flexibility that enables unusual functional responses. Among them, Prussian blue analogs (PBAs) are a promising class for post–lithium battery technologies. Here, we show that nonequilibrium transformation processes govern the charge-storage mechanism of a PBA electrode, K
                    2
                    Mn[Fe(CN)
                    6
                    ]. Ostensibly, this behavior mirrors that observed in high-rate cycling of conventional cathodes such as LiFePO
                    4
                    yet arises here for fundamentally different reasons–namely, low elastic moduli and cooperative distortions inherent to the hybrid framework. Using operando x-ray absorption spectroscopy with Metropolis matrix factorization and x-ray diffraction, we show that framework flexibility limits transport kinetics and promotes collective, metastable pathways. Our results not only highlight various directions for PBA cathode optimization but also suggest a broader relevance of nonequilibrium mechanisms for mass transport in hybrid materials beyond PBAs alone.
title_zh: 混合电池材料中的非平衡离子传输
abstract_zh:
混合材料结合了无机和分子成分，通常表现出结构灵活性，能够实现不寻常的功能响应。其中，普鲁士蓝类似物（PBA）是后锂电池技术中很有前途的一类。在这里，我们证明非平衡转变过程控制着 PBA 电极的电荷存储机制 K
                    2
                    锰[铁(CN)
                    6
                    ]。表面上看，这种行为反映了在 LiFePO 等传统正极的高倍率循环中观察到的情况
                    4
                    但这里出现的原因却截然不同，即混合框架固有的低弹性模量和协作扭曲。使用原位 X 射线吸收光谱与 Metropolis 矩阵分解和 X 射线衍射，我们表明框架灵活性限制了传输动力学并促进了集体亚稳态途径。我们的结果不仅强调了 PBA 阴极优化的各个方向，而且还表明，除了单独的 PBA 之外，混合材料中的非平衡机制与质量传输具有更广泛的相关性。

title: Adaptive Spo11 RNA editing gate optimizes meiosis I pace and mitotic proliferation while preserving ascospore formation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Spo11-mediated DNA double-strand breaks (DSBs) are essential for meiotic recombination, yet how Spo11 activity is temporally regulated during mitosis and fungal development remains unclear. In the fungal plant pathogen
                    Fusarium graminearum
                    , we found that FgSpo11 has a DSB-independent role delaying meiosis I and a DSB-dependent role critical for postmeiotic mitoses during ascosporogenesis. Loss of FgSpo11 accelerates meiosis I and causes excessive postmeiotic divisions, ultimately causing aborted ascospores. A premature stop codon (TAG) is corrected to tryptophan (TGG) by adenosine-to-inosine RNA editing exclusively during sexual reproduction, enabling full-length protein synthesis. A genomically “corrected” allele bypassing this editing preserves ascospore formation but causes meiotic and vegetative mitotic defects. Beyond its on-switch function, this editing acts as a tunable rheostat fine-tuning FgSpo11 dosage during meiosis. Evolutionary analyses reveal recurrent gain and loss of this editing, highlighting adaptive modulation of Spo11 deployment. This study uncovers a single-site RNA editing gate controlling a key meiotic regulator and illustrates transcriptome plasticity in reconciling life cycle demands in eukaryotic pathogens.
title_zh: 自适应 Spo11 RNA 编辑门优化减数分裂 I 速度和有丝分裂增殖，同时保留子囊孢子形成
abstract_zh:
Spo11 介导的 DNA 双链断裂 (DSB) 对于减数分裂重组至关重要，但 Spo11 活性在有丝分裂和真菌发育过程中如何暂时调节仍不清楚。在真菌植物病原体中
                    禾谷镰刀菌
                    ，我们发现 FgSpo11 具有延迟减数分裂 I 的 DSB 独立作用，以及对子囊孢子发生过程中减数分裂后有丝分裂至关重要的 DSB 依赖性作用。 FgSpo11 的缺失会加速减数分裂 I 并导致减数分裂后过度分裂，最终导致子囊孢子流产。仅在有性生殖过程中，通过腺苷至肌苷 RNA 编辑将过早终止密码子 (TAG) 纠正为色氨酸 (TGG)，从而实现全长蛋白质合成。绕过这种编辑的基因组“校正”等位基因保留了子囊孢子的形成，但导致减数分裂和营养有丝分裂缺陷。除了其开关功能外，这种编辑还充当可调变阻器，在减数分裂期间微调 FgSpo11 剂量。进化分析揭示了这种编辑的反复增益和损失，强调了 Spo11 部署的自适应调制。这项研究揭示了控制关键减数分裂调节因子的单位点 RNA 编辑门，并说明了转录组可塑性在协调真核病原体生命周期需求中的作用。

title: Ultrastable green top-emitting OLEDs approaching BT.2020 enabled by narrowband phosphorescent emitters
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Highly stable and efficient organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) with high color purity are critical for ultrahigh-definition display applications. However, achieving these characteristics is hindered by the emitter bandwidth and device stability. Herein, we present the design of tetradentate green Pt(II) emitters with a rigid three-dimensional structure via extended π-conjugation and bulky substituents. This molecular engineering approach effectively suppresses excited-state geometric distortion, resulting in a small full width at half-maximum (FWHM) of 16.4 nanometers in toluene. When the emitters were used in a microcavity-enhanced top-emitting device, the FWHM was further reduced to 14.8 nanometers by controlling constructive and destructive interferences. The top-emitting device showed a Broadcast Service Television 2020 (BT.2020) green color [Commission Internationale de l’Éclairage (CIE): 0.22, 0.75] and a high current efficiency of up to 174 candelas per ampere. Most notably, the device exhibited a record-breaking operational stability, exceeding that of the commercial LED/OLED/MicroLED (micro–light-emitting diode) standard, achieving an unprecedented lifetime to 90% of the initial luminance of 540,100 hours at 1000 candelas per square meter.
title_zh: 窄带磷光发射器实现超稳定绿色顶发射 OLED 接近 BT.2020
abstract_zh: 高度稳定、高效且具有高色纯度的有机发光二极管 (OLED) 对于超高清显示应用至关重要。然而，实现这些特性受到发射极带宽和器件稳定性的阻碍。在此，我们提出了通过扩展 π 共轭和大体积取代基具有刚性三维结构的四齿绿色 Pt(II) 发射体的设计。这种分子工程方法可有效抑制激发态几何畸变，从而在甲苯中产生 16.4 纳米的小半峰全宽 (FWHM)。当发射器用于微腔增强顶发射器件时，通过控制相长和相消干涉，半峰宽进一步降低至 14.8 纳米。顶部发射器件显示广播服务电视 2020 (BT.2020) 绿色 [国际照明委员会 (CIE)：0.22，0.75] 和高达每安培 174 坎德拉的高电流效率。最值得注意的是，该器件表现出破纪录的运行稳定性，超过了商业 LED/OLED/MicroLED（微型发光二极管）标准，在每平方米 1000 坎德拉的亮度下，实现了前所未有的寿命，达到初始亮度 540,100 小时的 90%。

title: The tyrosine phosphatase STEP is a developmental suppressor of synaptogenesis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Striatal-Enriched Protein Tyrosine Phosphatase (STEP) constrains synaptic potentiation by dephosphorylating postsynaptic substrates, but its presynaptic role has remained unclear. Here, we identify a previously unrecognized function of STEP in regulating axonal differentiation and synapse assembly. Genetic and pharmacological manipulation of STEP in vivo and in vitro show that STEP limits presynaptic maturation by restricting synaptic vesicle protein clustering along developing hippocampal axons. Using a reconstituted circuit-on-a-chip we show that loss of presynaptic STEP is sufficient to significantly increase the number of axodendritic synapses. Functional imaging further revealed that the increased synaptic puncta observed in STEP KO neurons actively undergo depolarization-evoked vesicle exocytosis, representing bona fide functional synapses. Multielectrode array recordings reveal that STEP deletion increases neuronal excitability, and network synchrony, hallmarks of enhanced presynaptic efficacy. Mechanistically, these effects reflect sustained phosphorylation of STEP promoting presynaptic assembly and release competence. Importantly, inhibiting STEP also rescues presynaptic differentiation defects in
                    Fmr1
                    KO neurons, implicating aberrant STEP signaling in Fragile X–associated synaptic pathology. Thus, STEP serves as a phosphatase gatekeeper that restrains presynaptic differentiation and neurotransmission, and its inhibition may offer a therapeutic strategy to correct synaptic deficits in Fragile X Syndrome.
title_zh: 酪氨酸磷酸酶 STEP 是突触发生的发育抑制因子
abstract_zh:
纹状体富含蛋白酪氨酸磷酸酶（STEP）通过使突触后底物去磷酸化来限制突触增强，但其突触前作用仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现了 STEP 在调节轴突分化和突触组装方面以前未被认识的功能。 STEP 体内和体外的遗传和药理学操作表明，STEP 通过限制突触小泡蛋白沿发育中的海马轴突聚集来限制突触前成熟。使用重构的片上电路，我们发现突触前STEP的损失足以显着增加轴突突触的数量。功能成像进一步揭示，在 STEP KO 神经元中观察到的突触点增加，主动进行去极化诱发的囊泡胞吐作用，代表真正的功能性突触。多电极阵列记录显示，STEP 缺失增加了神经元兴奋性和网络同步性，这是增强突触前功效的标志。从机制上讲，这些效应反映了 STEP 的持续磷酸化促进突触前组装和释放能力。重要的是，抑制 STEP 还可以挽救突触前分化缺陷
                    FMR1
                    KO 神经元，暗示脆性 X 相关突触病理学中异常的 STEP 信号传导。因此，STEP 作为磷酸酶看门人，抑制突触前分化和神经传递，其抑制可能为纠正脆性 X 综合征的突触缺陷提供一种治疗策略。

title: Telocyte-derived pentraxin 3 enables vascular pruning as a key driver in infantile hemangioma regression
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The natural course of infantile hemangioma (IH), a benign vascular infantile tumor, is marked by the initial rapid proliferation of dystrophic capillaries, followed by a regression phase, which is either spontaneous or induced by the first line treatment propranolol. Although endothelial cells have been at the center of most studies, the role of stromal cells in this vascular remodeling has remained unclear. Telocytes, which are stromal cells that may be targeted by propranolol, are involved in tissue organization and angiogenesis, suggesting their role in vascular remodeling during the regression of IH. To assess changes in vascular architecture of IH and the role of telocytes, we used Skin-iDISCO
                    +
                    3-Dimensions (3D) sample imaging and in vitro models with patient-derived telocytes. Perivascular telocytes exhibited increased dendricity during regression, indicating their activation. Telocytes secretome profiling revealed a complex inhibitory program, with pentraxin 3 (PTX3) emerging as a central effector. 3D multicellular disease models demonstrated a paracrine effect blocking endothelial fibroblast growth factor receptors (FGFR) signaling via FGF2–PTX3 interaction, thereby strongly regulating endothelial proliferation, sprouting, and activation. In vitro mechanistic study and collagen IV staining analysis revealed that vascular regression is at least partially due to vascular pruning. These findings highlight the pivotal role of telocytes in orchestrating vascular remodeling during IH regression, opening therapeutic perspectives for inducing vascular normalization in pathological angiogenesis, including cancer.
title_zh: 特细胞源性五聚蛋白 3 使血管修剪成为婴儿血管瘤消退的关键驱动因素
abstract_zh:
婴儿血管瘤（IH）是一种良性血管婴儿肿瘤，其自然病程的特点是营养不良的毛细血管最初快速增殖，随后是自发的或由一线治疗普萘洛尔诱导的消退期。尽管内皮细胞一直是大多数研究的中心，但基质细胞在血管重塑中的作用仍不清楚。特洛细胞是普萘洛尔可能靶向的基质细胞，参与组织组织和血管生成，表明它们在 IH 消退过程中的血管重塑中发挥作用。为了评估 IH 血管结构的变化和特细胞的作用，我们使用 Skin-iDISCO
                    +
                    3 维 (3D) 样本成像和源自患者的特细胞的体外模型。血管周围特细胞在回归过程中表现出树突状增加，表明它们被激活。特洛细胞分泌组分析揭示了一个复杂的抑制程序，其中正五聚蛋白 3 (PTX3) 成为中央效应器。 3D 多细胞疾病模型证明了旁分泌效应通过 FGF2-PTX3 相互作用阻断内皮成纤维细胞生长因子受体 (FGFR) 信号传导，从而强烈调节内皮增殖、出芽和激活。体外机制研究和 IV 型胶原染色分析表明，血管退化至少部分归因于血管修剪。这些发现强调了特细胞在 IH 回归过程中协调血管重塑中的关键作用，为 IH 回归的治疗开辟了前景。

title: Social immunity can be a consequence and cause of social evolution
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Many social insects respond to pathogens in ways that reduce pathogen transmission within their social groups, with behaviors such as grooming or removing infected individuals. This “social immunity” within a group has been compared to the immune response of multicellular organisms. However, we lack a theoretical framework for understanding both the possible evolutionary origins and consequences of social immunity. How restrictive are the conditions for the initial evolution of social immunity? Would we expect social immunity to influence or even coevolve with other aspects of social complexity, such as colony size or the number of castes? We developed a theoretical framework for examining the evolutionary scenarios that may link social immunity and social evolution. We found that: (1) social immunity can be favored in relatively simple social systems, where relatedness between group members can vary; (2) social immunity can coevolve with the age of colony maturation, leading to colonies that grow for a longer period before they start reproducing; and (3) social immunity often leads to the evolution of larger colonies, which can then select for more worker castes. These results suggest that social immunity can be both a consequence and a cause of social evolution.
title_zh: 社会免疫可能是社会进化的结果和原因
abstract_zh: 许多社会性昆虫对病原体的反应方式是减少病原体在其社会群体内的传播，例如梳理或清除受感染的个体。群体内的这种“社会免疫”可与多细胞生物体的免疫反应进行比较。然而，我们缺乏一个理论框架来理解社会免疫可能的进化起源和后果。社会免疫最初演化的条件有多大限制？我们是否会期望社会免疫力会影响甚至与社会复杂性的其他方面（例如群体规模或种姓数量）共同进化？我们开发了一个理论框架来研究可能将社会免疫和社会进化联系起来的进化情景。我们发现：（1）在相对简单的社会系统中，群体成员之间的相关性可能会有所不同，社会免疫力可能会受到青睐； (2) 社会免疫力可以与群体成熟年龄共同进化，导致群体在开始繁殖之前生长更长时间； （3）社会免疫力往往会导致更大的群体的进化，从而可以选择更多的工人种姓。这些结果表明，社会免疫既可以是社会进化的结果，也可以是社会进化的原因。

title: Drp1-driven fragmentation of scleral mitochondria promotes myopia development
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The global epidemic of myopia constitutes a growing public health concern worldwide. Myopia development is characterized by pathological scleral remodeling through fibroblast-myofibroblast transdifferentiation (FMT) and extracellular matrix (ECM) degradation. Since myopia is progressive, the development of sustainable and safe preventive interventions is imperative. While mitochondrial dynamics critically regulate fibrotic processes in other organs, their role in scleral homeostasis has remained unexplored. Here, we identify pathological mitochondrial fragmentation, caused by increased mitochondrial fission, as a key driver of myopia progression. Using two mammalian animal models, we demonstrate that both genetic and pharmacological enhancement of mitochondrial fission (inducing mitochondrial fragmentation) exacerbates collagen loss and accelerates axial elongation, whereas genetic and pharmacological inhibition of mitochondrial fission prevents collagen degradation and attenuates myopia progression. Hypoxia-induced FMT in cultured human scleral fibroblasts (HSFs) requires activation of mitochondrial fission, revealing overproduction of reactive oxygen species (ROS) as the downstream effector on HSFs and in both animal models. Our multilevel analyses identify the mitochondrial fission-ROS axis as a key pathway linking scleral hypoxia to ECM remodeling. Lycopene, a naturally occurring carotenoid antioxidant, significantly attenuated scleral ROS levels and was found suitable for long-term application, highlighting its potential as a therapeutic agent for myopia control. Collectively, these findings have identified a therapeutic target and agent for controlling myopia progression.
title_zh: Drp1驱动的巩膜线粒体碎片促进近视发展
abstract_zh: 全球近视流行已成为全球日益严重的公共卫生问题。近视发展的特点是通过成纤维细胞-肌成纤维细胞转分化（FMT）和细胞外基质（ECM）降解引起的病理性巩膜重塑。由于近视是渐进性的，因此开发可持续且安全的预防干预措施势在必行。虽然线粒体动力学关键地调节其他器官的纤维化过程，但它们在巩膜稳态中的作用仍未被探索。在这里，我们确定由线粒体裂变增加引起的病理性线粒体碎片是近视进展的关键驱动因素。使用两种哺乳动物模型，我们证明线粒体裂变（诱导线粒体断裂）的遗传和药理学增强会加剧胶原蛋白损失并加速眼轴伸长，而线粒体裂变的遗传和药理学抑制可防止胶原蛋白降解并减弱近视进展。在培养的人巩膜成纤维细胞 (HSF) 中，缺氧诱导的 FMT 需要激活线粒体裂变，这表明活性氧 (ROS) 的过量产生是 HSF 和两种动物模型的下游效应物。我们的多层次分析确定线粒体裂变-ROS 轴是连接巩膜缺氧与 ECM 重塑的关键途径。番茄红素是一种天然存在的类胡萝卜素抗氧化剂，可显着降低巩膜 ROS 水平，并被发现适合长期使用，凸显了其作为控制近视治疗剂的潜力。科莱

title: Exploring the third dimension in quantum confinement of surface electrons
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Quantum confinement of surface electrons in two-dimensional metal-organic networks offers a powerful route to engineer electronic states for quantum and spintronic technologies. Here, we demonstrate the pivotal role of vertical variations in the surface potential on the quantum confinement of surface electrons. We investigate the confinement of both Shockley surface state and image-potential state electrons with their distinct vertical electron density distributions in a Cu-T4PT network on Cu(111). We find a substantial renormalization of the band mass of the image state, whereas the Shockley state remains almost unchanged. This notable divergence arises from the distinct three-dimensional potential landscape of the Cu-T4PT network, with a strong repulsive potential at the vertical position of the molecular backbone and leaky channels beneath the Cu coordination spheres. Our findings demonstrate the essential role of vertical potential engineering in designing quantum-confined states, thereby advancing control over electronic properties and quantum phenomena at the nanoscale.
title_zh: 探索表面电子量子限制的三维
abstract_zh: 二维金属有机网络中表面电子的量子限制为量子和自旋电子技术的电子态设计提供了一条强大的途径。在这里，我们证明了表面电势垂直变化对表面电子量子限制的关键作用。我们研究了 Cu(111) 上 Cu-T4PT 网络中肖克利表面态和像势态电子及其独特垂直电子密度分布的限制。我们发现图像态的带质量发生了实质性的重正化，而肖克利态几乎保持不变。这种显着的分歧源于 Cu-T4PT 网络独特的三维势能景观，在分子主链的垂直位置和 Cu 配位球下方的泄漏通道处具有很强的排斥势。我们的研究结果证明了垂直势工程在设计量子限制态中的重要作用，从而推进对纳米尺度电子特性和量子现象的控制。

title: Precision medicine’s blind spot: Rebalancing the evidence base to reflect women’s health
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Precision medicine requires an evidence base that reflects women’s biology, demanding reforms in funding, study design, and sex-disaggregated reporting.
title_zh: 精准医学的盲点：重新平衡证据基础以反映女性健康
abstract_zh: 精准医学需要反映女性生物学的证据基础，要求在资金、研究设计和按性别分类的报告方面进行改革。

title: A Noachian hydrosphere component in the 4.1-Ga Martian meteorite Teghaza 001
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The recent discovery of a 4.1-billion-year-old (Ga) Martian gabbroic diorite enables an assessment of water reservoirs on early Mars. Measurements of H
                    2
                    O and D/H in igneous Ca-phosphates record mixing between D-poor magmatic water and a D-rich component that retains an imprint of the ancient Martian hydrosphere. The D/H ratio of magmatic water is similar in Martian magmas with different ages and mantle sources, indicating that early differentiation processes did not fractionate H isotopes in the primordial Martian mantle. The D-rich component was assimilated by migrating magmas that interacted with aqueously altered basaltic crust. Our minimum bound on the D/H ratio of the Martian hydrosphere at 4.1 Ga (~2× the D/H ratio of Earth seawater) supports models of rapid H loss to space from Mars’ juvenile atmosphere.
title_zh: 4.1 Ga 火星陨石 Teghaza 001 中的诺亚水圈组成部分
abstract_zh:
最近发现了 41 亿年 (Ga) 火星辉长闪长岩，可以对早期火星的水库进行评估。 H 的测量
                    2
                    火成磷酸钙中的 O 和 D/H 记录了贫 D 岩浆水和富含 D 成分之间的混合，保留了古代火星水圈的印记。不同年龄和地幔来源的火星岩浆中岩浆水的D/H比值相似，表明早期的分化过程并未对原始火星地幔中的H同位素进行分馏。富含 D 的成分被迁移的岩浆同化，这些岩浆与水蚀玄武岩地壳相互作用。我们对火星水圈 D/H 比的最小限制为 4.1 Ga（约是地球海水 D/H 比的 2 倍），支持 H 从火星年轻大气层快速流失到太空的模型。

title: Human-caused sea level rise drives 21st-century worldwide water level extremes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The rate and impacts of sea level rise vary considerably around the world, but the contribution of human-caused climate change to increases in local and regional flood risks has not yet been systematically explored. Because such information is critical to local decision making, legal proceedings, and loss and damage determinations, we quantify human-caused climate change’s contributions to sea level rise at worldwide locations using budget-based and semiempirical model methods. Results show that human-caused sea level rise is quantifiable at 97% of 519 tide gauge sites and is responsible for 58% (44 to 65%) of the observed daily extreme water level exceedances over 2000–2018. On average, human-caused sea level rise has caused a near-tripling in the number of days with attributable exceedances since the 1970s.
title_zh: 人为造成的海平面上升导致 21 世纪全球水位极端
abstract_zh: 世界各地海平面上升的速度和影响差异很大，但人为气候变化对当地和区域洪水风险增加的影响尚未得到系统探讨。由于此类信息对于当地决策、法律程序以及损失和损害的确定至关重要，因此我们使用基于预算的半经验模型方法量化了人为气候变化对全球各地海平面上升的影响。结果显示，在 519 个验潮站中，97% 的人为海平面上升是可量化的，并且造成了 2000 年至 2018 年期间观测到的每日极端水位超标的 58%（44% 至 65%）。平均而言，自 20 世纪 70 年代以来，人为造成的海平面上升已导致可归因的超标天数增加了近两倍。

title: A conserved biphasic venous remodeling program governs inferior vena cava formation in zebrafish
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The Inferior Vena Cava (IVC), the largest vein in humans, develops through replacement of the embryonic cardinal veins (CVs), a complex process prone to congenital anomalies, with major clinical implications. Yet, the mechanisms underlying IVC formation remain unclear. Here, we identify the zebrafish IVC, which emerges during metamorphosis and replaces the embryonic CVs, following a biphasic sequence similar to that described in mammals. Using longitudinal imaging and clonal lineage tracing, we demonstrate that the IVC originates exclusively from preexisting venous endothelial cells. Unexpectedly, genetic and pharmacological perturbations reveal that IVC formation proceeds independently of Vegfc/Vegfr3 signaling and instead involves Vegfa-dependent venous sprouting. Last, we demonstrate that the transition from CV to IVC marks a shift from a multifunctional embryonic vein to a specialized adult conduit adapted for high-volume blood transport. Overall, we identify a venous morphogenesis program akin to the mammalian IVC formation, providing a foundation for investigating venous anomalies.
title_zh: 保守的双相静脉重塑程序控制斑马鱼下腔静脉的形成
abstract_zh: 下腔静脉 (IVC) 是人类最大的静脉，是通过替换胚胎主静脉 (CV) 发育而成的，这是一个容易出现先天性异常的复杂过程，具有重大的临床意义。然而，IVC 形成的机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们鉴定了斑马鱼 IVC，它在变态过程中出现并取代胚胎 CV，遵循与哺乳动物中描述的类似的双相序列。使用纵向成像和克隆谱系追踪，我们证明 IVC 完全源自预先存在的静脉内皮细胞。出乎意料的是，遗传和药理学扰动表明 IVC 形成独立于 Vegfc/Vegfr3 信号传导，而是涉及 Vegfa 依赖性静脉芽。最后，我们证明从 CV 到 IVC 的转变标志着从多功能胚胎静脉到适合大容量血液运输的专门成人导管的转变。总的来说，我们确定了类似于哺乳动物下腔静脉形成的静脉形态发生程序，为研究静脉异常提供了基础。

title: Restoring access to long-term social recognition memories disrupted by sleep deprivation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Long-term social memories are vital for forming and maintaining relationships, and social amnesia can disrupt daily life. Using a new paradigm to study these hippocampus-dependent memories, we show that mice can distinguish between multiple social experiences even when they occur in the same context across days. Sleep deprivation immediately after socialization disrupts memory consolidation, leading to social amnesia. Treatment with the Food and Drug Administration–approved phosphodiesterase type 4 inhibitor roflumilast during sleep deprivation protects memory consolidation, while administration immediately before testing reverses social amnesia temporarily. Optogenetic reactivation of dentate gyrus engram cells restores social memory access and enables selective retrieval of individual memories. In addition, using two cFos-based engram-tagging strategies, we find that sleep deprivation selectively affects reactivation of experience-specific engrams while not affecting engram formation or overlap. These results suggest that impaired engram reactivation contributes to sleep deprivation–induced social amnesia and highlights the role of the hippocampal dentate gyrus in maintaining and distinguishing social experiences in a single context.
title_zh: 恢复因睡眠不足而中断的长期社会认可记忆
abstract_zh: 长期的社交记忆对于建立和维持关系至关重要，而社交健忘症会扰乱日常生活。使用一种新的范式来研究这些依赖于海马体的记忆，我们发现小鼠可以区分多种社会经历，即使它们在几天内发生在相同的环境中。社交后立即剥夺睡眠会破坏记忆巩固，导致社交健忘症。在睡眠剥夺期间使用美国食品和药物管理局批准的 4 型磷酸二酯酶抑制剂罗氟司特进行治疗可保护记忆巩固，而在测试前立即服用可暂时逆转社交遗忘症。齿状回印迹细胞的光遗传学重新激活可以恢复社会记忆访问并能够选择性检索个体记忆。此外，使用两种基于 cFos 的印迹标记策略，我们发现睡眠剥夺选择性地影响特定经历印迹的重新激活，而不影响印迹形成或重叠。这些结果表明，受损的印迹重新激活会导致睡眠剥夺引起的社交遗忘症，并强调海马齿状回在维持和区分单一环境中的社交体验方面的作用。

title: Ultrarapid MC1R protein and associated plumage color evolution in the domestic chicken
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The domestic chicken exhibits extraordinarily high plumage diversity in sharp contrast to the uniform plumage phenotype in its wild ancestor, the red junglefowl. The
                    melanocortin-1 receptor
                    (
                    MC1R
                    ) locus is the most variable pigmentation locus in domestic chicken. Here we have analyzed whole-genome sequence data from 10,026 birds, including red junglefowls and 393 populations of domestic chicken. We document ultrarapid evolution of 18
                    MC1R
                    alleles, due to the accumulation of 9 missense mutations combined with reshuffling of sequence variants within the single
                    MC1R
                    exon. The lack of linkage disequilibrium at the
                    MC1R
                    locus strongly suggests that this combinatorial allele diversity is generated by interallelic gene conversion, possibly promoted by its high guanine–cytosine content. Functional analyses of MC1R variants expressed in transfected cells, using second-messenger and bioluminescence resonance energy transfer assays together with homology modeling, demonstrate that most missense mutations have significant effects on MC1R signaling and include both activating and inhibitory changes. One common
                    MC1R
                    allele differs by as many as three functionally relevant missense mutations from the most closely related
                    wild-type
                    allele, and its phenotype reflects their combined effects. Genome-wide analyses further show that
                    MC1R
                    acts as a modifier of dominant white and recessive white phenotypes caused by mutations in
                    premelanosome protein
                    and
                    tyrosinase
                    , respectively. In both cases,
                    MC1R
                    alleles promote a pure white phenotype, either by enhancing eumelanin pigmentation (dominant white) or inhibiting eumelanin pigmentation (recessive white).

abstract_zh:

                    野生型
                    等位基因，其表型反映了它们的综合效应。全基因组分析

title: Legacies of foundation species shape life after death
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Ecosystems carry memory through the material remains of organisms. Foundation species—trees, grasses, corals, and oysters—while alive are central to ecosystem structure, and the remains of these organisms continue to influence ecological processes after death. We conducted, to our knowldge, the first continental-scale exploration of how dead foundation species influence living conspecifics, leveraging long-term experiments and observations (2 to 32 years) from 10 ecosystems (five terrestrial and five marine) across the US Long Term Ecological Research Network. We found that material legacies commonly alter demographic processes, ranging from a 50% reduction to a 12-fold increase. The ubiquity of these postmortem effects reveals an underappreciated dimension of ecological memory that shapes pathways of ecosystem resilience, reorganization, and collapse, providing a critical management tool in an era of increasing disturbance- and climate-driven mortality events.
title_zh: 基础物种的遗产塑造死后的生命
abstract_zh: 生态系统通过生物体的物质遗骸携带记忆。基础物种——树木、草、珊瑚和牡蛎——在活着时是生态系统结构的核心，这些生物体的遗骸在死亡后继续影响生态过程。据我们所知，我们利用美国长期生态研究网络 10 个生态系统（5 个陆地生态系统和 5 个海洋生态系统）的长期实验和观察（2 至 32 年），对死亡的基础物种如何影响活着的同种物种进行了首次大陆规模的探索。我们发现，物质遗产通常会改变人口统计过程，范围从减少 50% 到增加 12 倍。这些尸检效应的普遍存在揭示了生态记忆的一个未被充分认识的维度，它塑造了生态系统恢复力、重组和崩溃的途径，在干扰和气候驱动的死亡事件日益增加的时代提供了关键的管理工具。

title_zh: 修正 Forrest 等人的《人属进化过程中稳定且灵活的觅食生态位的早期证据》

title: Testicular origin of epigenetic inheritance independent of sperm mitochondrial DNA and epididymal exposure
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Paternal epigenetic inheritance remains mechanistically unresolved. Recent studies propose that environmental exposures induce mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA)-dependent transcription in sperm during epididymal transit, altering small RNA content and offspring phenotypes. Here, we show that mature murine sperm are effectively devoid of mtDNA, precluding mtDNA-dependent transcription, and that sperm-borne mitochondrial RNAs originate during spermatogenesis. Testicular sperm transmitted diet-induced metabolic traits as efficiently as, and in most cohorts more efficiently than, epididymal sperm. These findings establish testicular inheritance independent of sperm mtDNA transcription and epididymal exposure.
title_zh: 表观遗传的睾丸起源独立于精子线粒体 DNA 和附睾暴露
abstract_zh: 父系表观遗传在机制上仍未得到解决。最近的研究表明，环境暴露会在附睾转运过程中诱导精子中线粒体 DNA (mtDNA) 依赖性转录，从而改变小 RNA 含量和后代表型。在这里，我们证明成熟的小鼠精子实际上缺乏 mtDNA，从而排除了 mtDNA 依赖性转录，并且精子携带的线粒体 RNA 起源于精子发生过程。睾丸精子传递饮食诱导的代谢特征的效率与附睾精子一样有效，并且在大多数群体中比附睾精子更有效。这些发现证实睾丸遗传独立于精子 mtDNA 转录和附睾暴露。

title: Quantum algorithms for viscosity solutions to nonlinear Hamilton–Jacobi equations based on an entropy penalization method
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: We present a framework for efficient extraction of the viscosity solutions of nonlinear Hamilton–Jacobi equations with convex Hamiltonians. These viscosity solutions play a central role in areas such as front propagation, mean-field games, optimal control, machine learning, and a direct application to the forced Burgers’ equation. Our method is based on an entropy penalization method which generalizes the Cole–Hopf transform from quadratic to general convex Hamiltonians, allowing an approximation of viscous Hamilton–Jacobi dynamics by a discrete-time linear dynamics which approximates a linear heat-like parabolic equation, and thus can also extend to continuous-time dynamics. This makes the method suitable for quantum simulation. The validity of these results hold for arbitrary nonlinearity that correspond to convex Hamiltonians, and for arbitrarily long times, thus obviating a chief obstacle in most quantum algorithms for nonlinear partial differential equations. We provide quantum algorithms—both analog and digital—for extracting pointwise values, gradients, minima, and function evaluations at the minimizer of the viscosity solution, without requiring nonlinear updates or full state reconstruction.
title_zh: 基于熵惩罚法的非线性 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程粘度解的量子算法
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个有效提取具有凸哈密顿量的非线性汉密尔顿-雅可比方程粘度解的框架。这些粘度解决方案在前向传播、平均场博弈、最优控制、机器学习以及强制伯格斯方程的直接应用等领域发挥着核心作用。我们的方法基于熵惩罚方法，该方法将科尔-霍普夫变换从二次哈密顿量推广到一般凸哈密顿量，允许通过离散时间线性动力学来近似粘性汉密尔顿-雅可比动力学，该离散时间线性动力学近似线性热抛物线方程，因此也可以扩展到连续时间动力学。这使得该方法适合量子模拟。这些结果的有效性适用于与凸哈密顿量相对应的任意非线性，并且适用于任意长时间，从而消除了大多数非线性偏微分方程量子算法中的主要障碍。我们提供模拟和数字量子算法，用于在粘度解的最小值处提取点值、梯度、最小值和函数评估，而不需要非线性更新或全状态重建。

title: Adaptive self-organization of global swidden forests
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Does swidden agriculture, a prototypical coupled human and natural system, exhibit a process of adaptive self-organization in which cultural practices balance environmental constraints through adaptive feedback? Here, we investigate whether quantitative signatures of adaptive self-organization can be detected in a dataset consisting of 18,000+ contiguous swidden patches in 18 remote sensing images of swidden mosaics from tropical and subtropical regions globally. We find that the distributions of patch sizes in 16 of 18 swidden areas exhibit power law patterns with scaling exponents ≈1, and correlation distances of ≈548 m. To account for these patterns, we develop a plausible ethnographically informed agent-based model of labor exchange, land use, and swidden site selection in which both sustainable and unsustainable resource uses can emerge out of interactions among individuals or households. By analyzing the model, we identify spatial synchronization of swidden sites as the driver of power law formation, while social norms of swidden labor can guide the system to an intermediate level of landscape disturbance. Both mechanisms are required to maintain harvests and ecosystem productivity at high levels. Our model advances theoretical understanding of the socioecological dynamics of swidden agriculture, and supports the hypothesis that adaptive self-organization may be a general characteristic of coupled human and natural systems.
title_zh: 全球轮流森林的自适应自组织
abstract_zh: 轮耕农业，一种典型的人类与自然耦合系统，是否表现出一种适应性自组织的过程，其中文化实践通过适应性反馈来平衡环境约束？在这里，我们研究了是否可以在由来自全球热带和亚热带地区的 18 张旋转马赛克遥感图像中的 18,000 多个连续旋转斑块组成的数据集中检测到自适应自组织的定量特征。我们发现 18 个旋转区域中的 16 个区域的斑块大小分布呈现幂律模式，缩放指数约为 1，相关距离约为 548 m。为了解释这些模式，我们开发了一个基于人种学知识的合理的劳动力交换、土地使用和轮换选址模型，其中可持续和不可持续的资源利用都可以从个人或家庭之间的互动中产生。通过分析模型，我们将轮换地点的空间同步确定为幂律形成的驱动力，而轮换劳动的社会规范可以引导系统达到景观干扰的中间水平。这两种机制都需要保持高水平的收成和生态系统生产力。我们的模型推进了对轮耕农业社会生态动力学的理论理解，并支持适应性自组织可能是人类与自然系统耦合的一般特征的假设。

title: High-throughput screening identifies a critical role of the SPOP–PABPC1 axis in lung adenocarcinoma progression
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) is the most common and deadly subtype of lung cancer, with limited therapeutic options and poor prognosis. Ubiquitination is an important posttranslational modification (PTM) that controls protein turnover, localization and interaction. The dysregulated ubiquitination machinery is a hallmark of cancer, contributing to tumor development. Identifying key E3 ubiquitin ligases and deubiquitinases in LUAD could lead to new biomarkers and treatments. Through RNA sequencing, bioinformatics, and clinical studies, SPOP has been identified as a promising E3 ligase target in LUAD. SPOP is downregulated in LUAD samples and associated with poorer patient outcomes. Functional analyses demonstrate that SPOP suppresses LUAD cell migration, proliferation, and in vivo tumor growth. Mechanistically, SPOP targets poly(A)-binding protein cytoplasmic 1 (PABPC1) for nonproteolytic ubiquitination, leading to its nuclear retention and inhibition of global protein synthesis, thereby suppressing the oncogenic effects of PABPC1. Furthermore, the deubiquitinase HAUSP is able to counteract SPOP-mediated ubiquitination of PABPC1, enhancing its oncogenic role in LUAD cells. Collectively, our findings reveal a SPOP/HAUSP-PABPC1 regulatory axis in LUAD, where SPOP and HAUSP oppositely modulate PABPC1 ubiquitination to control LUAD cell proliferation and migration. This axis represents a promising therapeutic target in LUAD.
title_zh: 高通量筛选确定了 SPOP-PABPC1 轴在肺腺癌进展中的关键作用
abstract_zh: 肺腺癌（LUAD）是最常见和致命的肺癌亚型，治疗选择有限且预后不良。泛素化是一种重要的翻译后修饰 (PTM)，可控制蛋白质周转、定位和相互作用。泛素化机制失调是癌症的一个标志，有助于肿瘤的发展。鉴定 LUAD 中关键的 E3 泛素连接酶和去泛素酶可能会带来新的生物标志物和治疗方法。通过 RNA 测序、生物信息学和临床研究，SPOP 已被确定为 LUAD 中一个有前途的 E3 连接酶靶点。 SPOP 在 LUAD 样本中表达下调，并与较差的患者预后相关。功能分析表明，SPOP 抑制 LUAD 细胞迁移、增殖和体内肿瘤生长。从机制上讲，SPOP 靶向多聚腺苷酸结合蛋白胞质 1 (PABPC1) 进行非蛋白水解泛素化，导致其核保留并抑制整体蛋白质合成，从而抑制 PABPC1 的致癌作用。此外，去泛素酶 HAUSP 能够抵消 SPOP 介导的 PABPC1 泛素化，增强其在 LUAD 细胞中的致癌作用。总的来说，我们的研究结果揭示了 LUAD 中的 SPOP/HAUSP-PABPC1 调控轴，其中 SPOP 和 HAUSP 反向调节 PABPC1 泛素化以控制 LUAD 细胞增殖和迁移。该轴代表了 LUAD 中一个有前途的治疗靶点。

title: Nf2 orchestrates β-arrestin2-biased PTH1R signaling to couple bone mass with skeletal integrity
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Precise spatiotemporal regulation of parathyroid hormone (PTH) and PTH-related peptide signaling through the parathyroid hormone receptor 1 (PTH1R) is fundamental to skeletal development and metabolic bone remodeling, yet the intracellular mechanisms that fine-tune this signaling remain a central unanswered question. Here, we identify neurofibromin 2 (Nf2) as an essential regulator of PTH1R trafficking and signaling. Conditional knockout of
                    Nf2
                    in chondrocytes results in short-limbed dwarfism, disrupted growth plate organization, and suppressed chondrocyte proliferation and hypertrophy, and a paradoxical bone phenotype marked by trabecular hyperproliferation and cortical thinning. Mechanistically, Nf2 binds to the PTH1R C-terminal domain (464–591 aa) to promote selective receptor internalization via β-arrestin2 without altering G protein–coupled receptor kinase-mediated PTH1R phosphorylation. Loss of
                    Nf2
                    decouples PTH1R from β-arrestin2‐mediated endocytosis, leading to sustained and amplified signaling through the cAMP‐CREB‐pSOX9 (S181) and VEGF axis. Consequently,
                    Nf2
                    -deficient mice exhibited bone changes similar to those induced by the PTH1R agonist abaloparatide. These findings establish Nf2 as a chondrocyte‐intrinsic gatekeeper of PTH1R signaling and uncover a cellular mechanism for bone homeostasis by targeting Nf2‐mediated β-arrestin2 recruitment.
title_zh: Nf2 协调偏向 β-arrestin2 的 PTH1R 信号传导，将骨量与骨骼完整性结合起来
abstract_zh:
通过甲状旁腺激素受体 1 (PTH1R) 精确时空调节甲状旁腺激素 (PTH) 和 PTH 相关肽信号传导是骨骼发育和代谢性骨重塑的基础，但微调这种信号传导的细胞内机制仍然是一个尚未解答的核心问题。在这里，我们确定神经纤维蛋白 2 (Nf2) 是 PTH1R 运输和信号转导的重要调节因子。有条件淘汰
                    NF2
                    软骨细胞中的短肢侏儒症，生长板组织破坏，软骨细胞增殖和肥大受到抑制，以及以小梁过度增殖和皮质变薄为特征的矛盾骨表型。从机制上讲，Nf2 与 PTH1R C 末端结构域 (464-591 aa) 结合，通过 β-arrestin2 促进选择性受体内化，而不改变 G 蛋白偶联受体激酶介导的 PTH1R 磷酸化。损失
                    NF2
                    将 PTH1R 与 β-arrestin2 介导的内吞作用解耦，从而通过 cAMP-CREB-pSOX9 (S181) 和 VEGF 轴产生持续且放大的信号传导。因此，
                    NF2
                    -缺陷小鼠表现出与 PTH1R 激动剂 abaloparatide 诱导的骨骼变化类似的变化。这些发现确立了 Nf2 作为 PTH1R 信号传导的软骨细胞内在看门人，并通过靶向 Nf2 介导的 β-arrestin2 募集揭示了骨稳态的细胞机制。

title: Dark diversity framework reconciles Darwin’s naturalization conundrum for freshwater fish invasions
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The spread of invasive species poses a major threat to global biodiversity, yet predicting successful establishment of exotic species in novel environments remains challenging. Darwin’s naturalization conundrum is a longstanding debate over whether exotic species closely or distantly related to native communities are more likely to succeed. Despite its long history, empirical studies continue to yield conflicting evidence. Here, we introduce the dark diversity concept, which refers to species that could theoretically inhabit a site but are currently absent. Combined with observed diversity, dark diversity integrates information on the potential diversity (site-specific species pool size) of the resident community and how completely that pool is locally present (community completeness). Analyzing a 340-y record of successful and failed fish introductions across 516 Swedish lakes, we showed that the effect of phylogenetic relatedness on invasion outcome depends on dark diversity context. Exotics closely related to resident species were more likely to establish in communities with smaller species pools and higher completeness, whereas phylogenetically distant exotic species were more successful in communities with larger species pools and lower completeness. Models with observed species richness obtained considerably less support. Thus, integrating the dark diversity framework clarifies the contrasting effects of phylogenetic relatedness on invasion outcomes, and helps reconcile this 160-y-old conundrum.
title_zh: 黑暗多样性框架解决了达尔文关于淡水鱼入侵的归化难题
abstract_zh: 入侵物种的蔓延对全球生物多样性构成了重大威胁，但预测外来物种在新环境中成功定居仍然具有挑战性。达尔文的归化难题是一个长期存在的争论，即与本土群落关系密切或关系较远的外来物种是否更有可能成功。尽管其历史悠久，但实证研究仍然得出相互矛盾的证据。在这里，我们引入暗多样性概念，它指的是理论上可以栖息在某个地点但目前不存在的物种。与观察到的多样性相结合，暗多样性整合了有关常驻群落的潜在多样性（特定地点物种库大小）以及该库在当地存在的完整性（群落完整性）的信息。通过分析瑞典 516 个湖泊 340 年来成功和失败的鱼类引入记录，我们发现系统发育相关性对入侵结果的影响取决于暗多样性背景。与常住物种密切相关的外来物种更有可能在物种库较小且完整性较高的群落中建立，而系统发育上距离较远的外来物种在物种库较大且完整性较低的群落中更成功。观察到物种丰富度的模型获得的支持要少得多。因此，整合暗多样性框架阐明了系统发育相关性对入侵结果的对比影响，并有助于解决这个 160 年前的难题。

title: Disruption to TFEB signaling and autophagy in newly formed oligodendrocytes leads to aberrant generation of CNS myelin
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Myelin is a defining feature of the vertebrate nervous system, yet the cellular and molecular mechanisms governing its integrity remain poorly understood. Here, using volume electron microscopy and a knock-in mouse line targeting newly formed oligodendrocytes, we reconstruct early optic nerve myelination and examine retinal ganglion cell axon ensheathment. We observe that newly formed myelin sheaths exhibit membrane protrusions and occasional degenerative myelin “whorls.” Conditional disruption of the transcription factor EB (TFEB)-autophagy pathway in newly formed oligodendrocytes significantly increases the abundance of these aberrant myelin structures, indicating that this pathway is required for proper myelin formation and integrity. Importantly, this pathway acts independently of the well-established function of TFEB that represses myelin sheath growth. Together, our findings identify a role for TFEB-dependent autophagy in establishing proper myelin structure during development, providing insights into the oligodendrocyte-intrinsic mechanisms that regulate myelin integrity.
title_zh: 新形成的少突胶质细胞中 TFEB 信号传导和自噬的破坏导致中枢神经系统髓磷脂的异常生成
abstract_zh: 髓磷脂是脊椎动物神经系统的一个决定性特征，但控制其完整性的细胞和分子机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们使用体积电子显微镜和针对新形成的少突胶质细胞的敲入小鼠系，重建了早期视神经髓鞘形成并检查了视网膜神经节细胞轴突鞘。我们观察到新形成的髓鞘表现出膜突起和偶尔的退变髓鞘“螺纹”。新形成的少突胶质细胞中转录因子 EB (TFEB)-自噬途径的条件性破坏显着增加了这些异常髓磷脂结构的丰度，表明该途径是正常髓磷脂形成和完整性所必需的。重要的是，该通路的作用独立于 TFEB 抑制髓鞘生长的既定功能。总之，我们的研究结果确定了 TFEB 依赖性自噬在发育过程中建立适当髓磷脂结构的作用，为了解调节髓磷脂完整性的少突胶质细胞内在机制提供了见解。

title: Structural basis of long-range transcription–translation coupling
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Structures recently have been reported of molecular assemblies that mediate transcription–translation coupling in
                    Escherichia coli
                    . In these molecular assemblies, termed “coupled transcription–translation complexes” or “TTC-B,” RNA polymerase (RNAP) directly interacts with the ribosome, the transcription elongation factor NusG or its paralog RfaH forms a bridge between RNAP and ribosome, and the transcription elongation factor NusA optionally forms a second bridge between RNAP and ribosome. Here, we report structures of coupled transcription–translation complexes having mRNA spacers between RNAP and ribosome longer than the maximum-length mRNA spacer compatible with formation of TTC-B. The results define a class of coupled transcription–translation complex, termed “TTC-LC,” where “LC” denotes “long-range coupling.” TTC-LC differs from TTC-B by a ~60° rotation and ~70 Å translation of RNAP relative to ribosome, resulting in loss of direct interactions between RNAP and ribosome and creation of a ~70 Å gap between RNAP and ribosome. TTC-LC accommodates long mRNA spacers by looping out mRNA from the gap between RNAP and ribosome. We present evidence that TTC-LC is a functional intermediate in assembling and disassembling TTC-B, mediating pre-TTC-B transcription–translation coupling before a ribosome catches up to RNAP, and mediating post-TTC-B transcription–translation coupling after a ribosome stops moving and RNAP continues moving. We show that TTC-B, but not TTC-LC, is severely defective in RNA-hairpin-dependent transcription termination, and that both TTC-B and TTC-LC are severely defective in Rho-dependent transcription termination.
title_zh: 长程转录-翻译耦合的结构基础
abstract_zh:
最近报道了介导转录-翻译耦合的分子组装体的结构
                    大肠杆菌
                    。在这些被称为“偶联转录-翻译复合物”或“TTC-B”的分子组装体中，RNA聚合酶（RNAP）直接与核糖体相互作用，转录延伸因子NusG或其旁系同源物RfaH在RNAP和核糖体之间形成桥梁，并且转录延伸因子NusA任选地在RNAP和核糖体之间形成第二个桥梁。在这里，我们报道了转录-翻译偶联复合物的结构，其RNAP和核糖体之间的mRNA间隔比与TTC-B的形成相容的最大长度mRNA间隔更长。结果定义了一类偶联的转录-翻译复合体，称为“TTC-LC”，其中“LC”表示“长程偶联”。 TTC-LC 与 TTC-B 的不同之处在于 RNAP 相对于核糖体有约 60° 旋转和约 70 Å 平移，导致 RNAP 和核糖体之间直接相互作用的丧失，并在 RNAP 和核糖体之间产生约 70 Å 间隙。 TTC-LC 通过从 RNAP 和核糖体之间的间隙环出 mRNA 来容纳长 mRNA 间隔区。我们提供的证据表明，TTC-LC 是组装和分解 TTC-B 的功能中间体，在核糖体赶上 RNAP 之前介导 TTC-B 前转录-翻译偶联，并在核糖体停止移动且 RNAP 继续移动后介导 TTC-B 后转录-翻译偶联。我们发现 TTC-B（而非 TTC-LC）在 RNA 发夹依赖性转录终止子方面存在严重缺陷。

title: GREM1/FGFR1-activated myofibroblasts induce immunosuppression and accelerate metastasis in high-grade serous ovarian cancer
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Joint effect of cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs) and regulatory T cells (Tregs) can drive immunosuppression in high-grade serous ovarian cancer (HGSOC), thereby promoting tumor metastasis and limiting the clinical benefit of PD-1/PD-L1 blockade. However, the mechanistic crosstalk between CAFs and Tregs remains unclear. By integrating bulk RNA-seq, single-cell RNA-seq datasets, and spatial transcriptomics datasets with functional assays, we identified a population of TGF-β1-driven Gremlin1 (GREM1)
                    +
                    myofibroblastic CAFs (myCAFs) enriched in HGSOC metastatic lesions. These GREM1
                    +
                    myCAFs activated the FGFR1-MAPKs-NFκB-TDO2-kynurenine axis via autocrine signaling, promoting tumor growth, metastasis, and immune evasion characterized by the infiltration of CD4
                    +
                    Tregs and dysfunctional CD8
                    +
                    T cells. GREM1 knockdown suppressed tumor metastasis, restored antitumor T cells response, remodeled CAF subtype composition and potentiated anti-PD-1 therapy efficacy. This study highlights the pro-metastatic role of GREM1
                    +
                    myCAFs across multiple tumors and provides a rationale for combining anti-PD-1 therapy for metastatic HGSOC.
title_zh: GREM1/FGFR1激活的肌成纤维细胞诱导免疫抑制并加速高级别浆液性卵巢癌的转移
abstract_zh:
癌症相关成纤维细胞 (CAF) 和调节性 T 细胞 (Treg) 的联合作用可以驱动高级别浆液性卵巢癌 (HGSOC) 的免疫抑制，从而促进肿瘤转移并限制 PD-1/PD-L1 阻断的临床益处。然而，CAF 和 Tregs 之间的机制串扰仍不清楚。通过将批量 RNA-seq、单细胞 RNA-seq 数据集和空间转录组数据集与功能分析相结合，我们鉴定了一组 TGF-β1 驱动的 Gremlin1 (GREM1)
                    +
                    肌纤维母细胞 CAF (myCAF) 在 HGSOC 转移灶中富集。这些GREM1
                    +
                    myCAFs通过自分泌信号激活FGFR1-MAPKs-NFκB-TDO2-犬尿氨酸轴，促进肿瘤生长、转移和以CD4浸润为特征的免疫逃避
                    +
                    Tregs 和功能失调的 CD8
                    +
                    T细胞。 GREM1 敲低可抑制肿瘤转移、恢复抗肿瘤 T 细胞反应、重塑 CAF 亚型组成并增强抗 PD-1 治疗功效。这项研究强调了 GREM1 的促转移作用
                    +
                    myCAF 跨越多个肿瘤，并为结合抗 PD-1 疗法治疗转移性 HGSOC 提供了理论基础。

title: Opportunities to strengthen US phosphorus supply resilience through circular pathways
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: With diminishing availability of high-quality phosphate rock and increasing supply uncertainties, improving phosphorus (P) recovery, recycling, and waste reduction has become critical for sustaining agricultural production. We developed an integrated P cycling and soil dynamics model to quantify 7 circular strategies for reducing mineral P demand in the United States, using data for 91 major crops and 20 livestock types across 3,142 counties from 1866 to 2050. We show that soil residual P reuse has the largest potential to reduce mineral P demand in the United States. By 2023, total soil P stocks had accumulated to 99 Tg, equivalent to approximately 68% of mineral P inputs over 1866–2023. For 2024–2050, projections under various socioeconomic scenarios indicate that soil residual P reuse alone could potentially supply approximately 2.4 to 5.1 times projected US mineral P demand, with substantial residual P stocks accumulated in both cropland and pastureland soils. Recycling from sewage sludge and livestock and crop by-products could collectively offset an additional approximately 0.5 to 1.0 times mineral P demand, while food waste reduction could reduce requirements by approximately 0.3 times. Spatial analyses further highlight a mismatch between circular P availability and cropland P demand, with high mineral P avoidance potential concentrated in the South and West, but relatively low ratios of circular P supply to projected mineral P demand across most counties in the Midwest. These findings provide spatially explicit and decision-relevant insights into how circular P strategies can enhance the stability and resilience of US food systems under future resource constraints.
title_zh: 通过循环途径增强美国磷供应弹性的机会
abstract_zh: 随着优质磷矿的供应量不断减少，供应不确定性不断增加，提高磷 (P) 的回收、循环利用和减少废物已成为维持农业生产的关键。我们开发了一个综合磷循环和土壤动力学模型，利用 1866 年至 2050 年 3,142 个县的 91 种主要作物和 20 种牲畜类型的数据，量化了美国减少矿物磷需求的 7 种循环策略。我们表明，土壤残留磷再利用在减少美国矿物磷需求方面具有最大的潜力。到 2023 年，土壤磷储量总量已累积至 99 Tg，相当于 1866 年至 2023 年期间矿物磷投入的约 68%。对于 2024-2050 年，各种社会经济情景下的预测表明，仅土壤残留磷再利用就可能供应美国预计矿物磷需求的约 2.4 至 5.1 倍，农田和牧场土壤中积累了大量残留磷库存。污水污泥、牲畜和农作物副产品的回收可以总共额外抵消约 0.5 至 1.0 倍的矿物磷需求，而减少食物垃圾则可以减少约 0.3 倍的需求。空间分析进一步凸显了循环磷供应量与农田磷需求之间的不匹配，高矿产磷规避潜力集中在南部和西部，但中西部大多数县的循环磷供应与预计矿产磷需求的比率相对较低。这些发现为 P str 的循环方式提供了空间明确且与决策相关的见解

title: Differential Wnt/β-catenin signaling via TCF7L2/LEF1 binding specificity shapes cellular and tumor phenotypes
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The mechanisms by which Wnt/β-catenin signaling regulates gene expression in a tissue- and context-specific manner remain poorly understood, limiting our ability to target the aberrant cell growth typical of many Wnt-driven cancers. Here, we focus on malignant liver tumors driven by activating
                    CTNNB1
                    (β-catenin) mutations that nevertheless display distinct phenotypic states and Wnt outputs. By profiling patient-derived organoids via single-cell transcriptomics and chromatin dynamics, we identify subtype-specific transcriptional and epigenetic profiles. Using CUT&RUN, we show that β-catenin engages distinct genomic regions, dictated by differential association with TCF/LEF family transcription factors. Specifically, we define a sequence-specific regulatory element engaged by β-catenin only upon interaction with TCF7L2, revealing that partner choice, independent of
                    CTNNB1
                    mutational status, ultimately determines cell fate. Our findings, validated across multiple tumor models and patient tissues, offer a framework for understanding how differential β-catenin-TCF/LEF interaction orchestrates context-specific Wnt signaling outcomes.
title_zh: 通过 TCF7L2/LEF1 结合特异性的差异 Wnt/β-连环蛋白信号传导塑造细胞和肿瘤表型
abstract_zh:
Wnt/β-连环蛋白信号传导以组织和环境特异性方式调节基因表达的机制仍然知之甚少，这限制了我们针对许多 Wnt 驱动的癌症典型的异常细胞生长的能力。在这里，我们重点关注由激活驱动的恶性肝肿瘤
                    CTNNB1
                    （β-连环蛋白）突变，但表现出不同的表型状态和 Wnt 输出。通过单细胞转录组学和染色质动力学分析患者来源的类器官，我们确定了亚型特异性转录和表观遗传图谱。使用 CUT&RUN，我们表明 β-连环蛋白参与不同的基因组区域，这是由与 TCF/LEF 家族转录因子的差异关联决定的。具体来说，我们定义了仅在与 TCF7L2 相互作用时由 β-catenin 参与的序列特异性调控元件，揭示了伙伴选择，独立于
                    CTNNB1
                    突变状态，最终决定细胞的命运。我们的研究结果在多个肿瘤模型和患者组织中得到验证，为理解β-连环蛋白-TCF/LEF 相互作用的差异如何协调特定环境的 Wnt 信号转导结果提供了一个框架。

title: Expression of four mitochondrial tRNAs from only two loci
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Transfer RNAs (tRNAs) are among the few genes retained in animal mitochondrial genomes after more than a billion years of gene loss. These ancient bacterial vestiges are often structurally aberrant and less stable than their bacterial or cytosolic tRNA counterparts. In some lineages, mitochondrial tRNAs (mt-tRNAs) have become so truncated that the loss of one or both arms has expanded our understanding of what constitutes a functional tRNA. Here, we report another radical departure from canonical tRNA gene architecture: two overlapping tRNAs produced from opposite strands of the same locus. These “mirror” tRNA pairs eliminate the need to retain separate loci for all tRNA genes, as a single locus can produce tRNAs to decode two different amino acids. We show that these mirror tRNAs are aminoacylated and demonstrate their presence in mitoribosomes. Furthermore, mirror tRNAs display strand-specific patterns of nucleotide modification and RNA editing, reflecting specific posttranscriptional maturation that depends on transcriptional orientation. This demonstration of functional, bidirectional tRNA expression reveals an unexpected strategy by which mitochondrial genomes maintain a complete set of tRNAs in the face of unrelenting gene loss. The presence of mirror tRNAs has broad implications for the evolution of tRNA-interacting enzymes, mitochondrial biology, and even the origins of the protein synthesis machinery itself.
title_zh: 仅从两个位点表达四种线粒体 tRNA
abstract_zh: 转移 RNA (tRNA) 是动物线粒体基因组中保留的少数基因之一，经过十亿多年的基因丢失。这些古老的细菌遗迹通常结构异常，并且比细菌或胞质 tRNA 对应物更不稳定。在某些谱系中，线粒体 tRNA (mt-tRNA) 已被截短，以至于一只或双臂的丢失扩大了我们对功能性 tRNA 构成的理解。在这里，我们报告了与典型 tRNA 基因结构的另一个根本背离：从同一基因座的相反链产生的两个重叠的 tRNA。这些“镜像”tRNA 对消除了为所有 tRNA 基因保留单独基因座的需要，因为单个基因座可以产生 tRNA 来解码两种不同的氨基酸。我们证明这些镜像 tRNA 被氨酰化，并证明它们存在于线粒体中。此外，镜像 tRNA 显示核苷酸修饰和 RNA 编辑的链特异性模式，反映了取决于转录方向的特定转录后成熟。这种功能性、双向 tRNA 表达的展示揭示了一种意想不到的策略，线粒体基因组通过该策略在面对持续的基因丢失时维持一套完整的 tRNA。镜像 tRNA 的存在对于 tRNA 相互作用酶的进化、线粒体生物学，甚至蛋白质合成机制本身的起源具有广泛的影响。

title: A gustatory receptor–Akt axis couples nutrient sensing to hematopoiesis in the silkworm
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Hematopoiesis is tightly linked to an organism’s metabolic state, yet the molecular sensors that convert nutrient availability into hematopoietic output remain poorly understood. Here, we identify a fructose-sensitive gustatory receptor, BmGr9, as a cell-intrinsic nutrient sensor that links circulating sugar levels to blood cell proliferation in the silkworm
                    Bombyx mori
                    . We show that fructose, whose concentration rises sharply after feeding, stimulates hematopoietic organ (HPO) proliferation through BmGr9-dependent Ca
                    2+
                    influx and activation of the Akt–ornithine decarboxylase/polyamine signaling pathway. CRISPR/Cas9-mediated knockout of BmGr9 reduces hemocyte production and impairs fructose-induced Akt phosphorylation and polyamine synthesis. We further demonstrate that the fat body polyol pathway produces fructose de novo, which then acts as an interorgan metabolic signal that promotes hematopoiesis and shapes gene expression in the wing-disc/hematopoietic complex. Together, these findings define a nutrient–receptor–signaling axis that mechanistically links dietary and endogenous fructose to hematopoietic proliferation. By revealing an unexpected systemic role for a gustatory receptor, our work expands the conceptual framework of nutrient sensing and suggests conserved principles by which metabolic state governs blood cell development across animals.
title_zh: 蚕的味觉受体 - Akt 轴将营养感应与造血作用结合起来
abstract_zh:
造血与生物体的代谢状态密切相关，但将营养物质利用率转化为造血输出的分子传感器仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们确定了一种果糖敏感味觉受体 BmGr9，它是一种细胞内在营养传感器，可将循环糖水平与蚕的血细胞增殖联系起来
                    家蚕
                    。我们发现，喂食后浓度急剧上升的果糖通过 BmGr9 依赖性 Ca2+ 刺激造血器官 (HPO) 增殖
                    2+
                    Akt-鸟氨酸脱羧酶/多胺信号通路的流入和激活。 CRISPR/Cas9 介导的 BmGr9 敲除会减少血细胞生成并损害果糖诱导的 Akt 磷酸化和多胺合成。我们进一步证明，脂肪体多元醇途径从头产生果糖，然后果糖充当器官间代谢信号，促进造血并塑造翼盘/造血复合体中的基因表达。总之，这些发现定义了营养-受体-信号轴，该轴在机制上将饮食和内源果糖与造血增殖联系起来。通过揭示味觉受体意想不到的系统作用，我们的工作扩展了营养感知的概念框架，并提出了代谢状态控制动物血细胞发育的保守原则。

title: IL-4 peptide hydrogel reprograms MSC heterogeneity toward the CD106+ population for enhanced renal repair
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) exhibit significant heterogeneity, which limits their therapeutic efficacy in regenerative medicine. Here, we introduce a self-assembled interleukin-4 (IL-4) peptide hydrogel designed to shift MSC populations toward a homogeneous CD106
                    +
                    subset with enhanced regenerative and immunomodulatory capabilities. To evaluate their therapeutic potential, MSCs with the IL-4 hydrogel were administered to a murine model of acute kidney injury (AKI) via renal capsule transplantation. Compared with untreated MSCs, encapsulated MSCs exhibited superior engraftment and survival, leading to significant improvements in renal function, as evidenced by reduced serum creatinine levels, attenuated tubular necrosis, and decreased inflammatory infiltrates. These findings highlight the IL-4 peptide hydrogel as a promising platform for overcoming MSC heterogeneity and manufacturing disease-specific MSCs, offering a scalable strategy for advanced cell therapies in AKI and beyond.
title_zh: IL-4 肽水凝胶将 MSC 异质性重新编程为 CD106+ 群体，以增强肾脏修复
abstract_zh:
间充质干细胞（MSC）表现出显着的异质性，这限制了它们在再生医学中的治疗功效。在这里，我们介绍了一种自组装白细胞介素 4 (IL-4) 肽水凝胶，旨在将 MSC 群体转向均质 CD106
                    +
                    具有增强的再生和免疫调节能力的子集。为了评估其治疗潜力，通过肾被膜移植将带有 IL-4 水凝胶的 MSC 施用于急性肾损伤 (AKI) 小鼠模型。与未经处理的 MSC 相比，封装的 MSC 表现出优异的移植和存活率，导致肾功能显着改善，血清肌酐水平降低、肾小管坏死减弱和炎症浸润减少就证明了这一点。这些发现凸显了 IL-4 肽水凝胶作为克服 MSC 异质性和制造疾病特异性 MSC 的有前途的平台，为 AKI 及其他疾病的先进细胞疗法提供了可扩展的策略。

title: Single-particle tunneling spectrum with a robust superconducting gap in La2PrNi2O7 thin films at ambient pressure
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The recent discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in nickelate systems has generated tremendous interest in the community. The core issue to understand the pairing mechanism is the superconducting gap and its symmetry. We have successfully synthesized the superconducting thin films of La
                    2
                    PrNi
                    2
                    O
                    7
                    with an onset transition temperature of 41.5 kelvins and measured the superconducting tunneling spectra after exposing the superconducting layer by using the tip-excavation technique. The spectrum shows a robust superconducting gap at about Δ ≈ 19 milli–electron volts, and fittings based on the Dynes model indicate that this dominant gap should have an
                    s
                    -wave structure with low anisotropy, which allows us to put the priority in selecting the
                    s
                    ±
