title: Color‐Pure Organic Luminophores: Characteristics, Definitions, Physical Basis and Fundamental Design Principles
source: Wiley-Online-Library: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Color‐pure all‐organic emitters, i.e., with narrow spectral characteristics, are intensively studied for high‐definition organic LEDs (mainly based on multi‐resonance structures), as well as for multi‐color bioimaging (mainly based on polymethine‐like structures). To guide targeted materials design beyond tedious trial‐and‐error procedures, this educative review discusses the spectral characteristics (including units and unambiguous definition of the spectral width, and the occurrence of artifacts), the physical basis of the spectral broadening (vibronic coupling, environmental effects, and a basal understanding of geometries in the ground and excited states). Subsequently, the structural factors are distilled, which govern reduced geometry change between ground and excited state (GS, ES)—quantified as the change in bond‐length alternation (Δ
                    BLA
                    ) upon excitation. On this basis, three complementary design strategies emerge, that is: (a) full and (b) partial bond length equalization, yielding intrinsically small‐ and mixed‐BLA emitters, and (c) MO topology inversion, with large BLA in GS and ES; secondary factors include, (d) rigidification and (e) the extension of the conjugated path. Finally, we address challenges and solutions when targeting not only color‐pure but also bright emitters. In all, our insights allow for an intuitive, chemical approach towards efficient color‐pure emitters beyond sole generation of structures and numbers.
title_zh: 纯色有机发光体：特征、定义、物理基础和基本设计原则
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    纯色全有机发射器，即具有窄光谱特性，正在针对高清有机 LED（主要基于多共振结构）以及多色生物成像（主要基于类聚次甲基结构）进行深入研究。为了指导目标材料设计超越繁琐的试错程序，这篇教育性评论讨论了光谱特性（包括光谱宽度的单位和明确定义以及伪影的出现）、光谱展宽的物理基础（振动耦合、环境效应以及对基态和激发态几何形状的基本理解）。随后，结构因素被提炼出来，这些因素控制着基态和激发态（GS，ES）之间几何形状变化的减少——量化为键长交替的变化（Δ
                    乙二胺四乙酸
                    ）在激发时。在此基础上，出现了三种互补的设计策略，即：（a）完全键长均衡和（b）部分键长均衡，产生本质上小的混合BLA发射器，以及（c）MO拓扑反转，在GS和ES中具有大BLA；次要因素包括（d）刚性化和（e）共轭路径的延伸。最后，我们不仅针对纯色发射器，还针对明亮发射器，提出了挑战和解决方案。总而言之，我们的见解允许采用直观的化学方法来实现高效的纯色发射器，而不仅仅是单独生成结构和数字。

title: Inverse Vulcanization Through Epoxide Chemistry: A Low Temperature Non‐Olefin Route to Sulfur‐Rich Polymer Networks
source: Wiley-Online-Library: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Inverse vulcanization represents an effective strategy for transforming surplus elemental sulfur into value‐added polymeric materials; however, current approaches are largely restricted to olefin‐based monomers and rely on high‐temperature radical processes. Here, we establish an epoxide‐enabled inverse vulcanization platform that expands sulfur‐rich polymer formation beyond olefin chemistry under solvent‐free, base‐catalyzed conditions. Mechanistic studies confirm a nucleophilic ring‐opening pathway in which sulfur is incorporated into the polymer backbone when catalyzed by base catalyst. By integrating bio‐based epoxidized vegetable oils with elemental sulfur, sulfur‐rich networks are constructed through a catalytically tunable ring‐opening pathway, enabling controllable network formation. The resulting materials maintain high sulfur content while exhibiting tunable mechanical properties, shape memory behavior, and strong adhesion on stainless steel, with lap shear strengths adjustable up to 10 MPa. The combination of mild processing conditions, renewable monomer feedstocks, and robust structural performance demonstrates a controllable and energy‐efficient route for advancing inverse vulcanization toward sustainable adhesive and functional material applications.
title_zh: 通过环氧化物化学进行逆硫化：形成富硫聚合物网络的低温非烯烃途径
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  逆硫化是将多余的元素硫转化为增值聚合物材料的有效策略；然而，目前的方法很大程度上仅限于基于烯烃的单体，并且依赖于高温自由基过程。在这里，我们建立了一个环氧化物反硫化平台，可在无溶剂、碱催化条件下将富硫聚合物的形成扩展到烯烃化学之外。机理研究证实了一种亲核开环途径，其中硫在碱性催化剂的催化下结合到聚合物主链中。通过将生物基环氧化植物油与元素硫结合，通过催化可调的开环途径构建富硫网络，从而实现可控的网络形成。所得材料保持高硫含量，同时表现出可调的机械性能、形状记忆行为以及对不锈钢的强附着力，搭接剪切强度可调至 10 MPa。温和的加工条件、可再生单体原料和坚固的结构性能相结合，展示了一种可控且节能的途径，可推动逆向硫化走向可持续的粘合剂和功能材料应用。

title: In Situ Turning Pollutants Into Catalysts: A Phase‐Transition Self‐Catalysis Paradigm for Sustainable Water Treatment
source: Wiley-Online-Library: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Decentralized water treatment is constrained by high chemical demand and rapid catalyst deactivation, limiting the low‐carbon remediation of waters containing heavy metals and organic micropollutants. Herein, we report a phase‐transition‐driven self‐catalytic strategy that converts metal pollutants in situ into active catalysts for integrated purification and valorization. In a representative Ni
                    2+
                    /phenol system, peroxymonosulfate (PMS) shifts the Ni
                    2+
                    ⇌ Ni(OH)
                    2
                    equilibrium toward NiOOH nanoparticle formation, which rapidly induces phenol polymerization and co‐precipitation with residual Ni(OH)
                    2
                    . Consequently, phenol is completely removed, while Ni
                    2+
                    decreases from 28 to 0.08 mg L
                    −1
                    with ultralow PMS consumption. Mechanistic studies identify NiOOH as the reactive phase that oxidizes phenol to phenoxy radicals via proton‐coupled electron transfer and proton transfer–electron transfer pathways. This strategy is highly effective for treating industrial phenolic wastewater and offers a modular platform adaptable to various metal ions (e.g., Co
                    2+
                    , Cu
                    2+
                    ) and oxidants (e.g., NaClO, Peroxydisulfate). Combined with effective products recovery, it offers substantial economic and environmental advantages over existing methods. This work recasts pollutants from treatment targets into treatment agents, offering a fresh, and scalable route to sustainable water remediation.
title_zh: 原位将污染物转化为催化剂：可持续水处理的相变自催化范例
abstract_zh:

                    分散式水处理受到高化学品需求和快速催化剂失活的限制，限制了含有重金属和有机微污染物的水体的低碳修复。在此，我们报告了一种相变驱动的自催化策略，可将金属污染物原位转化为活性催化剂，以进行集成纯化和增值。以倪代表

                    ⇌ 镍(OH)
                    2

                    2

                    从 28 减少至 0.08 mg/L

                    具有超低的 PMS 消耗。机理研究确定 NiOOH 是通过质子耦合电子转移和质子转移-电子转移途径将苯酚氧化为苯氧基自由基的反应相。该策略对于处理工业酚类废水非常有效，并提供了一个适用于各种金属离子（例如，Co
                    2+

                    ）和氧化剂（例如，NaClO、过二硫酸盐）。与有效的产品回收相结合，与出口相比，它具有显着的经济和环境优势

title: A Lipid‐Conjugation Strategy for Intracellular Reactive Oxygen Species Control in Hepatic Cells
source: Wiley-Online-Library: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Synthetic catalytic antioxidants offer attractive alternatives to enzymatic redox regulators, yet their biological application is frequently limited by poor stability, formulation challenges, and insufficient control over intracellular localization. Here, we report a lipid conjugation strategy that enables the covalent integration of manganese Salen (EUK) catalysts into phospholipid membranes. A modular synthetic route is established in which a carboxylate‐functionalized EUK derivative is coupled to an amine‐terminated phospholipid tail, yielding a structurally defined phospholipid‐EUK conjugate that retains catalytic activity upon liposome formulation, with controlled catalyst loading and long‐term colloidal integrity. The resulting liposomes exhibit efficient catalytic degradation of reactive oxygen species (ROS) with activity scaling with conjugate content. Importantly, covalent anchoring of the catalyst within the lipid bilayer prevents aggregation and precipitation observed for non‐conjugated analogues. Using an acetaminophen challenged steatotic HepaRG cell model, we demonstrate that lipid conjugation enables intracellular delivery of the catalyst and sustained reduction of elevated ROS levels without inducing cytotoxicity. This effort establishes a chemically precise approach for positioning organometallic catalysts within biomimetic membranes and highlights these conjugates as versatile platforms for controlled intracellular redox modulation.
title_zh: 肝细胞内活性氧物质控制的脂质结合策略
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  合成催化抗氧化剂为酶促氧化还原调节剂提供了有吸引力的替代品，但其生物应用常常受到稳定性差、配方挑战和对细胞内定位控制不足的限制。在这里，我们报告了一种脂质缀合策略，该策略能够将锰 Salen (EUK) 催化剂共价整合到磷脂膜中。建立了一种模块化合成路线，其中将羧酸酯功能化的 EUK 衍生物与胺封端的磷脂尾偶联，产生结构明确的磷脂-EUK 缀合物，该缀合物在脂质体制剂中保留催化活性，并具有受控的催化剂负载和长期胶体完整性。所得脂质体表现出活性氧（ROS）的有效催化降解，活性随缀合物含量而变化。重要的是，脂质双层内催化剂的共价锚定可以防止非缀合类似物观察到的聚集和沉淀。使用对乙酰氨基酚挑战的脂肪变性 HepaRG 细胞模型，我们证明脂质缀合能够在细胞内递送催化剂并持续降低升高的 ROS 水平，而不诱导细胞毒性。这项工作建立了一种化学精确方法，用于将有机金属催化剂定位在仿生膜内，并强调这些缀合物作为受控细胞内氧化还原调节的多功能平台。

title: CVD-grown tunable carbon films for high-performance sodium storage
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Sodium-ion batteries are considered a promising and sustainable energy-storage technology, yet achieving competitive energy density requires electrode materials with high reversible capacity. Here, we introduce a chemical vapor deposition strategy that allows the growth of uniform, electronically continuous carbon coatings onto highly porous carbon substrates for use as high-capacity negative electrodes. This coating narrows and partially seals the open pore network, suppresses surface reactivity, and establishes nanoconfined domains that allow sodium to be stored in a more compact manner. This restructuring significantly enhances sodium storage performance, delivering total reversible capacities exceeding 500 mAh g-1 together with an unprecedented 420 mAh g-1 reversible plateau capacity. By enabling control over heteroatom composition, confinement, and electronic structure, this approach not only addresses the challenge of designing uniform and electronically continuous carbon coatings on highly porous substrates but also establishes a general route for designing functional carbon films for advanced electrodes, catalysts, and interfaces with tunable electronic properties.
title_zh: 用于高性能钠存储的 CVD 生长可调碳膜
abstract_zh: 钠离子电池被认为是一种有前途且可持续的储能技术，但要实现有竞争力的能量密度需要具有高可逆容量的电极材料。在这里，我们引入了一种化学气相沉积策略，该策略允许在高度多孔的碳基材上生长均匀、电子连续的碳涂层，用作高容量负极。这种涂层缩小并部分密封了开孔网络，抑制了表面反应性，并建立了纳米限制域，使钠能够以更紧凑的方式储存。这种重组显着增强了钠存储性能，提供超过 500 mAh g-1 的总可逆容量以及前所未有的 420 mAh g-1 可逆平台容量。通过控制杂原子组成、限制和电子结构，该方法不仅解决了在高度多孔基材上设计均匀且电子连续的碳涂层的挑战，而且还建立了设计用于先进电极、催化剂和具有可调电子特性的界面的功能性碳膜的通用途径。

title: Interfacial water mediated oxide path mechanism for efficient acidic water oxidation on Co 3 O 4
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: The development of highly efficient and stable Co3O4-based electrocatalysts as promising alternatives to IrO2 for acidic oxygen evolution reaction (OER) is needed to support broader commercialisation of proton exchange membrane water electrolyzer (PEMWE). Unfortunately, the activity of Co3O4 is severely hindered by the linear scaling relationship through the favorable adsorbate evolution mechanism (AEM). Although considerable efforts have been devoted to promoting oxygen pathway mechanism (OPM) to bypass the AEM pathway through tailoring the inherent structures of active sites on Co3O4, limited attention has been paid to the role of interfacial water molecules at the catalyst-electrolyte interface. Here, we demonstrate that the acidic OER pathway of Co3O4 can be rationally regulated through partial substitution of octahedral Co atoms in Co3O4 with Sb. We find that the asymmetric Sb-O-Co motif could induce interfacial H2O reorientation into H-down configuration, thus suppressing the nucleophilic attack of H2O molecules on Co=O* intermediate, which is the key for triggering the reaction pathway from AEM to OPM. Consequently, the obtained Sb0.3Co2.7O4 catalyst exhibits remarkable OER activity and long-term durability, achieving 2 A cm-2 at 2.11 V and stable operation for over 800 hours at 2.0 A cm-2 in a PEMWE device.
title_zh: Co 3 O 4 上酸性水高效氧化的界面水介导的氧化物路径机制
abstract_zh: 需要开发高效稳定的 Co3O4 基电催化剂作为酸性析氧反应 (OER) 中 IrO2 的有前途的替代品，以支持质子交换膜水电解槽 (PEMWE) 更广泛的商业化。不幸的是，Co3O4 的活性受到有利的吸附质演化机制 (AEM) 的线性缩放关系的严重阻碍。尽管人们致力于通过调整Co3O4活性位点的固有结构来促进氧途径机制（OPM）绕过AEM途径，但对催化剂-电解质界面上的界面水分子的作用的关注有限。在这里，我们证明，Co3O4 的酸性 OER 途径可以通过用 Sb 部分取代 Co3O4 中的八面体 Co 原子来合理调节。我们发现，不对称的Sb-O-Co基序可以诱导界面H2O重新定向为H-down构型，从而抑制H2O分子对Co=O*中间体的亲核攻击，这是触发从AEM到OPM反应途径的关键。因此，所获得的Sb0.3Co2.7O4催化剂表现出显着的OER活性和长期耐久性，在2.11 V下实现了2 A cm-2，并在PEMWE装置中在2.0 A cm-2下稳定运行800小时以上。

title: Engineering coordination bonds for bioinspired responsive polymers
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Responsive polymeric materials capable of converting weak and heterogeneous environmental cues into adaptive macroscopic functions are essential for emerging technologies spanning soft robotics, sensing, biointerfaces, and autonomous systems. Coordination-crosslinked polymer networks (CCPNs), constructed by embedding dynamic metal–ligand interactions into polymer matrices, have emerged as a powerful materials platform for this purpose, owing to the unique tunability, reversibility, and multifunctionality of coordination bonds. Unlike conventional covalent or other supramolecular crosslinks, coordination bonds provide continuously adjustable bond strength, well-defined geometry, stimulus-sensitive equilibria, and access to electronic, redox, and catalytic transitions, enabling direct transduction of physical and chemical stimuli into mechanical, optical, and morphological responses. Despite rapid progress, a unified understanding that links coordination chemistry at the molecular level to material responsiveness across length and time scales remains lacking. In this review, we systematically examine how the intrinsic properties of coordination bonds give rise to material responsiveness in CCPNs. We first introduce fundamental coordination chemistry concepts relevant to responsive network design and discuss how these factors govern bond dynamicity, exchange kinetics, and stimulus sensitivity within polymer networks. We then analyse how coordination dynamics manifest as macroscopic responses, with a focus on stiffness variation, optical and chromic switching, shape memory and actuation, and life-like homeostatic behaviors driven by non-equilibrium bond cycling. Moving beyond single-interaction systems, we highlight recent advances in bond coupling strategies, where multiple coordination motifs or coordination bonds integrated with other supramolecular bonds, dynamic covalent bonds, or mechanical bonds generate hierarchical relaxation, orthogonal responsiveness, and synergistic function expression reminiscent of biological materials. Finally, we discuss key challenges and outline future opportunities for transforming coordination chemistry from a crosslinking motif into a molecular-level control framework for engineering responsive and life-like soft materials.
title_zh: 仿生响应聚合物的工程协调键
abstract_zh: 能够将微弱和异质环境信号转化为自适应宏观功能的响应性聚合物材料对于软机器人、传感、生物界面和自主系统等新兴技术至关重要。通过将动态金属-配体相互作用嵌入聚合物基质中而构建的配位交联聚合物网络（CCPN），由于配位键独特的可调性、可逆性和多功能性，已成为用于此目的的强大材料平台。与传统的共价或其他超分子交联不同，配位键提供连续可调的键强度、明确的几何形状、刺激敏感的平衡以及电子、氧化还原和催化转变，从而能够将物理和化学刺激直接转导为机械、光学和形态响应。尽管取得了快速进展，但仍缺乏将分子水平的配位化学与跨长度和时间尺度的材料响应性联系起来的统一理解。在这篇综述中，我们系统地研究了配位键的内在特性如何引起 CCPN 中的材料响应性。我们首先介绍与响应网络设计相关的基本配位化学概念，并讨论这些因素如何控制聚合物网络内的键动力学、交换动力学和刺激敏感性。然后，我们分析协调动力学如何表现为宏观响应，重点关注刚度变化、光学和色彩切换、形状记忆和

title: Soft-Chemistry Routes to Entropy-Engineered Nanomaterials: Complexity-Driven Performance in Redox Electrocatalysis
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: High-entropy nanomaterials (HENMs) have emerged as a distinctive class of electrocatalysts in which compositional complexity generates synergistic active sites, tuned electronic structures and exceptional durability. Conventional approaches to high-entropy phases have relied on harsh thermal or high-pressure conditions to achieve uniform alloying, restricting both scalability and structural control. In contrast, recent advances in soft-chemistry routes, such as hydrothermal and solvothermal methods, precursor decomposition, galvanic exchange and co-precipitation, enable the stabilization of high-entropy architectures under remarkably mild conditions. These strategies not only overcome kinetic barriers for multimetallic integration but also permit precise tailoring of morphology, surface chemistry and atomic configurations. Such structural control is critical for governing adsorption energetics, charge-transfer pathways and resilience under reaction environments, thereby paving the way toward the complexity-driven performance of HENMs in redox electrocatalysis. This review offers a unique perspective by focusing on soft-chemistry synthesis of HENMs and the resulting structureperformance relationships in electrocatalytic oxidation and reduction reactions. We critically examine formation mechanisms, design principles and catalytic outcomes, highlighting how entropy-engineered complexity translates into enhanced activity, selectivity and stability. Finally, we identify emerging opportunities for advancing mild-condition synthesis as a sustainable and versatile platform for the rational design of next-generation high-entropy electrocatalysts for energy conversion..
title_zh: 熵工程纳米材料的软化学路线：氧化还原电催化中复杂性驱动的性能
abstract_zh: 高熵纳米材料（HENM）已成为一类独特的电催化剂，其成分复杂性产生协同活性位点、调整的电子结构和卓越的耐用性。高熵相的传统方法依赖于恶劣的热或高压条件来实现均匀合金化，限制了可扩展性和结构控制。相比之下，软化学路线的最新进展，例如水热和溶剂热方法、前体分解、电交换和共沉淀，使得高熵结构在非常温和的条件下变得稳定。这些策略不仅克服了多金属集成的动力学障碍，而且还允许精确调整形态、表面化学和原子构型。这种结构控制对于控制反应环境下的吸附能量、电荷转移途径和弹性至关重要，从而为 HENM 在氧化还原电催化中的复杂性驱动性能铺平了道路。本综述重点关注 HENM 的软化学合成以及电催化氧化和还原反应中的结构性能关系，提供了独特的视角。我们批判性地研究形成机制、设计原理和催化结果，强调熵工程的复杂性如何转化为增强的活性、选择性和稳定性。最后，我们确定了推进温和条件合成作为可持续和多功能平台的新兴机会
